function faIcon(cls, extraStyle='') {
  // Extract icon name from class like "fas fa-arrow-left"
  const match = cls.match(/fa-([\w-]+)/);
  if (!match) return `<span style="display:inline-block;width:1em;height:1em${extraStyle?';'+extraStyle:''}"></span>`;
  const name = match[1];
  const data = FA_ICONS[name];
  if (!data) return `<span title="${name}" style="font-size:0.7em;opacity:0.5${extraStyle?';'+extraStyle:''}">?</span>`;
  const [vb, path] = data.split('|');
  return `<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="${vb}" style="display:inline-block;height:1em;width:auto;vertical-align:-0.125em;fill:currentColor${extraStyle?';'+extraStyle:''}" aria-hidden="true"><path d="${path}"/></svg>`;
}


// Reemplaza todos los <i class="fas fa-*"> con SVG al cargar
function replaceIcons(root){
  (root||document).querySelectorAll('i[class*="fa-"]').forEach(el=>{
    const match=el.className.match(/fa-([\w-]+)/);
    if(!match)return;
    const name=match[1];
    const data=FA_ICONS[name];
    if(!data)return;
    const[vb,path]=data.split('|');
    const svg=document.createElementNS('http://www.w3.org/2000/svg','svg');
    svg.setAttribute('viewBox',vb);
    svg.setAttribute('aria-hidden','true');
    svg.style.cssText='display:inline-block;height:1em;width:auto;vertical-align:-0.125em;fill:currentColor;flex-shrink:0';
    const p=document.createElementNS('http://www.w3.org/2000/svg','path');
    p.setAttribute('d',path);
    svg.appendChild(p);
    // Preserve el color del padre
    if(el.style.color)svg.style.color=el.style.color;
    el.parentNode.replaceChild(svg,el);
  });
}
document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded',()=>replaceIcons(document));
// MutationObserver para iconos generados dinámicamente
const _iconObs=new MutationObserver(muts=>{
  muts.forEach(m=>m.addedNodes.forEach(n=>{
    if(n.nodeType===1){
      if(n.matches&&n.matches('i[class*="fa-"]'))replaceIcons(n.parentNode);
      else if(n.querySelectorAll)replaceIcons(n);
    }
  }));
});
document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded',()=>{
  _iconObs.observe(document.body,{childList:true,subtree:true});
});
</script>
<style>
:root{
  --bg:#0a0809;--bg2:rgba(18,16,26,0.92);--bg3:#1a1622;
  --card:rgba(18,16,26,0.88);--card-solid:#14111e;
  --border:#3a2f48;--border-light:#5a4a6a;
  --fg:#e8dcc8;--fg-dim:#a89b8a;--muted:#6a5e50;
  --accent:#8b1a1a;--accent-bright:#c4362a;--accent-glow:rgba(196,54,42,0.35);
  --gold:#c9a84c;--gold-bright:#e0c060;--gold-dim:rgba(201,168,76,0.12);--gold-glow:rgba(201,168,76,0.35);
  --teal:#3a8a7a;--teal-bright:#50b8a4;--teal-dim:rgba(58,138,122,0.12);--teal-glow:rgba(58,138,122,0.3);
  --purple:#7a4a8a;--purple-dim:rgba(122,74,138,0.12);
}
*{margin:0;padding:0;box-sizing:border-box}
html,body{height:100%}
body{font-family:'Crimson Text',Georgia,serif;background:var(--bg);color:var(--fg);overflow-x:hidden}

.magic-bg{position:fixed;inset:0;z-index:0;pointer-events:none;background:radial-gradient(ellipse 120% 80% at 50% 60%,rgba(139,26,26,0.07) 0%,transparent 60%),radial-gradient(ellipse 80% 60% at 20% 20%,rgba(201,168,76,0.05) 0%,transparent 50%),radial-gradient(ellipse 60% 50% at 80% 80%,rgba(58,138,122,0.04) 0%,transparent 50%),var(--bg)}
.magic-bg::before{content:'';position:absolute;inset:0;background:url("data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg viewBox='0 0 256 256' xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%3E%3Cfilter id='n'%3E%3CfeTurbulence type='fractalNoise' baseFrequency='0.9' numOctaves='4' stitchTiles='stitch'/%3E%3C/filter%3E%3Crect width='100%25' height='100%25' filter='url(%23n)' opacity='0.03'/%3E%3C/svg%3E");opacity:0.5}
.magic-particles{position:fixed;inset:0;z-index:1;pointer-events:none;overflow:hidden}
.mp{position:absolute;border-radius:50%;opacity:0;animation:mpFloat linear infinite;will-change:transform,opacity}
@keyframes mpFloat{0%{opacity:0;transform:translateY(0) translateX(0) scale(.3)}8%{opacity:var(--mp-opacity,.6)}50%{opacity:calc(var(--mp-opacity,.6)*.7)}92%{opacity:calc(var(--mp-opacity,.6)*.3)}100%{opacity:0;transform:translateY(-105vh) translateX(var(--mp-dx4,-5px)) scale(.2)}}
.mp-pulse{animation:mpPulse ease-in-out infinite}
@keyframes mpPulse{0%,100%{opacity:0;transform:scale(.5)}30%{opacity:var(--mp-opacity,.5);transform:scale(1.2)}70%{opacity:calc(var(--mp-opacity,.5)*.4);transform:scale(.8)}}
.mp-drift{animation:mpDrift linear infinite}
@keyframes mpDrift{0%{opacity:0}10%{opacity:var(--mp-opacity,.4)}90%{opacity:calc(var(--mp-opacity,.4)*.3)}100%{opacity:0;transform:translateX(calc(100vw + 20px)) translateY(var(--mp-dy,-30px))}}
.mp-fall{animation:mpFall linear infinite}
@keyframes mpFall{0%{opacity:0}10%{opacity:var(--mp-opacity,.35)}90%{opacity:calc(var(--mp-opacity,.35)*.2)}100%{opacity:0;transform:translateY(105vh) translateX(var(--mp-dx2,40px)) rotate(360deg)}}

/* ===== SPLASH ===== */
.splash{position:fixed;inset:0;z-index:1000;display:flex;flex-direction:column;align-items:center;justify-content:center;transition:opacity .8s ease,transform .8s ease}
.splash.hidden{opacity:0;transform:scale(1.05);pointer-events:none}
.splash-bg{position:absolute;inset:0;background:url('https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1578662996442-48f60103fc96?w=1920&q=80') center/cover no-repeat;filter:brightness(.2) saturate(.5) contrast(1.15)}
.splash-bg::after{content:'';position:absolute;inset:0;background:radial-gradient(ellipse 100% 70% at 50% 55%,rgba(139,26,26,.2) 0%,transparent 55%),radial-gradient(ellipse 70% 50% at 25% 25%,rgba(201,168,76,.1) 0%,transparent 50%),linear-gradient(180deg,rgba(10,8,9,.2) 0%,rgba(10,8,9,.95) 100%)}
.splash-vignette{position:absolute;inset:0;z-index:1;box-shadow:inset 0 0 250px 80px rgba(10,8,9,.85);pointer-events:none}
.splash-content{position:relative;z-index:10;display:flex;flex-direction:column;align-items:center;text-align:center;padding:20px}
.logo-container{width:200px;height:200px;margin-bottom:12px;animation:logoAppear 1.5s ease-out both;filter:drop-shadow(0 0 30px rgba(201,168,76,.3))}
@keyframes logoAppear{0%{opacity:0;transform:scale(.7) translateY(20px)}100%{opacity:1;transform:scale(1) translateY(0)}}
.splash-title{font-family:'Cinzel Decorative',serif;font-size:clamp(30px,5.5vw,56px);font-weight:900;color:var(--gold-bright);letter-spacing:6px;text-transform:uppercase;line-height:1.1;text-shadow:0 0 40px rgba(201,168,76,.4),0 2px 10px rgba(0,0,0,.8);animation:titleAppear 1.2s .4s ease-out both}
@keyframes titleAppear{0%{opacity:0;transform:translateY(30px);letter-spacing:20px}100%{opacity:1;transform:translateY(0);letter-spacing:6px}}
.splash-subtitle{font-family:'Cinzel',serif;font-size:clamp(11px,1.6vw,15px);color:var(--fg-dim);letter-spacing:8px;text-transform:uppercase;margin-top:8px;animation:subAppear 1s .8s ease-out both}
@keyframes subAppear{0%{opacity:0;transform:translateY(15px)}100%{opacity:1;transform:translateY(0)}}
.splash-divider{width:200px;height:2px;background:linear-gradient(90deg,transparent,var(--gold),transparent);margin:28px 0;position:relative;animation:divAppear .8s 1s ease-out both}
.splash-divider::before{content:'◆';position:absolute;left:50%;top:50%;transform:translate(-50%,-50%);color:var(--gold);font-size:12px;padding:0 10px;background:var(--bg)}
@keyframes divAppear{0%{opacity:0;width:0}100%{opacity:1;width:200px}}
.splash-buttons{display:flex;gap:24px;animation:btnsAppear 1s 1.3s ease-out both;flex-wrap:wrap;justify-content:center}
@keyframes btnsAppear{0%{opacity:0;transform:translateY(20px)}100%{opacity:1;transform:translateY(0)}}
.role-btn{position:relative;width:220px;height:140px;border:2px solid var(--border);border-radius:16px;background:var(--card);backdrop-filter:blur(12px);display:flex;flex-direction:column;align-items:center;justify-content:center;gap:10px;cursor:pointer;transition:all .4s cubic-bezier(.23,1,.32,1);overflow:hidden;font-family:'Cinzel',serif}
.role-btn::before{content:'';position:absolute;inset:0;border-radius:14px;opacity:0;transition:opacity .4s}
.role-btn:hover{transform:translateY(-6px) scale(1.03);box-shadow:0 8px 40px rgba(0,0,0,.5)}
.role-btn:active{transform:translateY(-2px) scale(.98)}
.role-btn.player::before{background:radial-gradient(ellipse at center,rgba(58,138,122,.15),transparent 70%)}.role-btn.player:hover::before{opacity:1}.role-btn.player:hover{border-color:var(--teal-bright);box-shadow:0 8px 40px rgba(0,0,0,.5),0 0 30px var(--teal-dim)}.role-btn.player .role-icon,.role-btn.player .role-name{color:var(--teal-bright)}
.role-btn.dm::before{background:radial-gradient(ellipse at center,rgba(196,54,42,.15),transparent 70%)}.role-btn.dm:hover::before{opacity:1}.role-btn.dm:hover{border-color:var(--accent-bright);box-shadow:0 8px 40px rgba(0,0,0,.5),0 0 30px var(--accent-glow)}.role-btn.dm .role-icon,.role-btn.dm .role-name{color:var(--accent-bright)}
.role-icon{font-size:32px;transition:transform .3s,filter .3s}.role-btn:hover .role-icon{transform:scale(1.15);filter:drop-shadow(0 0 10px currentColor)}
.role-name{font-size:16px;font-weight:700;letter-spacing:2px;text-transform:uppercase;transition:color .3s}.role-btn:hover .role-name{text-shadow:0 0 15px currentColor}
.role-desc{font-family:'Crimson Text',serif;font-size:12px;color:var(--muted);transition:color .3s}.role-btn:hover .role-desc{color:var(--fg-dim)}
.splash-footer{position:absolute;bottom:20px;left:0;right:0;z-index:10;text-align:center;font-size:12px;color:var(--muted);letter-spacing:2px;animation:footerAppear 1s 1.8s ease-out both}
@keyframes footerAppear{0%{opacity:0}100%{opacity:1}}

/* ===== APP ===== */
.app{display:none;min-height:100vh;opacity:0;transition:opacity .5s;position:relative;z-index:2}
.app.visible{display:flex;opacity:1}
.sidebar{width:72px;background:rgba(18,16,26,.92);backdrop-filter:blur(10px);border-right:1px solid var(--border);display:flex;flex-direction:column;align-items:center;padding:16px 0;gap:4px;position:fixed;top:0;left:0;height:100vh;z-index:100}
.sidebar-logo{width:44px;height:44px;background:linear-gradient(135deg,var(--accent),#6a1010);border-radius:12px;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;font-family:'Cinzel',serif;font-weight:900;font-size:15px;color:var(--gold);margin-bottom:20px;cursor:pointer;transition:transform .2s;box-shadow:0 4px 16px var(--accent-glow)}
.sidebar-logo:hover{transform:scale(1.08)}
.nav-item{width:52px;height:52px;border-radius:14px;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;color:var(--muted);cursor:pointer;transition:all .2s;position:relative;font-size:18px}
.nav-item:hover{color:var(--fg);background:rgba(26,22,34,.8)}
.nav-item.active{color:var(--gold);background:var(--gold-dim)}
.nav-item.active::before{content:'';position:absolute;left:-10px;width:3px;height:24px;background:var(--gold);border-radius:0 3px 3px 0}
.nav-item .tooltip{position:absolute;left:62px;background:var(--bg3);border:1px solid var(--border);color:var(--fg);padding:6px 12px;border-radius:8px;font-size:13px;font-family:'Crimson Text',serif;white-space:nowrap;opacity:0;pointer-events:none;transition:opacity .15s;z-index:200}
.nav-item:hover .tooltip{opacity:1}
.nav-divider{width:32px;height:1px;background:var(--border);margin:8px 0}
.main-content{margin-left:72px;flex:1;min-height:100vh;position:relative;z-index:2}
.page{display:none;padding:40px;animation:pageIn .4s ease;position:relative;flex-direction:column}
.page.active{display:flex}
@keyframes pageIn{from{opacity:0;transform:translateY(10px)}to{opacity:1;transform:translateY(0)}}
.home-center{min-height:100vh;justify-content:center;align-items:center;text-align:center}
.module-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(auto-fit,minmax(220px,1fr));gap:20px;margin-top:30px;max-width:960px;width:100%}
.module-card{position:relative;background:var(--card);backdrop-filter:blur(10px);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:16px;padding:30px 20px;cursor:pointer;transition:all .35s cubic-bezier(.23,1,.32,1);overflow:hidden;text-align:center;min-height:170px;display:flex;flex-direction:column;align-items:center;justify-content:center;gap:10px}
.module-card:hover{transform:translateY(-6px);box-shadow:0 8px 40px rgba(0,0,0,.5)}
.module-card .mc-icon{font-size:34px;transition:transform .3s,filter .3s}.module-card:hover .mc-icon{transform:scale(1.15);filter:drop-shadow(0 0 12px currentColor)}
.module-card .mc-title{font-family:'Cinzel',serif;font-size:15px;font-weight:700;letter-spacing:1px}.module-card .mc-desc{font-size:12px;color:var(--muted);line-height:1.5}.module-card:hover .mc-desc{color:var(--fg-dim)}
.mc-teal{border-color:rgba(58,138,122,.3)}.mc-teal:hover{border-color:var(--teal-bright);box-shadow:0 8px 40px rgba(0,0,0,.4),0 0 25px var(--teal-dim)}.mc-teal .mc-icon,.mc-teal .mc-title{color:var(--teal-bright)}
.mc-red{border-color:rgba(196,54,42,.3)}.mc-red:hover{border-color:var(--accent-bright);box-shadow:0 8px 40px rgba(0,0,0,.4),0 0 25px var(--accent-glow)}.mc-red .mc-icon,.mc-red .mc-title{color:var(--accent-bright)}
.mc-gold{border-color:rgba(201,168,76,.3)}.mc-gold:hover{border-color:var(--gold-bright);box-shadow:0 8px 40px rgba(0,0,0,.4),0 0 25px var(--gold-glow)}.mc-gold .mc-icon,.mc-gold .mc-title{color:var(--gold-bright)}
.mc-purple{border-color:rgba(122,74,138,.3)}.mc-purple:hover{border-color:var(--purple);box-shadow:0 8px 40px rgba(0,0,0,.4),0 0 25px var(--purple-dim)}.mc-purple .mc-icon,.mc-purple .mc-title{color:var(--purple)}
.welcome-header h1{font-family:'Cinzel Decorative',serif;font-size:clamp(24px,4vw,38px);font-weight:900;letter-spacing:3px}
.welcome-header h1.dm-title{color:var(--accent-bright);text-shadow:0 0 30px var(--accent-glow)}
.welcome-header h1.player-title{color:var(--teal-bright);text-shadow:0 0 30px var(--teal-glow)}
.welcome-sub{font-size:16px;color:var(--fg-dim);margin-bottom:4px}
.welcome-divider{width:120px;height:2px;background:linear-gradient(90deg,transparent,var(--gold),transparent);margin:14px auto}
.page-content{padding-top:60px;align-items:flex-start;text-align:left}

/* ===== CAMPAIGNS v1.1.0 ===== */
.page-header{display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:center;width:100%;margin-bottom:30px;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:20px}
.page-header h1{margin:0}
.header-actions{display:flex;gap:12px;flex-wrap:wrap}
.btn{font-family:'Cinzel',serif;padding:10px 20px;border-radius:10px;border:1px solid var(--border);background:var(--card);color:var(--fg);cursor:pointer;font-size:14px;transition:all .3s;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px}
.btn:hover{transform:translateY(-2px);box-shadow:0 4px 15px rgba(0,0,0,.4)}
.btn-primary{border-color:var(--gold);color:var(--gold);background:var(--gold-dim)}.btn-primary:hover{background:rgba(201,168,76,.2);box-shadow:0 0 15px var(--gold-dim)}
.btn-secondary{border-color:var(--teal);color:var(--teal-bright);background:var(--teal-dim)}.btn-secondary:hover{background:rgba(58,138,122,.2);box-shadow:0 0 15px var(--teal-dim)}
.btn-danger-sm{background:none;border:none;color:var(--muted);cursor:pointer;font-size:14px;padding:5px;transition:color .2s}.btn-danger-sm:hover{color:var(--accent-bright)}

.campaign-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(auto-fill,minmax(320px,1fr));gap:24px;width:100%}
.campaign-card{background:var(--card);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:16px;padding:24px;display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:12px;transition:all .3s;position:relative;overflow:hidden}
.campaign-card::before{content:'';position:absolute;top:0;left:0;width:4px;height:100%;background:var(--gold);opacity:.5;transition:opacity .3s}
.campaign-card:hover{border-color:var(--gold);transform:translateY(-4px);box-shadow:0 8px 25px rgba(0,0,0,.5)}.campaign-card:hover::before{opacity:1}
.cc-title{font-family:'Cinzel',serif;font-size:20px;color:var(--gold-bright);padding-right:30px}
.cc-badges{display:flex;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:6px}
.badge{font-size:11px;padding:4px 10px;border-radius:20px;font-weight:600;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.5px;font-family:'Cinzel',serif}
.badge-gold{background:var(--gold-dim);color:var(--gold-bright);border:1px solid rgba(201,168,76,.3)}
.badge-teal{background:var(--teal-dim);color:var(--teal-bright);border:1px solid rgba(58,138,122,.3)}
.badge-red{background:rgba(196,54,42,.1);color:var(--accent-bright);border:1px solid rgba(196,54,42,.3)}
.badge-purple{background:var(--purple-dim);color:#b88adc;border:1px solid rgba(122,74,138,.3)}
.cc-premise{font-size:15px;color:var(--fg-dim);font-style:italic;line-height:1.5;flex-grow:1}
.cc-footer{display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:center;margin-top:10px;padding-top:12px;border-top:1px solid var(--border);font-size:13px;color:var(--muted)}

/* ===== MODAL ===== */
.modal-overlay{position:fixed;inset:0;background:rgba(0,0,0,.7);backdrop-filter:blur(6px);z-index:2000;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;opacity:0;pointer-events:none;transition:opacity .3s}
.modal-overlay.active{opacity:1;pointer-events:auto}
.modal-content{background:var(--bg3);border:1px solid var(--gold);border-radius:20px;width:90%;max-width:600px;max-height:85vh;overflow-y:auto;padding:30px;transform:translateY(20px);transition:transform .3s;box-shadow:0 0 40px var(--gold-dim)}
.modal-overlay.active .modal-content{transform:translateY(0)}
.modal-header{display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:center;margin-bottom:24px;border-bottom:1px solid var(--border);padding-bottom:12px}
.modal-title{font-family:'Cinzel Decorative',serif;font-size:22px;color:var(--gold-bright)}
.modal-close{background:none;border:none;color:var(--fg-dim);font-size:20px;cursor:pointer;transition:color .2s}.modal-close:hover{color:var(--accent-bright)}
.form-group{margin-bottom:18px}
.form-label{display:block;font-family:'Cinzel',serif;font-size:13px;color:var(--gold);margin-bottom:8px;letter-spacing:1px}
.form-input,.form-select,.form-textarea{width:100%;padding:12px;background:rgba(0,0,0,.4);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:10px;color:var(--fg);font-family:'Crimson Text',serif;font-size:16px;transition:border-color .2s}
.form-input:focus,.form-select:focus,.form-textarea:focus{outline:none;border-color:var(--gold);box-shadow:0 0 10px var(--gold-dim)}
.form-select option{background:var(--bg3);color:var(--fg)}
.form-textarea{resize:vertical;min-height:100px}
.form-row{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:16px}
.form-actions{display:flex;justify-content:flex-end;gap:12px;margin-top:24px}

.toast-container{position:fixed;bottom:24px;right:24px;z-index:9999;display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:8px}
.toast{background:rgba(26,22,34,.95);backdrop-filter:blur(8px);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:12px;padding:12px 20px;color:var(--fg);font-size:14px;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:10px;animation:toastIn .3s ease;box-shadow:0 8px 32px rgba(0,0,0,.5)}
.toast.info{border-color:var(--gold)}.toast.info i{color:var(--gold)}
.toast.success{border-color:var(--teal-bright)}.toast.success i{color:var(--teal-bright)}
@keyframes toastIn{from{opacity:0;transform:translateY(20px)}to{opacity:1;transform:translateY(0)}}

@media(max-width:700px){.module-grid{grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr}.page{padding:24px 16px}.form-row{grid-template-columns:1fr}.campaign-grid{grid-template-columns:1fr}}
@media(max-width:440px){.module-grid{grid-template-columns:1fr}}

/* ===== DM SCREEN v1.2.0 ===== */
.dm-screen{display:flex;flex-direction:column;height:calc(100vh - 60px);overflow:hidden}
.dm-tabs{display:flex;gap:2px;background:var(--bg3);border-bottom:2px solid var(--border);padding:0 8px;flex-shrink:0;overflow-x:auto}
.dm-tab{font-family:'Cinzel',serif;font-size:12px;padding:10px 16px;color:var(--muted);cursor:pointer;border-bottom:2px solid transparent;transition:all .2s;white-space:nowrap;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:6px}
.dm-tab:hover{color:var(--fg);background:rgba(26,22,34,.5)}
.dm-tab.active{color:var(--gold-bright);border-bottom-color:var(--gold);background:rgba(201,168,76,.06)}
.dm-tab i{font-size:13px}
.dm-tab-content{display:none;flex:1;overflow-y:auto;padding:20px;animation:tabIn .3s ease}
.dm-tab-content.active{display:block}
@keyframes tabIn{from{opacity:0;transform:translateX(8px)}to{opacity:1;transform:translateX(0)}}

/* Accordion */
.acc-section{margin-bottom:8px;border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:10px;overflow:hidden;background:var(--card)}
.acc-header{font-family:'Cinzel',serif;font-size:13px;padding:10px 16px;color:var(--gold);cursor:pointer;display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:center;transition:background .2s;letter-spacing:.5px}
.acc-header:hover{background:rgba(201,168,76,.06)}
.acc-header i{transition:transform .3s;font-size:11px;color:var(--muted)}
.acc-section.open .acc-header i{transform:rotate(180deg)}
.acc-body{display:none;padding:12px;overflow-x:auto}
.acc-section.open .acc-body{display:block}

/* Reference Tables */
.rtable{width:100%;border-collapse:collapse;font-size:11px;font-family:'Crimson Text',serif;color:var(--fg)}
.rtable th{background:rgba(201,168,76,.15);color:var(--gold-bright);font-family:'Cinzel',serif;font-weight:700;font-size:10px;padding:6px 8px;text-align:center;letter-spacing:.5px;border:1px solid var(--border);white-space:nowrap}
.rtable td{padding:4px 6px;text-align:center;border:1px solid rgba(58,47,72,.5);white-space:nowrap}
.rtable tr:nth-child(even) td{background:rgba(26,22,34,.5)}
.rtable tr:nth-child(odd) td{background:rgba(18,16,26,.3)}
.rtable tr:hover td{background:rgba(201,168,76,.06)}
.rtable td:first-child{font-weight:700;color:var(--gold);text-align:left}

/* PC Cards */
.pc-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(auto-fill,minmax(300px,1fr));gap:16px;margin-top:16px}
.pc-card{background:var(--card);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:14px;padding:16px;transition:all .3s;position:relative}
.pc-card:hover{border-color:var(--gold);transform:translateY(-2px);box-shadow:0 6px 20px rgba(0,0,0,.4)}
.pc-card.pc-activo{border-left:3px solid var(--teal-bright)}
.pc-card.pc-inconsciente{border-left:3px solid var(--gold-bright)}
.pc-card.pc-muerto{border-left:3px solid var(--accent-bright);opacity:.7}
.pc-name{font-family:'Cinzel',serif;font-size:16px;color:var(--gold-bright);margin-bottom:4px}
.pc-subtitle{font-size:12px;color:var(--fg-dim);margin-bottom:10px}
.hp-bar-wrap{background:rgba(0,0,0,.4);border-radius:6px;height:18px;overflow:hidden;position:relative;margin:6px 0}
.hp-bar{height:100%;border-radius:6px;transition:width .4s ease;min-width:2px}
.hp-bar.hp-high{background:linear-gradient(90deg,#2d7a3a,#4aaa5a)}
.hp-bar.hp-mid{background:linear-gradient(90deg,#8a7a2a,#c9a84c)}
.hp-bar.hp-low{background:linear-gradient(90deg,#8b1a1a,#c4362a)}
.hp-bar.hp-crit{background:linear-gradient(90deg,#6a0a0a,#8b1a1a);animation:hpPulse 1s infinite}
@keyframes hpPulse{0%,100%{opacity:1}50%{opacity:.6}}
.hp-text{position:absolute;inset:0;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;font-size:10px;font-weight:700;color:#fff;text-shadow:0 1px 2px rgba(0,0,0,.8)}
.pc-stats{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(4,1fr);gap:6px;margin-top:10px}
.pc-stat{text-align:center;font-size:11px;padding:4px;background:rgba(0,0,0,.3);border-radius:6px}
.pc-stat-val{font-family:'Cinzel',serif;font-size:14px;font-weight:700;color:var(--gold-bright)}
.pc-stat-lbl{font-size:9px;color:var(--muted);text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.5px}
.pc-actions{display:flex;gap:6px;margin-top:10px}
.xp-bar-wrap{background:rgba(0,0,0,.4);border-radius:4px;height:8px;overflow:hidden;margin-top:6px}
.xp-bar{height:100%;background:linear-gradient(90deg,var(--teal),var(--teal-bright));border-radius:4px;transition:width .4s}

/* Combat Tracker */
.combat-section{margin-bottom:20px}
.combat-section-title{font-family:'Cinzel',serif;font-size:14px;color:var(--gold-bright);margin-bottom:10px;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px}
.combatant-list{display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:8px}
.combatant{background:var(--card);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:10px;padding:12px;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:12px;transition:all .2s}
.combatant.active-combatant{border-color:var(--gold);box-shadow:0 0 12px var(--gold-dim)}
.combatant.init-val{font-family:'Cinzel',serif;font-size:20px;font-weight:700;color:var(--gold-bright);min-width:36px;text-align:center}
.combatant .c-info{flex:1;min-width:0}
.combatant .c-name{font-family:'Cinzel',serif;font-size:13px;color:var(--fg)}
.combatant .c-type{font-size:10px;color:var(--muted)}
.combatant .c-hp{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:6px}
.combatant .c-hp-bar{width:100px;height:10px;background:rgba(0,0,0,.4);border-radius:5px;overflow:hidden}
.combatant .c-hp-fill{height:100%;border-radius:5px;transition:width .3s}
.combatant .c-hp-text{font-size:11px;color:var(--fg-dim);min-width:50px}
.c-actions-row{display:flex;gap:4px}
.c-btn{background:none;border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:6px;color:var(--fg-dim);cursor:pointer;font-size:11px;padding:3px 7px;transition:all .2s}
.c-btn:hover{border-color:var(--gold);color:var(--gold)}
.c-btn.c-btn-dmg{border-color:rgba(196,54,42,.3);color:var(--accent-bright)}.c-btn.c-btn-dmg:hover{border-color:var(--accent-bright)}
.c-btn.c-btn-heal{border-color:rgba(58,138,122,.3);color:var(--teal-bright)}.c-btn.c-btn-heal:hover{border-color:var(--teal-bright)}
.status-badge{font-size:9px;padding:2px 8px;border-radius:10px;font-family:'Cinzel',serif;font-weight:700;letter-spacing:.5px;text-transform:uppercase}
.status-normal{background:var(--teal-dim);color:var(--teal-bright);border:1px solid rgba(58,138,122,.3)}
.status-herido{background:var(--gold-dim);color:var(--gold-bright);border:1px solid rgba(201,168,76,.3)}
.status-critico{background:rgba(196,54,42,.1);color:var(--accent-bright);border:1px solid rgba(196,54,42,.3)}
.status-muerto{background:rgba(107,10,10,.2);color:#e44;border:1px solid rgba(196,54,42,.5)}

/* Effects Panel */
.effect-item{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;padding:8px 12px;background:var(--card);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:8px;font-size:12px}
.effect-name{flex:1;color:var(--fg)}
.effect-dur{font-family:'Cinzel',serif;color:var(--gold-bright);font-size:11px}

/* Dice Roller */
.dice-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(4,1fr);gap:8px;margin:10px 0}
.dice-btn{font-family:'Cinzel',serif;font-size:13px;padding:10px 8px;border-radius:10px;border:1px solid var(--border);background:var(--card);color:var(--fg);cursor:pointer;transition:all .2s;text-align:center}
.dice-btn:hover{border-color:var(--gold);color:var(--gold-bright);transform:translateY(-2px);box-shadow:0 4px 12px rgba(0,0,0,.3)}
.dice-btn:active{transform:translateY(0)}
.dice-result{font-family:'Cinzel',serif;font-size:28px;color:var(--gold-bright);text-align:center;margin:10px 0;text-shadow:0 0 15px var(--gold-glow)}
.roll-history{max-height:200px;overflow-y:auto;font-size:11px;color:var(--fg-dim)}
.roll-entry{padding:4px 8px;border-bottom:1px solid rgba(58,47,72,.3)}
.roll-entry span{color:var(--gold)}

/* Training */
.train-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(auto-fill,minmax(280px,1fr));gap:12px;margin-top:12px}
.train-card{background:var(--card);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:12px;padding:14px;transition:all .2s}
.train-card:hover{border-color:var(--teal);box-shadow:0 4px 12px rgba(0,0,0,.3)}
.train-title{font-family:'Cinzel',serif;font-size:13px;color:var(--teal-bright);margin-bottom:4px}
.train-req{font-size:11px;color:var(--fg-dim);margin-bottom:6px}
.train-cost{font-size:11px;color:var(--gold)}

/* Session */
.session-note{width:100%;min-height:200px;background:rgba(0,0,0,.4);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:10px;color:var(--fg);font-family:'Crimson Text',serif;font-size:15px;padding:14px;resize:vertical;line-height:1.6}
.session-note:focus{outline:none;border-color:var(--gold)}
.npc-list{display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:6px}
.npc-item{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;padding:8px 12px;background:var(--card);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:8px;font-size:12px}

/* Generators */
.gen-result{background:var(--card);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:12px;padding:16px;margin-top:12px;font-size:14px;line-height:1.6}
.gen-result h4{font-family:'Cinzel',serif;color:var(--gold-bright);margin-bottom:8px}
.gen-row{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:12px;margin-bottom:12px}

/* Compact forms for DM Screen */
.dm-form-row{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(auto-fit,minmax(140px,1fr));gap:10px;margin-bottom:12px}
.dm-form-group{margin-bottom:10px}
.dm-form-label{display:block;font-family:'Cinzel',serif;font-size:11px;color:var(--gold);margin-bottom:4px;letter-spacing:.5px}
.dm-input{width:100%;padding:8px 10px;background:rgba(0,0,0,.4);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:8px;color:var(--fg);font-family:'Crimson Text',serif;font-size:13px;transition:border-color .2s}
.dm-input:focus{outline:none;border-color:var(--gold)}
.dm-select{width:100%;padding:8px 10px;background:rgba(0,0,0,.4);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:8px;color:var(--fg);font-family:'Crimson Text',serif;font-size:13px}
.dm-select option{background:var(--bg3);color:var(--fg)}
.dm-btn{font-family:'Cinzel',serif;font-size:11px;padding:7px 14px;border-radius:8px;border:1px solid var(--border);background:var(--card);color:var(--fg);cursor:pointer;transition:all .2s;display:inline-flex;align-items:center;gap:5px}
.dm-btn:hover{transform:translateY(-1px);box-shadow:0 3px 10px rgba(0,0,0,.3)}
.dm-btn-gold{border-color:var(--gold);color:var(--gold);background:var(--gold-dim)}.dm-btn-gold:hover{background:rgba(201,168,76,.2)}
.dm-btn-teal{border-color:var(--teal);color:var(--teal-bright);background:var(--teal-dim)}.dm-btn-teal:hover{background:rgba(58,138,122,.2)}
.dm-btn-red{border-color:rgba(196,54,42,.4);color:var(--accent-bright);background:rgba(196,54,42,.1)}.dm-btn-red:hover{background:rgba(196,54,42,.2)}
.dm-btn-sm{font-size:10px;padding:4px 10px}

/* Custom scrollbar for DM Screen */
.dm-tab-content::-webkit-scrollbar{width:6px}
.dm-tab-content::-webkit-scrollbar-track{background:var(--bg)}
.dm-tab-content::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb{background:var(--border);border-radius:3px}
.dm-tab-content::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb:hover{background:var(--border-light)}

/* Hooks checklist */
.hook-item{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;padding:6px 0;font-size:13px;color:var(--fg-dim)}
.hook-item input[type=checkbox]{accent-color:var(--gold)}
.hook-item.checked{text-decoration:line-through;opacity:.5}

@media(max-width:700px){.dm-tabs{gap:0;padding:0 4px}.dm-tab{font-size:10px;padding:8px 10px}.pc-grid{grid-template-columns:1fr}.dice-grid{grid-template-columns:repeat(3,1fr)}.gen-row{grid-template-columns:1fr}.dm-form-row{grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr}.wizard-steps{flex-wrap:wrap}.wizard-step{font-size:9px;padding:6px 8px}.encounter-cols{grid-template-columns:1fr}.xp-table-wrap{overflow-x:auto}}

/* ===== v1.4.0 CAMPAIGN DETAIL ===== */
.campaign-detail{display:none;flex-direction:column;height:calc(100vh - 80px);overflow-y:auto}
.campaign-detail.active{display:flex}
.cd-header{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:16px;padding:16px 20px;border-bottom:1px solid var(--border);flex-shrink:0}
.cd-back{font-family:'Cinzel',serif;font-size:12px;color:var(--fg-dim);cursor:pointer;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:6px;transition:color .2s;background:none;border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:8px;padding:6px 12px}
.cd-back:hover{color:var(--gold);border-color:var(--gold)}
.cd-title{font-family:'Cinzel Decorative',serif;font-size:20px;color:var(--gold-bright);flex:1}
.cd-badges{display:flex;gap:6px;flex-wrap:wrap}
.cd-tabs{display:flex;gap:2px;background:var(--bg3);border-bottom:2px solid var(--border);padding:0 8px;flex-shrink:0;overflow-x:auto}
.cd-tab{font-family:'Cinzel',serif;font-size:12px;padding:10px 16px;color:var(--muted);cursor:pointer;border-bottom:2px solid transparent;transition:all .2s;white-space:nowrap;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:6px}
.cd-tab:hover{color:var(--fg);background:rgba(26,22,34,.5)}
.cd-tab.active{color:var(--gold-bright);border-bottom-color:var(--gold);background:rgba(201,168,76,.06)}
.cd-tab-content{display:none;flex:1;overflow-y:auto;padding:20px;animation:tabIn .3s ease}
.cd-tab-content.active{display:block}

/* Encounter 3-column */
.encounter-cols{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 200px 1fr;gap:16px}
.encounter-col{background:var(--card);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:12px;padding:14px}
.encounter-col h4{font-family:'Cinzel',serif;font-size:13px;color:var(--gold-bright);margin-bottom:10px}
.encounter-char{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;padding:6px 8px;border-radius:8px;font-size:12px;margin-bottom:4px;background:rgba(0,0,0,.2)}
.encounter-char input[type=checkbox]{accent-color:var(--gold)}
.round-controls{display:flex;flex-direction:column;align-items:center;gap:10px;padding-top:10px}
.round-counter{font-family:'Cinzel',serif;font-size:36px;color:var(--gold-bright);text-shadow:0 0 15px var(--gold-glow)}
.round-label{font-size:11px;color:var(--muted);text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:1px}
.bestiary-search{width:100%;padding:8px 10px;background:rgba(0,0,0,.4);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:8px;color:var(--fg);font-family:'Crimson Text',serif;font-size:13px;margin-bottom:8px}
.bestiary-search:focus{outline:none;border-color:var(--gold)}
.bestiary-item{display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:center;padding:6px 8px;border-radius:6px;font-size:11px;background:rgba(0,0,0,.2);margin-bottom:4px}
.bestiary-item .bi-name{color:var(--fg);flex:1}
.bestiary-item .bi-qty{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:4px}
.bestiary-item .bi-qty input{width:40px;padding:3px 6px;background:rgba(0,0,0,.4);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:4px;color:var(--fg);font-size:11px;text-align:center}
.bestiary-item .bi-xp{color:var(--teal-bright);min-width:50px;text-align:right;font-size:10px}
.encounter-total{margin-top:12px;padding:10px;border-top:1px solid var(--border);text-align:center}
.encounter-total .total-xp{font-family:'Cinzel',serif;font-size:22px;color:var(--gold-bright)}

/* XP Table */
.xp-table-wrap{overflow-x:auto}
.xp-table{width:100%;border-collapse:collapse;font-size:12px;font-family:'Crimson Text',serif;color:var(--fg)}
.xp-table th{background:rgba(201,168,76,.15);color:var(--gold-bright);font-family:'Cinzel',serif;font-weight:700;font-size:10px;padding:8px 10px;text-align:center;letter-spacing:.5px;border:1px solid var(--border);white-space:nowrap}
.xp-table td{padding:6px 8px;text-align:center;border:1px solid rgba(58,47,72,.5);white-space:nowrap}
.xp-table tr:nth-child(even) td{background:rgba(26,22,34,.5)}
.xp-table tr:hover td{background:rgba(201,168,76,.06)}
.xp-input{width:70px;padding:4px 6px;background:rgba(0,0,0,.4);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:4px;color:var(--fg);font-size:12px;text-align:center}
.xp-input:focus{outline:none;border-color:var(--gold)}

/* Social */
.social-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:20px}
.social-friends{background:var(--card);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:14px;padding:20px}
.social-share{background:var(--card);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:14px;padding:20px}
.friend-item{display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;padding:8px 12px;background:rgba(0,0,0,.2);border-radius:8px;margin-bottom:6px;font-size:13px}
.friend-avatar{width:32px;height:32px;border-radius:50%;background:var(--bg3);border:1px solid var(--border);display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;margin-right:10px;font-size:14px;color:var(--gold)}
.friend-name{flex:1;color:var(--fg)}
.friend-status{font-size:10px;padding:2px 8px;border-radius:10px}

/* Wiki Links */
.wiki-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(auto-fill,minmax(200px,1fr));gap:16px}
.wiki-card{background:var(--card);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:14px;padding:20px;text-align:center;cursor:pointer;transition:all .3s;display:flex;flex-direction:column;align-items:center;gap:8px}
.wiki-card:hover{border-color:var(--gold);transform:translateY(-4px);box-shadow:0 8px 25px rgba(0,0,0,.5)}
.wiki-card i{font-size:28px;color:var(--gold)}
.wiki-card .wiki-title{font-family:'Cinzel',serif;font-size:13px;color:var(--fg);font-weight:700}
.wiki-card .wiki-url{font-size:9px;color:var(--muted);word-break:break-all}

/* Character Creation Wizard */
.wizard{max-width:800px;margin:0 auto}
.wizard-progress{display:flex;justify-content:space-between;margin-bottom:30px;position:relative;padding:0 10px}
.wizard-progress::before{content:'';position:absolute;top:16px;left:40px;right:40px;height:2px;background:var(--border);z-index:0}
.wizard-step{position:relative;z-index:1;display:flex;flex-direction:column;align-items:center;gap:4px;font-family:'Cinzel',serif;font-size:11px;color:var(--muted);cursor:pointer;transition:color .2s}
.wizard-step .step-num{width:32px;height:32px;border-radius:50%;background:var(--bg3);border:2px solid var(--border);display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;font-weight:700;font-size:13px;transition:all .3s}
.wizard-step.active .step-num{border-color:var(--gold);color:var(--gold);background:var(--gold-dim);box-shadow:0 0 12px var(--gold-glow)}
.wizard-step.completed .step-num{border-color:var(--teal-bright);color:var(--teal-bright);background:var(--teal-dim)}
.wizard-step.active{color:var(--gold)}
.wizard-step.completed{color:var(--teal-bright)}
.wizard-panel{display:none;animation:pageIn .4s ease}
.wizard-panel.active{display:block}
.wizard-actions{display:flex;justify-content:space-between;margin-top:24px;padding-top:16px;border-top:1px solid var(--border)}

/* Dice roll in wizard */
.dice-options{display:flex;gap:12px;margin-bottom:20px;flex-wrap:wrap}
.dice-option{flex:1;min-width:150px;background:var(--card);border:2px solid var(--border);border-radius:12px;padding:16px;text-align:center;cursor:pointer;transition:all .3s}
.dice-option:hover{border-color:var(--gold);transform:translateY(-2px)}
.dice-option.selected{border-color:var(--gold);background:var(--gold-dim);box-shadow:0 0 15px var(--gold-glow)}
.dice-option .do-title{font-family:'Cinzel',serif;font-size:14px;color:var(--gold-bright);margin-bottom:4px}
.dice-option .do-desc{font-size:11px;color:var(--muted)}
.ability-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(3,1fr);gap:12px;margin:16px 0}
.ability-box{background:var(--card);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:10px;padding:12px;text-align:center}
.ability-label{font-family:'Cinzel',serif;font-size:10px;color:var(--muted);text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:1px;margin-bottom:4px}
.ability-score{font-family:'Cinzel',serif;font-size:28px;color:var(--gold-bright)}
.ability-mod{font-size:11px;color:var(--teal-bright)}
.ability-racial{font-size:10px;color:var(--fg-dim);margin-top:4px}

/* Race/Class selector */
.selector-wrap{display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;gap:20px;margin:20px 0}
.selector-arrow{width:48px;height:48px;border-radius:50%;background:var(--card);border:1px solid var(--border);color:var(--gold);font-size:20px;cursor:pointer;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;transition:all .2s}
.selector-arrow:hover{background:var(--gold-dim);border-color:var(--gold);transform:scale(1.1)}
.selector-display{width:280px;text-align:center;background:var(--card);border:2px solid var(--border);border-radius:16px;padding:20px;min-height:220px}
.selector-display .sel-name{font-family:'Cinzel Decorative',serif;font-size:18px;color:var(--gold-bright);margin:10px 0 6px}
.selector-display .sel-icon{font-size:50px;color:var(--gold)}
.selector-display .sel-desc{font-size:12px;color:var(--fg-dim);line-height:1.5;margin-top:8px}
.selector-display .sel-adjustments{margin-top:10px;font-size:11px;color:var(--teal-bright)}

/* Proficiency columns */
.prof-cols{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:20px}
.prof-col{background:var(--card);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:12px;padding:16px}
.prof-col h4{font-family:'Cinzel',serif;font-size:13px;color:var(--gold-bright);margin-bottom:4px}
.prof-count{font-size:11px;color:var(--teal-bright);margin-bottom:10px}
.prof-checklist{max-height:300px;overflow-y:auto}
.prof-item{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;padding:4px 0;font-size:12px;color:var(--fg-dim)}
.prof-item input[type=checkbox]{accent-color:var(--gold)}
.prof-item.checked{color:var(--teal-bright)}

/* Player character sheet */
.pcsheet{background:var(--card);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:14px;padding:20px;margin-top:8px}
.pcsheet-header{display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:flex-start;margin-bottom:12px;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:8px}
.pcsheet-name{font-family:'Cinzel Decorative',serif;font-size:22px;color:var(--gold-bright)}
.pcsheet-sub{font-size:13px;color:var(--fg-dim)}
.pcsheet-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(6,1fr);gap:8px;margin:12px 0}
.pcsheet-stat{text-align:center;padding:8px;background:rgba(0,0,0,.3);border-radius:8px}
.pcsheet-stat-val{font-family:'Cinzel',serif;font-size:16px;font-weight:700;color:var(--gold-bright)}
.pcsheet-stat-lbl{font-size:8px;color:var(--muted);text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.5px}
.pcsheet-section{margin-top:14px;padding-top:12px;border-top:1px solid var(--border)}
.pcsheet-section h4{font-family:'Cinzel',serif;font-size:13px;color:var(--gold);margin-bottom:8px}
.pcsheet-row{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(auto-fill,minmax(120px,1fr));gap:8px;font-size:12px}
.pcsheet-field{background:rgba(0,0,0,.2);padding:6px 8px;border-radius:6px}
.pcsheet-field strong{color:var(--gold);font-size:10px;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.5px}
.pcsheet-field span{display:block;color:var(--fg);margin-top:2px}

@media(max-width:700px){.ability-grid{grid-template-columns:repeat(2,1fr)}.prof-cols{grid-template-columns:1fr}.social-grid{grid-template-columns:1fr}.wizard-progress{gap:2px}.wizard-step{font-size:9px}.selector-display{width:200px;min-height:180px}}
</style>
</head>
<body>

<div class="magic-bg"></div>
<div class="magic-particles" id="magicParticles"></div>

<!-- ===== SPLASH ===== -->
<div class="splash" id="splash">
  <div class="splash-bg"></div>
  <div class="splash-vignette"></div>
  <div class="splash-content">
    <div class="logo-container">
      <svg class="logo-svg" viewBox="0 0 200 220" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg">
        <defs>
          <linearGradient id="shieldGrad" x1="0%" y1="0%" x2="0%" y2="100%"><stop offset="0%" stop-color="#2a1a0a"/><stop offset="50%" stop-color="#1a0e05"/><stop offset="100%" stop-color="#0a0505"/></linearGradient>
          <linearGradient id="innerGrad" x1="0%" y1="0%" x2="0%" y2="100%"><stop offset="0%" stop-color="#1e1208"/><stop offset="100%" stop-color="#0e0805"/></linearGradient>
          <linearGradient id="swordGrad" x1="0" y1="0" x2="1" y2="0"><stop offset="0%" stop-color="#8a7030"/><stop offset="50%" stop-color="#e0c060"/><stop offset="100%" stop-color="#8a7030"/></linearGradient>
          <filter id="gemGlow"><feGaussianBlur stdDeviation="2" result="blur"/><feMerge><feMergeNode in="blur"/><feMergeNode in="SourceGraphic"/></feMerge></filter>
        </defs>
        <path d="M100 8 L180 40 L180 130 Q180 180 100 210 Q20 180 20 130 L20 40 Z" fill="url(#shieldGrad)" stroke="#c9a84c" stroke-width="2"/>
        <path d="M100 18 L170 46 L170 128 Q170 172 100 198 Q30 172 30 128 L30 46 Z" fill="none" stroke="#c9a84c" stroke-width="1.5" opacity=".6"/>
        <path d="M100 30 L160 54 L160 124 Q160 162 100 184 Q40 162 40 124 L40 54 Z" fill="url(#innerGrad)" stroke="#e0c060" stroke-width="1"/>
        <g transform="translate(100,110)">
          <rect x="-4" y="-72" width="8" height="90" rx="2" fill="url(#swordGrad)"/>
          <polygon points="0,-82 -5,-70 5,-70" fill="#e0c060"/>
          <rect x="-10" y="18" width="20" height="6" rx="2" fill="#5a3a10" stroke="#c9a84c" stroke-width=".5"/>
          <rect x="-3" y="24" width="6" height="20" rx="2" fill="#5a3a10" stroke="#8a6a20" stroke-width=".5"/>
          <circle cx="0" cy="47" r="5" fill="#5a3a10" stroke="#c9a84c" stroke-width="1"/>
          <circle cx="0" cy="47" r="2.5" fill="#c4362a"/>
        </g>
        <circle cx="100" cy="105" r="6" fill="#c4362a" stroke="#c9a84c" stroke-width=".5" filter="url(#gemGlow)"/>
        <path d="M50 140 Q30 120 25 100 Q35 115 50 125 Q45 110 42 95 Q52 112 58 125 Z" fill="#8b1a1a" opacity=".6" stroke="rgba(201,168,76,0.2)" stroke-width=".5"/>
        <path d="M150 140 Q170 120 175 100 Q165 115 150 125 Q155 110 158 95 Q148 112 142 125 Z" fill="#8b1a1a" opacity=".6" stroke="rgba(201,168,76,0.2)" stroke-width=".5"/>
      </svg>
    </div>
    <h1 class="splash-title">El Imaginarium</h1>
    <p class="splash-subtitle">Advanced Dungeons & Dragons 2nd Edition</p>
    <div class="splash-divider"></div>
    <div class="splash-buttons">
      <div class="role-btn player" onclick="enterApp('player')">
        <i class="fas fa-hat-wizard role-icon" style="color:var(--teal-bright)"></i>
        <span class="role-name">Soy Jugador</span>
        <span class="role-desc">Crear y gestionar personajes</span>
      </div>
      <div class="role-btn dm" onclick="enterApp('dm')">
        <svg class="role-icon" viewBox="0 0 100 80" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" style="width:2em;height:1.6em;fill:currentColor;vertical-align:-0.2em">
          <!-- Libro abierto -->
          <path d="M5 15 Q5 10 10 10 L45 12 L45 65 L10 63 Q5 63 5 58 Z" fill="#c9a84c" opacity="0.9"/>
          <path d="M95 15 Q95 10 90 10 L55 12 L55 65 L90 63 Q95 63 95 58 Z" fill="#c9a84c" opacity="0.9"/>
          <path d="M45 12 L55 12 L55 65 L45 65 Z" fill="#8a6030"/>
          <!-- Líneas del libro -->
          <line x1="12" y1="22" x2="43" y2="23" stroke="#5a3a10" stroke-width="2"/>
          <line x1="12" y1="29" x2="43" y2="30" stroke="#5a3a10" stroke-width="2"/>
          <line x1="12" y1="36" x2="43" y2="37" stroke="#5a3a10" stroke-width="2"/>
          <!-- Carabela (velero) en la pág derecha -->
          <path d="M70 50 L70 28" stroke="#5a3a10" stroke-width="1.5"/>
          <path d="M70 28 L60 38 L70 38 Z" fill="#8a6030"/>
          <path d="M70 28 L80 36 L70 36 Z" fill="#8a6030"/>
          <path d="M58 50 Q70 47 82 50 Q78 56 62 56 Z" fill="#8a6030"/>
          <path d="M60 56 Q70 54 80 56 L82 50 Q70 47 58 50 Z" fill="#c9a84c" opacity="0.7"/>
          <!-- Olas -->
          <path d="M57 57 Q62 55 67 57 Q72 59 77 57 Q80 56 83 57" stroke="#5a3a10" stroke-width="1" fill="none"/>
        </svg>
        <span class="role-name">Soy el DM</span>
        <span class="role-desc">Pantalla, encuentros y tesoros</span>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
  <div class="splash-footer">Basado en AD&D 2e — v1.9.0</div>
</div>

<!-- ===== APP ===== -->
<div class="app" id="app">
  <nav class="sidebar" id="sidebar">
    <div class="sidebar-logo" onclick="goSplash()" title="Volver al inicio" style="background:rgba(139,26,26,0.3);border:1px solid rgba(201,168,76,0.3)">
    <svg viewBox="0 0 200 220" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" style="width:28px;height:31px">
      <path d="M100 8 L180 40 L180 130 Q180 180 100 210 Q20 180 20 130 L20 40 Z" fill="#1a0e05" stroke="#c9a84c" stroke-width="3"/>
      <path d="M100 30 L160 54 L160 124 Q160 162 100 184 Q40 162 40 124 L40 54 Z" fill="#0e0805" stroke="#e0c060" stroke-width="1.5"/>
      <g transform="translate(100,110)">
        <rect x="-3" y="-68" width="6" height="82" rx="1.5" fill="#e0c060"/>
        <polygon points="0,-78 -4,-66 4,-66" fill="#e0c060"/>
        <rect x="-9" y="14" width="18" height="5" rx="1.5" fill="#c9a84c"/>
        <circle cx="0" cy="44" r="5" fill="#c4362a" stroke="#c9a84c" stroke-width="1"/>
      </g>
      <circle cx="100" cy="100" r="5" fill="#c4362a" stroke="#c9a84c" stroke-width="0.5"/>
    </svg>
  </div>
    <div class="nav-divider"></div>
    <div id="sidebarNav"></div>
  </nav>
  <main class="main-content">
    <!-- DM HOME = Mis Campañas landing -->
    <div class="page dm-page home-center" id="page-dm-home">
      <div class="welcome-header"><h1 class="dm-title">Bienvenido, Maestro</h1></div>
      <p class="welcome-sub">Tus herramientas para gobernar el mundo.</p>
      <div class="welcome-divider"></div>
      <div class="module-grid">
        <div class="module-card mc-red" onclick="navTo('dm-campaigns')"><i class="fas fa-dragon mc-icon"></i><span class="mc-title">Mis Campañas</span><span class="mc-desc">Gestiona tus aventuras y sesiones</span></div>
        <div class="module-card mc-teal" onclick="navTo('dm-social')"><i class="fas fa-handshake mc-icon"></i><span class="mc-title">Social</span><span class="mc-desc">Amigos, invitaciones y compartir</span></div>
        <div class="module-card mc-gold" onclick="navTo('dm-tablas')"><i class="fas fa-scroll mc-icon"></i><span class="mc-title">Tablas</span><span class="mc-desc">Tablas de referencia y actualizaciones</span></div>
        <div class="module-card mc-purple" onclick="navTo('dm-miselanea')"><i class="fas fa-book-open mc-icon"></i><span class="mc-title">Miselanea</span><span class="mc-desc">Razas, clases, conjuros y más</span></div>
      </div>
    </div>

    <!-- DM CAMPAIGNS (NUEVO v1.1.0) -->
    <div class="page dm-page page-content" id="page-dm-campaigns">
      <div class="page-header">
        <h1 style="color:var(--accent-bright)"><i class="fas fa-map" style="margin-right:10px"></i>Mis Campañas</h1>
        <div class="header-actions">
          <button class="btn btn-primary" onclick="openModal()"><i class="fas fa-plus"></i> Nuevo Imaginarium</button>
          <button class="btn btn-secondary" onclick="loadExample()"><i class="fas fa-dice-d20"></i> Campaña de Ejemplo</button>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="campaign-grid" id="campaignGrid">
        <!-- Las tarjetas se inyectan aquí vía JS -->
      </div>
    </div>

    <!-- DM SOCIAL -->
    <div class="page dm-page page-content" id="page-dm-social">
      <div class="page-header">
        <h1 style="color:var(--teal-bright)"><i class="fas fa-users" style="margin-right:10px"></i>Social</h1>
      </div>
      <div class="social-grid">
        <div class="social-friends">
          <h3 style="color:var(--gold-bright);font-family:'Cinzel',serif;font-size:16px;margin-bottom:14px"><i class="fas fa-user-group" style="margin-right:8px"></i>Amigos</h3>
          <div style="display:flex;gap:8px;margin-bottom:14px;flex-wrap:wrap">
            <input class="dm-input" id="friendName" placeholder="Nombre del amigo" style="flex:1;min-width:140px">
            <button class="dm-btn dm-btn-teal" onclick="addFriend()"><i class="fas fa-plus"></i> Invitar Amigo</button>
          </div>
          <div id="friendsList"></div>
        </div>
        <div class="social-share">
          <h3 style="color:var(--gold-bright);font-family:'Cinzel',serif;font-size:16px;margin-bottom:14px"><i class="fas fa-share-nodes" style="margin-right:8px"></i>Compartido</h3>
          <h4 style="color:var(--teal-bright);font-family:'Cinzel',serif;font-size:13px;margin-bottom:8px"><i class="fas fa-hat-wizard" style="margin-right:6px"></i>Personajes de Amigos</h4>
          <div id="sharedCharsList" style="margin-bottom:16px"></div>
          <h4 style="color:var(--gold);font-family:'Cinzel',serif;font-size:13px;margin-bottom:8px"><i class="fas fa-map" style="margin-right:6px"></i>Campañas Compartidas</h4>
          <div id="sharedCampaignsList"></div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>

    <!-- DM TABLAS -->
    <div class="page dm-page page-content" id="page-dm-tablas" style="padding:0;padding-top:0">
      <div style="padding:16px 20px 0;display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:center;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:8px">
        <h1 style="color:var(--gold-bright);margin:0;font-size:20px"><i class="fas fa-book-skull" style="margin-right:10px"></i>Tablas de Referencia</h1>
        <button class="dm-btn dm-btn-gold" onclick="showToast('Tablas sincronizadas con el wiki','success')"><i class="fas fa-sync-alt"></i> Actualizar Tablas</button>
      </div>
      <div style="padding:10px 20px;font-size:11px;color:var(--muted)">
        Fuentes: <a href="https://adnd2e.fandom.com/wiki/Calculating_THAC0_(PHB)" target="_blank" style="color:var(--teal-bright)">THAC0</a> ·
        <a href="https://adnd2e.fandom.com/wiki/The_Saving_Throw_(PHB)" target="_blank" style="color:var(--teal-bright)">Salvación</a> ·
        <a href="https://adnd2e.fandom.com/wiki/Thief" target="_blank" style="color:var(--teal-bright)">Ladrón</a> ·
        <a href="https://adnd2e.fandom.com/wiki/Turning_Undead_(PHB)" target="_blank" style="color:var(--teal-bright)">Ahuyentar</a> ·
        <a href="https://adnd2e.fandom.com/wiki/Master_Weapon_List_(POCT)#Weapons_Tables" target="_blank" style="color:var(--teal-bright)">Armas</a> ·
        <a href="https://adnd2e.fandom.com/wiki/Armor_(POCT)#Armor_Table" target="_blank" style="color:var(--teal-bright)">Armaduras</a> ·
        <a href="https://adnd2e.fandom.com/wiki/Magical_Item_Random_Determination_Tables_(EM)" target="_blank" style="color:var(--teal-bright)">Objetos Mágicos</a>
      </div>
      <div class="dm-screen">
        <div class="dm-tabs">
          <div class="dm-tab active" data-tab="tab-ref" onclick="switchDmTab(this)"><i class="fas fa-book-open"></i> Tablas</div>
          <div class="dm-tab" data-tab="tab-pcs" onclick="switchDmTab(this)"><i class="fas fa-id-card"></i> PJs</div>
          <div class="dm-tab" data-tab="tab-combat" onclick="switchDmTab(this)"><i class="fas fa-hand-fist"></i> Combate</div>
          <div class="dm-tab" data-tab="tab-session" onclick="switchDmTab(this)"><i class="fas fa-feather-alt"></i> Sesión</div>
          <div class="dm-tab" data-tab="tab-gen" onclick="switchDmTab(this)"><i class="fas fa-dice-d20"></i> Generadores</div>
        </div>
        <div class="dm-tab-content active" id="tab-ref"><div id="refAccordion"></div></div>
        <div class="dm-tab-content" id="tab-pcs">
          <div style="display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:center;margin-bottom:12px;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:8px">
            <h3 style="color:var(--gold-bright);font-family:'Cinzel',serif;font-size:16px;margin:0"><i class="fas fa-users" style="margin-right:8px"></i>Panel de Personajes</h3>
            <button class="dm-btn dm-btn-gold" onclick="togglePcForm()"><i class="fas fa-plus"></i> Añadir PJ</button>
          </div>
          <div id="pcFormWrap" style="display:none;background:var(--card);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:12px;padding:16px;margin-bottom:16px">
            <h4 style="color:var(--gold);font-family:'Cinzel',serif;font-size:13px;margin-bottom:12px">Nuevo Personaje</h4>
            <div class="dm-form-row">
              <div class="dm-form-group"><label class="dm-form-label">Nombre</label><input class="dm-input" id="pcName" placeholder="Ej: Kaelthas"></div>
              <div class="dm-form-group"><label class="dm-form-label">Raza</label><select class="dm-select" id="pcRace"><option>Humano</option><option>Elfo</option><option>Enano</option><option>Mediano</option><option>Gnomo</option><option>Semielfo</option><option>Semiorco</option></select></div>
              <div class="dm-form-group"><label class="dm-form-label">Clase</label><select class="dm-select" id="pcClass"><option>Guerrero</option><option>Mago</option><option>Clérigo</option><option>Ladrón</option><option>Paladín</option><option>Ranger</option><option>Bardo</option><option>Druida</option><option>Ilusionista</option><option>Monje</option></select></div>
              <div class="dm-form-group"><label class="dm-form-label">Nivel</label><input class="dm-input" id="pcLevel" type="number" min="1" max="40" value="1"></div>
            </div>
            <div class="dm-form-row">
              <div class="dm-form-group"><label class="dm-form-label">PG Máx</label><input class="dm-input" id="pcHpMax" type="number" min="1" value="10"></div>
              <div class="dm-form-group"><label class="dm-form-label">CA</label><input class="dm-input" id="pcAC" type="number" value="10"></div>
              <div class="dm-form-group"><label class="dm-form-label">GACO</label><input class="dm-input" id="pcThac0" type="number" value="20"></div>
              <div class="dm-form-group"><label class="dm-form-label">Movimiento</label><input class="dm-input" id="pcMove" type="number" value="12"></div>
            </div>
            <div class="dm-form-row">
              <div class="dm-form-group"><label class="dm-form-label">XP Actual</label><input class="dm-input" id="pcXpCur" type="number" min="0" value="0"></div>
              <div class="dm-form-group"><label class="dm-form-label">XP Siguiente Nivel</label><input class="dm-input" id="pcXpNext" type="number" min="0" value="2000"></div>
              <div class="dm-form-group"><label class="dm-form-label">Salvación Parálisis</label><input class="dm-input" id="pcSavePar" type="number" value="14"></div>
              <div class="dm-form-group"><label class="dm-form-label">Salvación Veneno</label><input class="dm-input" id="pcSavePoi" type="number" value="13"></div>
            </div>
            <div class="dm-form-row">
              <div class="dm-form-group"><label class="dm-form-label">Salvación Varita</label><input class="dm-input" id="pcSaveRod" type="number" value="15"></div>
              <div class="dm-form-group"><label class="dm-form-label">Salvación Aliento</label><input class="dm-input" id="pcSaveBre" type="number" value="16"></div>
              <div class="dm-form-group"><label class="dm-form-label">Salvación Hechizo</label><input class="dm-input" id="pcSaveSpe" type="number" value="17"></div>
              <div class="dm-form-group"><label class="dm-form-label">Estado</label><select class="dm-select" id="pcStatus"><option value="Activo">Activo</option><option value="Inconsciente">Inconsciente</option><option value="Muerto">Muerto</option></select></div>
            </div>
            <div style="display:flex;gap:8px;justify-content:flex-end;margin-top:8px">
              <button class="dm-btn" onclick="togglePcForm()">Cancelar</button>
              <button class="dm-btn dm-btn-gold" onclick="savePc()"><i class="fas fa-save"></i> Guardar</button>
            </div>
          </div>
          <div class="pc-grid" id="pcGrid"></div>
        </div>
        <div class="dm-tab-content" id="tab-combat">
          <div style="display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 320px;gap:20px">
            <div>
              <div class="combat-section">
                <div class="combat-section-title"><i class="fas fa-hourglass-half"></i> Iniciativa y Combatientes</div>
                <div style="display:flex;gap:8px;margin-bottom:12px;flex-wrap:wrap;align-items:flex-end">
                  <div class="dm-form-group" style="margin:0;min-width:120px"><label class="dm-form-label">Nombre</label><input class="dm-input" id="cbName" placeholder="Combatiente"></div>
                  <div class="dm-form-group" style="margin:0;width:60px"><label class="dm-form-label">Inic.</label><input class="dm-input" id="cbInit" type="number" value="10"></div>
                  <div class="dm-form-group" style="margin:0;width:60px"><label class="dm-form-label">PG Máx</label><input class="dm-input" id="cbHpMax" type="number" value="20"></div>
                  <div class="dm-form-group" style="margin:0;width:55px"><label class="dm-form-label">CA</label><input class="dm-input" id="cbAC" type="number" value="10"></div>
                  <div class="dm-form-group" style="margin:0;width:55px"><label class="dm-form-label">GAC0</label><input class="dm-input" id="cbThac0" type="number" value="20"></div>
                  <div class="dm-form-group" style="margin:0;width:90px"><label class="dm-form-label">Tipo</label><select class="dm-select" id="cbType"><option>PC</option><option>Monstruo</option><option>PNC</option></select></div>
                  <button class="dm-btn dm-btn-gold" onclick="addCombatant()"><i class="fas fa-plus"></i> Añadir</button>
                  <button class="dm-btn dm-btn-teal" onclick="addPcsToCombat()" title="Añadir todos los PJs activos"><i class="fas fa-users"></i> PJs</button>
                  <button class="dm-btn dm-btn-teal" onclick="nextRound()"><i class="fas fa-forward"></i> Sig. Ronda</button>
                  <button class="dm-btn dm-btn-gold" onclick="rollInitiatives()"><i class="fas fa-dice"></i> Tirar Inic.</button>
                </div>
                <div class="combatant-list" id="combatantList"></div>
              </div>
              <div class="combat-section">
                <div class="combat-section-title"><i class="fas fa-flask"></i> Efectos Activos</div>
                <div style="display:flex;gap:8px;margin-bottom:10px;flex-wrap:wrap;align-items:flex-end">
                  <div class="dm-form-group" style="margin:0;min-width:140px"><label class="dm-form-label">Efecto</label><input class="dm-input" id="efName" placeholder="Bendición, Maldición..."></div>
                  <div class="dm-form-group" style="margin:0;width:80px"><label class="dm-form-label">Rondas</label><input class="dm-input" id="efDur" type="number" min="1" value="3"></div>
                  <button class="dm-btn dm-btn-gold" onclick="addEffect()"><i class="fas fa-plus"></i> Añadir</button>
                </div>
                <div id="effectsList" style="display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:4px"></div>
              </div>
              <div class="combat-section">
                <div class="combat-section-title"><i class="fas fa-flag"></i> Chequeo de Moral</div>
                <div style="display:flex;gap:8px;align-items:flex-end;flex-wrap:wrap">
                  <div class="dm-form-group" style="margin:0;width:80px"><label class="dm-form-label">Moral</label><input class="dm-input" id="moralScore" type="number" min="2" max="20" value="12"></div>
                  <button class="dm-btn dm-btn-gold" onclick="checkMorale()"><i class="fas fa-dice"></i> Chequear Moral (2d10)</button>
                  <span id="moralResult" style="font-family:'Cinzel',serif;color:var(--fg-dim);font-size:13px"></span>
                </div>
              </div>
            </div>
            <div>
              <div class="combat-section">
                <div class="combat-section-title"><i class="fas fa-dice-d20"></i> Tirada de Dados</div>
                <div class="dice-grid">
                  <div class="dice-btn" onclick="rollDice(4)">d4</div><div class="dice-btn" onclick="rollDice(6)">d6</div>
                  <div class="dice-btn" onclick="rollDice(8)">d8</div><div class="dice-btn" onclick="rollDice(10)">d10</div>
                  <div class="dice-btn" onclick="rollDice(12)">d12</div><div class="dice-btn" onclick="rollDice(20)">d20</div>
                  <div class="dice-btn" onclick="rollDice(100)">d100</div><div class="dice-btn" onclick="rollDice(6,2)" style="font-size:11px">2d6</div>
                </div>
                <div style="display:flex;gap:6px;margin-bottom:10px;flex-wrap:wrap;align-items:flex-end">
                  <div class="dm-form-group" style="margin:0;width:60px"><label class="dm-form-label">N</label><input class="dm-input" id="customN" type="number" min="1" value="2"></div>
                  <div class="dm-form-group" style="margin:0;width:60px"><label class="dm-form-label">Caras</label><input class="dm-input" id="customD" type="number" min="2" value="6"></div>
                  <div class="dm-form-group" style="margin:0;width:60px"><label class="dm-form-label">+Mod</label><input class="dm-input" id="customMod" type="number" value="0"></div>
                  <button class="dm-btn dm-btn-gold" onclick="rollCustom()"><i class="fas fa-dice"></i> Tirar</button>
                </div>
                <div class="dice-result" id="diceResult">—</div>
                <div style="font-size:11px;color:var(--fg-dim);margin-bottom:4px;font-family:'Cinzel',serif">Historial de Tiradas</div>
                <div class="roll-history" id="rollHistory"></div>
              </div>
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>
        <div class="dm-tab-content" id="tab-session">
          <div style="display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 340px;gap:20px">
            <div>
              <h3 style="color:var(--gold-bright);font-family:'Cinzel',serif;font-size:16px;margin-bottom:12px"><i class="fas fa-scroll" style="margin-right:8px"></i>Sesión Activa</h3>
              <div class="dm-form-row" style="margin-bottom:16px">
                <div class="dm-form-group"><label class="dm-form-label">Fecha</label><input class="dm-input" id="sesDate" readonly></div>
                <div class="dm-form-group"><label class="dm-form-label">Sesión #</label><input class="dm-input" id="sesNum" type="number" min="1" value="1"></div>
                <div class="dm-form-group"><label class="dm-form-label">Título</label><input class="dm-input" id="sesTitle" placeholder="Resumen de la sesión..."></div>
              </div>
              <div class="dm-form-group"><label class="dm-form-label">Notas de Sesión</label><textarea class="session-note" id="sesNotes" placeholder="Escribe aquí tus notas de la sesión... Se guarda automáticamente."></textarea></div>
              <h4 style="color:var(--gold);font-family:'Cinzel',serif;font-size:13px;margin:16px 0 8px"><i class="fas fa-check-square" style="margin-right:6px"></i>Ganchos y Recordatorios</h4>
              <div style="display:flex;gap:6px;margin-bottom:8px"><input class="dm-input" id="hookInput" placeholder="Añadir gancho o recordatorio..." style="flex:1"><button class="dm-btn dm-btn-gold" onclick="addHook()"><i class="fas fa-plus"></i></button></div>
              <div id="hooksList"></div>
              <h4 style="color:var(--gold);font-family:'Cinzel',serif;font-size:13px;margin:16px 0 8px"><i class="fas fa-coins" style="margin-right:6px"></i>XP Ganada Esta Sesión</h4>
              <div id="sessionXpList"></div>
            </div>
            <div>
              <h4 style="color:var(--gold);font-family:'Cinzel',serif;font-size:14px;margin-bottom:10px"><i class="fas fa-user-secret" style="margin-right:8px"></i>PNJs Activos</h4>
              <div style="display:flex;gap:6px;margin-bottom:10px;flex-wrap:wrap">
                <input class="dm-input" id="npcName" placeholder="Nombre" style="flex:1;min-width:80px">
                <select class="dm-select" id="npcAtt" style="width:90px"><option>Amistoso</option><option>Neutral</option><option>Hostil</option><option>Desconocido</option></select>
                <input class="dm-input" id="npcLoc" placeholder="Lugar" style="width:80px">
                <input class="dm-input" id="npcHp" type="number" placeholder="PG" style="width:55px">
                <button class="dm-btn dm-btn-gold dm-btn-sm" onclick="addNpc()"><i class="fas fa-plus"></i></button>
              </div>
              <div class="npc-list" id="npcList"></div>
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>
        <div class="dm-tab-content" id="tab-gen">
          <h3 style="color:var(--gold-bright);font-family:'Cinzel',serif;font-size:16px;margin-bottom:12px"><i class="fas fa-dice-d20" style="margin-right:8px"></i>Generadores Aleatorios</h3>
          <div class="gen-row">
            <div>
              <div style="background:var(--card);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:12px;padding:14px;margin-bottom:12px">
                <h4 style="color:var(--teal-bright);font-family:'Cinzel',serif;font-size:13px;margin-bottom:8px"><i class="fas fa-skull-crossbones" style="margin-right:6px"></i>Encuentro Aleatorio</h4>
                <div class="dm-form-row" style="margin-bottom:8px">
                  <div class="dm-form-group"><label class="dm-form-label">Terreno</label><select class="dm-select" id="genTerrain"><option>Llanura</option><option>Bosque</option><option>Colinas</option><option>Montaña</option><option>Pantano</option><option>Desierto</option><option>Costa</option><option>Subterráneo</option></select></div>
                  <div class="dm-form-group"><label class="dm-form-label">Nivel</label><select class="dm-select" id="genLevel"><option>1-3</option><option>4-6</option><option>7-10</option><option>11+</option></select></div>
                </div>
                <button class="dm-btn dm-btn-teal" onclick="genEncounter()"><i class="fas fa-dice"></i> Generar Encuentro</button>
                <div id="encounterResult"></div>
              </div>
              <div style="background:var(--card);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:12px;padding:14px;margin-bottom:12px">
                <h4 style="color:var(--gold-bright);font-family:'Cinzel',serif;font-size:13px;margin-bottom:8px"><i class="fas fa-gem" style="margin-right:6px"></i>Tesoro Aleatorio</h4>
                <div class="dm-form-group"><label class="dm-form-label">Tipo de Tesoro</label><select class="dm-select" id="genTreasureType"><option>A</option><option>B</option><option>C</option><option>D</option><option>E</option><option>F</option><option>G</option><option>H</option><option>I</option><option>J</option><option>K</option><option>L</option><option>M</option><option>N</option><option>O</option><option>P</option><option>Q</option><option>R</option><option>S</option><option>T</option><option>U</option><option>V</option><option>W</option><option>X</option><option>Y</option><option>Z</option></select></div>
                <button class="dm-btn dm-btn-gold" onclick="genTreasure()"><i class="fas fa-gem"></i> Generar Tesoro</button>
                <div id="treasureResult"></div>
              </div>
            </div>
            <div>
              <div style="background:var(--card);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:12px;padding:14px;margin-bottom:12px">
                <h4 style="color:var(--purple);font-family:'Cinzel',serif;font-size:13px;margin-bottom:8px"><i class="fas fa-cloud-sun" style="margin-right:6px"></i>Clima Aleatorio</h4>
                <div class="dm-form-group"><label class="dm-form-label">Estación</label><select class="dm-select" id="genSeason"><option>Primavera</option><option>Verano</option><option>Otoño</option><option>Invierno</option></select></div>
                <button class="dm-btn" style="border-color:var(--purple);color:#b88adc" onclick="genWeather()"><i class="fas fa-cloud"></i> Generar Clima</button>
                <div id="weatherResult"></div>
              </div>
              <div style="background:var(--card);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:12px;padding:14px;margin-bottom:12px">
                <h4 style="color:var(--teal-bright);font-family:'Cinzel',serif;font-size:13px;margin-bottom:8px"><i class="fas fa-user" style="margin-right:6px"></i>Nombre de PNC</h4>
                <div class="dm-form-row" style="margin-bottom:8px">
                  <div class="dm-form-group"><label class="dm-form-label">Raza</label><select class="dm-select" id="genNpcRace"><option>Humano</option><option>Elfo</option><option>Enano</option><option>Mediano</option><option>Gnomo</option><option>Orco</option></select></div>
                  <div class="dm-form-group"><label class="dm-form-label">Género</label><select class="dm-select" id="genNpcGender"><option>Masculino</option><option>Femenino</option></select></div>
                </div>
                <button class="dm-btn dm-btn-teal" onclick="genNpcName()"><i class="fas fa-dice"></i> Generar Nombre</button>
                <div id="npcNameResult"></div>
              </div>
              <div style="background:var(--card);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:12px;padding:14px">
                <h4 style="color:var(--accent-bright);font-family:'Cinzel',serif;font-size:13px;margin-bottom:8px"><i class="fas fa-dungeon" style="margin-right:6px"></i>Mazmorra Express</h4>
                <div class="dm-form-row" style="margin-bottom:8px">
                  <div class="dm-form-group"><label class="dm-form-label">Habitaciones</label><input class="dm-input" id="genDunRooms" type="number" min="3" max="30" value="8"></div>
                  <div class="dm-form-group"><label class="dm-form-label">Nivel</label><select class="dm-select" id="genDunLevel"><option>1-3</option><option>4-6</option><option>7-10</option></select></div>
                </div>
                <button class="dm-btn dm-btn-red" onclick="genDungeon()"><i class="fas fa-dungeon"></i> Generar Mazmorra</button>
                <div id="dungeonResult"></div>
              </div>
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>

    <!-- DM MISELANEA -->
    <div class="page dm-page page-content" id="page-dm-miselanea">
      <div class="page-header">
        <h1 style="color:var(--purple)"><i class="fas fa-wand-sparkles" style="margin-right:10px"></i>Miselanea</h1>
      </div>
      <p style="color:var(--fg-dim);margin-bottom:20px">Referencia rápida del mundo de AD&D 2a Edición.</p>
      <div class="wiki-grid" id="dmWikiGrid"></div>
    </div>

    <!-- DM CAMPAIGN DETAIL (shown when clicking a campaign) -->
    <div class="page dm-page" id="page-dm-campaign-detail" style="padding:0">
      <div class="campaign-detail" id="campaignDetailWrap">

        <!-- CABECERA -->
        <div class="cd-header">
          <button class="cd-back" onclick="backToCampaigns()"><i class="fas fa-arrow-left"></i> Volver</button>
          <div style="flex:1;min-width:0">
            <h2 class="cd-title" id="cdTitle"></h2>
            <div class="cd-badges" id="cdBadges"></div>
          </div>
        </div>

        <!-- PREMISA / SINOPSIS (siempre visible bajo la cabecera) -->
        <div id="cdPremisaContent" style="padding:14px 20px;border-bottom:1px solid var(--border);background:rgba(0,0,0,.15)"></div>

        <!-- PESTAÑAS PRINCIPALES -->
        <div class="cd-tabs">
          <div class="cd-tab active" data-cdtab="cd-pjs"     onclick="switchCdTab(this)"><i class="fas fa-users"></i> PJs</div>
          <div class="cd-tab"        data-cdtab="cd-sesion"  onclick="switchCdTab(this)"><i class="fas fa-swords"></i> Sesión</div>
          <div class="cd-tab"        data-cdtab="cd-xp"      onclick="switchCdTab(this)"><i class="fas fa-star"></i> Tabla XP</div>
          <div class="cd-tab"        data-cdtab="cd-social"  onclick="switchCdTab(this)"><i class="fas fa-users-between-lines"></i> Social</div>
          <div class="cd-tab"        data-cdtab="cd-pnjs"    onclick="switchCdTab(this)"><i class="fas fa-user-secret"></i> Mis PNJs</div>
        </div>

        <!-- ── TAB 1: PJs ─────────────────────────────────────────── -->
        <div class="cd-tab-content active" id="cd-pjs">
          <div style="display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:center;margin-bottom:14px;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:8px">
            <h3 style="color:var(--gold-bright);font-family:'Cinzel',serif;font-size:15px;margin:0"><i class="fas fa-users" style="margin-right:8px"></i>Personajes en la Campaña</h3>
            <button class="dm-btn dm-btn-gold" onclick="addPcToCampaign()"><i class="fas fa-plus"></i> Añadir PJ</button>
          </div>
          <!-- Lista PJs (con hoja de personaje al expandir) -->
          <div id="cdPcList"></div>
          <!-- Personajes de amigos -->
          <h4 style="color:var(--teal-bright);font-family:'Cinzel',serif;font-size:13px;margin:20px 0 10px"><i class="fas fa-handshake" style="margin-right:8px"></i>Personajes de los Amigos</h4>
          <div id="cdFriendPcList" style="color:var(--muted);font-size:12px">
            <div style="background:rgba(201,168,76,0.1);border:1px solid rgba(201,168,76,.2);border-radius:8px;padding:10px 14px;font-size:11px;color:var(--fg-dim)">
              ⚔️ Los PJs de tus amigos aparecerán aquí cuando se unan a la campaña — <em>próximamente</em>
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>

        <!-- ── TAB 2: SESIÓN (2 sub-pestañas) ──────────────────────── -->
        <div class="cd-tab-content" id="cd-sesion">
          <div class="dm-tabs" style="margin-bottom:16px">
            <div class="dm-tab active" data-tab="cd-combate"  onclick="switchDmTab(this)"><i class="fas fa-hand-fist"></i> Combate</div>
            <div class="dm-tab"        data-tab="cd-encuentro" onclick="switchDmTab(this)"><i class="fas fa-dragon"></i> Encuentro</div>
          </div>

          <!-- SUB-TAB COMBATE: marcar PJs activos -->
          <div class="dm-tab-content active" id="cd-combate">
            <p style="color:var(--fg-dim);font-size:12px;margin-bottom:14px">Marca los personajes que participan en este encuentro.</p>
            <div id="cdActivePcs" style="display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:8px"></div>
          </div>

          <!-- SUB-TAB ENCUENTRO: 3 columnas -->
          <div class="dm-tab-content" id="cd-encuentro">
            <div class="encounter-cols">

              <!-- COL 1: Personajes activos en el encuentro -->
              <div class="encounter-col">
                <h4 style="color:var(--gold);font-family:'Cinzel',serif;font-size:13px;margin-bottom:10px"><i class="fas fa-shield-halved" style="margin-right:6px"></i>Personajes</h4>
                <div id="encounterChars" style="display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:6px"></div>
              </div>

              <!-- COL 2: Control de rondas -->
              <div class="encounter-col" style="text-align:center">
                <h4 style="color:var(--gold);font-family:'Cinzel',serif;font-size:13px;margin-bottom:10px"><i class="fas fa-hourglass-half" style="margin-right:6px"></i>Rondas</h4>
                <button class="dm-btn dm-btn-gold" style="width:100%;margin-bottom:12px" onclick="startEncounterRound()"><i class="fas fa-play"></i> Inicio de Round</button>
                <div class="round-label" style="font-size:10px;color:var(--muted);letter-spacing:.1em;text-transform:uppercase;margin-bottom:4px">RONDA</div>
                <div class="round-counter" id="encounterRound" style="font-size:48px;font-weight:700;color:var(--gold-bright);font-family:'Cinzel',serif;line-height:1">0</div>
                <button class="dm-btn dm-btn-teal" style="width:100%;margin-top:12px" onclick="nextEncounterRound()"><i class="fas fa-forward"></i> Siguiente Round</button>
              </div>

              <!-- COL 3: Bestiario + XP + Finalizar -->
              <div class="encounter-col">
                <h4 style="color:var(--gold);font-family:'Cinzel',serif;font-size:13px;margin-bottom:10px"><i class="fas fa-dragon" style="margin-right:6px"></i>Bestiario</h4>
                <div style="display:flex;gap:6px;margin-bottom:6px">
                  <input class="bestiary-search" id="bestiarySearch" placeholder="Buscar monstruo..." oninput="searchBestiary(this.value)" style="flex:1">
                </div>
                <a href="https://adnd2e.fandom.com/wiki/List_of_Monsters" target="_blank" style="font-size:10px;color:var(--teal-bright);display:block;margin-bottom:8px"><i class="fas fa-external-link-alt" style="margin-right:4px"></i>Ver lista completa en wiki</a>
                <div id="bestiaryResults" style="margin-bottom:8px"></div>
                <div style="border-top:1px solid var(--border);padding-top:10px;margin-top:4px">
                  <div style="font-size:11px;color:var(--muted);margin-bottom:6px;font-family:'Cinzel',serif">Monstruos en el encuentro:</div>
                  <div id="bestiaryList"></div>
                </div>
                <div class="encounter-total" style="margin-top:12px;border-top:1px solid var(--border);padding-top:12px">
                  <div style="display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:center;margin-bottom:10px">
                    <span style="font-size:12px;color:var(--muted)">Total XP del Encuentro</span>
                    <span class="total-xp" id="encounterTotalXp" style="font-size:20px;font-weight:700;color:var(--gold-bright);font-family:'Cinzel',serif">0</span>
                  </div>
