function buildRefTables(){
  const c=document.getElementById('refAccordion');
  c.innerHTML=REF_DATA.map((s,i)=>`<div class="acc-section${i===0?' open':''}" id="${s.id}"><div class="acc-header" onclick="toggleAcc(this)">${s.title}<i class="fas fa-chevron-down"></i></div><div class="acc-body">${s.html()}</div></div>`).join('');
}

function toggleAcc(el){
  const sec=el.parentElement;
  sec.classList.toggle('open');
}

// ===== PANEL DE PJs (TAB 2) =====
const PJS_KEY='img_player_chars';
let editingPcId=null;

function getPcs(){try{const d=localStorage.getItem(PJS_KEY);return d?JSON.parse(d):[]}catch(e){return[]}}
function savePcs(pcs){try{localStorage.setItem(PJS_KEY,JSON.stringify(pcs))}catch(e){showToast('Error al guardar datos','info')}}

function togglePcForm(){
  const w=document.getElementById('pcFormWrap');
  w.style.display=w.style.display==='none'?'block':'none';
  if(w.style.display==='none'){editingPcId=null;clearPcForm()}
}

function clearPcForm(){
  ['pcName','pcHpMax','pcAC','pcThac0','pcMove','pcXpCur','pcXpNext','pcSavePar','pcSavePoi','pcSaveRod','pcSaveBre','pcSaveSpe'].forEach(id=>{const el=document.getElementById(id);if(el)el.value=el.type==='number'?(id==='pcHpMax'?'10':id==='pcAC'?'10':id==='pcThac0'?'20':id==='pcMove'?'12':'0'):'0'});
  document.getElementById('pcLevel').value=1;
  document.getElementById('pcRace').selectedIndex=0;
  document.getElementById('pcClass').selectedIndex=0;
  document.getElementById('pcStatus').selectedIndex=0;
}

function savePc(){
  const cn=document.getElementById('pcClass').value||'Guerrero';
  const lvl=parseInt(document.getElementById('pcLevel').value)||1;
  const userThac0=parseInt(document.getElementById('pcThac0').value)||20;
  const userSavePar=parseInt(document.getElementById('pcSavePar').value)||14;
  // Auto-calculate if user left defaults
  const autoThac0=userThac0===20?getThac0(cn,lvl):userThac0;
  const autoSaves=userSavePar===14?getSavingThrows(cn,lvl):null;
  const autoXpNext=parseInt(document.getElementById('pcXpNext').value)===2000
    ?(getXpForLevel(cn,lvl+1)||9999999)
    :parseInt(document.getElementById('pcXpNext').value)||2000;
  const pc={
    id:editingPcId||'pc_'+Date.now(),
    name:document.getElementById('pcName').value||'Sin Nombre',
    race:document.getElementById('pcRace').value,
    className:cn,
    level:lvl,
    hpMax:parseInt(document.getElementById('pcHpMax').value)||10,
    hp:editingPcId?undefined:parseInt(document.getElementById('pcHpMax').value)||10,
    ac:parseInt(document.getElementById('pcAC').value)||10,
    thac0:autoThac0,
    move:parseInt(document.getElementById('pcMove').value)||12,
    xpCur:parseInt(document.getElementById('pcXpCur').value)||0,
    xpNext:autoXpNext,
    savePar:autoSaves?autoSaves.parPoison:userSavePar,
    savePoi:autoSaves?autoSaves.parPoison:(parseInt(document.getElementById('pcSavePoi').value)||13),
    saveRod:autoSaves?autoSaves.rodStaff:(parseInt(document.getElementById('pcSaveRod').value)||15),
    saveBre:autoSaves?autoSaves.breath:(parseInt(document.getElementById('pcSaveBre').value)||16),
    saveSpe:autoSaves?autoSaves.spell:(parseInt(document.getElementById('pcSaveSpe').value)||17),
    status:document.getElementById('pcStatus').value,
    abilities:{fue:10,des:10,con:10,int:10,sab:10,car:10},
    alignment:'Neutral',
    weaponProfs:[],
    nonweaponProfs:[],
    feats:[]
  };
  if(!editingPcId)pc.hp=pc.hpMax;
  let pcs=getPcs();
  if(editingPcId){const idx=pcs.findIndex(p=>p.id===editingPcId);if(idx>=0){pc.hp=pcs[idx].hp;pcs[idx]=pc}}
  else pcs.push(pc);
  savePcs(pcs);
  togglePcForm();
  renderPcs();
  showToast(editingPcId?`${pc.name} actualizado`:`${pc.name} creado (THAC0:${autoThac0})`,'success');
}

function editPc(id){
  const pc=getPcs().find(p=>p.id===id);if(!pc)return;
  editingPcId=id;
  document.getElementById('pcName').value=pc.name;
  document.getElementById('pcRace').value=pc.race;
  document.getElementById('pcClass').value=pc.className||pc.class||'';
  document.getElementById('pcLevel').value=pc.level;
  document.getElementById('pcHpMax').value=pc.hpMax;
  document.getElementById('pcAC').value=pc.ac;
  document.getElementById('pcThac0').value=pc.thac0;
  document.getElementById('pcMove').value=pc.move;
  document.getElementById('pcXpCur').value=pc.xpCur;
  document.getElementById('pcXpNext').value=pc.xpNext;
  document.getElementById('pcSavePar').value=pc.savePar;
  document.getElementById('pcSavePoi').value=pc.savePoi;
  document.getElementById('pcSaveRod').value=pc.saveRod;
  document.getElementById('pcSaveBre').value=pc.saveBre;
  document.getElementById('pcSaveSpe').value=pc.saveSpe;
  document.getElementById('pcStatus').value=pc.status;
  document.getElementById('pcFormWrap').style.display='block';
}

function deletePc(id){
  if(!confirm('¿Eliminar este personaje?'))return;
  savePcs(getPcs().filter(p=>p.id!==id));
  renderPcs();
  showToast('PJ eliminado','info');
}

function getHpClass(hp,max){
  const pct=max>0?hp/max:0;
  if(pct>.5)return'hp-high';if(pct>.25)return'hp-mid';if(pct>0)return'hp-low';return'hp-crit';
}

function getStatusClass(st){return st==='Activo'?'pc-activo':st==='Inconsciente'?'pc-inconsciente':'pc-muerto'}

function renderPcs(){
  const pcs=getPcs();
  const grid=document.getElementById('pcGrid');
  if(!pcs.length){grid.innerHTML='<p style="color:var(--muted);text-align:center;padding:30px">No hay personajes. Añade un PJ para comenzar.</p>';return}
  grid.innerHTML=pcs.map(pc=>{
    const hp=pc.hp??pc.hpMax;
    const pct=pc.hpMax>0?Math.max(0,Math.min(100,hp/pc.hpMax*100)):0;
    const xpPct=pc.xpNext>0?Math.min(100,pc.xpCur/pc.xpNext*100):0;
    return`<div class="pc-card ${getStatusClass(pc.status)}">
      <div style="display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:flex-start">
        <div><div class="pc-name">${escapeHtml(pc.name)}</div><div class="pc-subtitle">${escapeHtml(pc.race)} · ${escapeHtml(pc.className||pc.class||'?')} · Nivel ${pc.level}</div></div>
        <span class="badge ${pc.status==='Activo'?'badge-teal':pc.status==='Inconsciente'?'badge-gold':'badge-red'}">${pc.status}</span>
      </div>
      <div class="hp-bar-wrap"><div class="hp-bar ${getHpClass(hp,pc.hpMax)}" style="width:${pct}%"></div><div class="hp-text">${hp} / ${pc.hpMax} PG</div></div>
      <div class="pc-stats">
        <div class="pc-stat"><div class="pc-stat-val">${pc.ac}</div><div class="pc-stat-lbl">CA</div></div>
        <div class="pc-stat"><div class="pc-stat-val">${pc.thac0}</div><div class="pc-stat-lbl">GAC0</div></div>
        <div class="pc-stat"><div class="pc-stat-val">${pc.move}</div><div class="pc-stat-lbl">MOV</div></div>
        <div class="pc-stat"><div class="pc-stat-val">${pc.level}</div><div class="pc-stat-lbl">NIV</div></div>
      </div>
      <div style="font-size:10px;color:var(--muted);margin-top:8px">Salvaciones: Par ${pc.savePar} · Veno ${pc.savePoi} · Var ${pc.saveRod} · Ali ${pc.saveBre} · Hec ${pc.saveSpe}</div>
      <div style="font-size:11px;color:var(--teal-bright);margin-top:4px">XP: ${pc.xpCur.toLocaleString('es-ES')} / ${pc.xpNext.toLocaleString('es-ES')}</div>
      <div class="xp-bar-wrap"><div class="xp-bar" style="width:${xpPct}%"></div></div>
      <div class="pc-actions">
        <button class="dm-btn dm-btn-sm dm-btn-gold" onclick="editPc('${pc.id}')"><i class="fas fa-edit"></i> Editar</button>
        <button class="dm-btn dm-btn-sm dm-btn-red" onclick="deletePc('${pc.id}')"><i class="fas fa-trash"></i></button>
      </div>
    </div>`;
  }).join('');
}

// ===== GESTOR DE COMBATE (TAB 3) =====
const COMBAT_KEY='img_combat';
function getCombat(){try{const d=localStorage.getItem(COMBAT_KEY);return d?JSON.parse(d):{combatants:[],effects:[],round:1}}catch(e){return{combatants:[],effects:[],round:1}}}
function saveCombat(data){try{localStorage.setItem(COMBAT_KEY,JSON.stringify(data))}catch(e){showToast('Error al guardar combate','info')}}

let rollHistoryData=[];

function addCombatant(){
  const name=document.getElementById('cbName').value.trim();
  if(!name){showToast('Escribe el nombre del combatiente','info');return}
  const init=parseInt(document.getElementById('cbInit').value)||10;
  const hpMax=parseInt(document.getElementById('cbHpMax').value)||20;
  const ac=parseInt(document.getElementById('cbAC')?.value)||10;
  const thac0=parseInt(document.getElementById('cbThac0')?.value)||20;
  const type=document.getElementById('cbType').value;
  const data=getCombat();
  data.combatants.push({id:'cb_'+Date.now(),name,init,hpMax,hp:hpMax,ac,thac0,type});
  saveCombat(data);
  renderCombatants();
  document.getElementById('cbName').value='';
  document.getElementById('cbInit').value='10';
  showToast(`${name} añadido (AC:${ac} GAC0:${thac0})`,'success');
}

// Añade todos los PJs activos al tracker de combate de una vez
function addPcsToCombat(){
  const pcs=getPcs().filter(p=>p.status==='Activo');
  if(!pcs.length){showToast('No hay PJs activos en las tablas','info');return}
  const data=getCombat();
  const existingIds=new Set(data.combatants.map(c=>c.pcId).filter(Boolean));
  let added=0;
  pcs.forEach(pc=>{
    if(existingIds.has(pc.id))return;
    data.combatants.push({
      id:'cb_'+Date.now()+'_'+pc.id,
      pcId:pc.id,
      name:pc.name,
      init:Math.floor(Math.random()*10)+1,
      hpMax:pc.hpMax||pc.hp||10,
      hp:pc.hp??pc.hpMax??10,
      ac:pc.ac||10,
      thac0:pc.thac0||getThac0(pc.className||pc.class||'',pc.level||1),
      type:'PC'
    });
    added++;
  });
  saveCombat(data);renderCombatants();
  showToast(added>0?`${added} PJ${added>1?'s':''} añadido${added>1?'s':''}. Iniciativa: aleatoria.`:'Todos los PJs ya están en el combate','info');
}

function removeCombatant(id){
  const data=getCombat();
  data.combatants=data.combatants.filter(c=>c.id!==id);
  saveCombat(data);renderCombatants();
}

function damageCombatant(id,amt){
  const data=getCombat();
  const cb=data.combatants.find(c=>c.id===id);
  if(cb){cb.hp=Math.max(0,cb.hp-amt);saveCombat(data);renderCombatants()}
}

function healCombatant(id,amt){
  const data=getCombat();
  const cb=data.combatants.find(c=>c.id===id);
  if(cb){cb.hp=Math.min(cb.hpMax,cb.hp+amt);saveCombat(data);renderCombatants()}
}

function getCombatStatus(hp,max){
  if(hp<=0)return{text:'Muerto',cls:'status-muerto'};
  const pct=max>0?hp/max:0;
  if(pct>.5)return{text:'Normal',cls:'status-normal'};
  if(pct>.25)return{text:'Herido',cls:'status-herido'};
  return{text:'Crítico',cls:'status-critico'};
}

function rollInitiatives(){
  const data=getCombat();
  data.combatants.forEach(cb=>{cb.init=Math.floor(Math.random()*10)+1});
  data.combatants.sort((a,b)=>a.init-b.init);
  saveCombat(data);renderCombatants();
  const results=data.combatants.map(cb=>`${cb.name}: ${cb.init}`).join(', ');
  showToast(`Iniciativas: ${results}`,'info');
}

function renderCombatants(){
  const data=getCombat();
  const list=document.getElementById('combatantList');
  if(!list)return;
  const sorted=[...data.combatants].sort((a,b)=>a.init-b.init);
  if(!sorted.length){list.innerHTML='<p style="color:var(--muted);padding:16px;text-align:center">No hay combatientes. Usa el formulario o el botón PJs.</p>';return}
  list.innerHTML=sorted.map(cb=>{
    const st=getCombatStatus(cb.hp,cb.hpMax);
    const pct=cb.hpMax>0?Math.max(0,Math.min(100,cb.hp/cb.hpMax*100)):0;
    const hpCls=cb.hp<=0?'hp-crit':pct>.5?'hp-high':pct>.25?'hp-mid':'hp-low';
    const typeBadge=cb.type==='PC'?'badge-teal':cb.type==='Monstruo'?'badge-red':'badge-gold';
    return`<div class="combatant${cb.hp<=0?' combatant-dead':''}">
      <div class="init-val" title="Iniciativa">${cb.init}</div>
      <div class="c-info" style="flex:1">
        <div class="c-name" style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:6px;flex-wrap:wrap">
          <span>${escapeHtml(cb.name)}</span>
          <span class="badge ${typeBadge}" style="font-size:9px">${cb.type}</span>
          <span class="status-badge ${st.cls}">${st.text}</span>
        </div>
        <div style="display:flex;gap:10px;font-size:10px;color:var(--muted);margin-top:2px">
          <span>CA: <strong style="color:var(--teal-bright)">${cb.ac??10}</strong></span>
          <span>GAC0: <strong style="color:var(--gold)">${cb.thac0??20}</strong></span>
          <span>Ronda ${data.round}</span>
        </div>
        <div class="c-hp">
          <div class="c-hp-bar"><div class="c-hp-fill ${hpCls}" style="width:${pct}%"></div></div>
          <div class="c-hp-text">${cb.hp}/${cb.hpMax}</div>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="c-actions-row" style="display:flex;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:4px;align-items:center">
        <button class="c-btn c-btn-dmg" onclick="damageCombatant('${cb.id}',1)">-1</button>
        <button class="c-btn c-btn-dmg" onclick="damageCombatant('${cb.id}',5)">-5</button>
        <input class="dm-input" id="dmgInput_${cb.id}" type="number" min="1" value="10" style="width:46px;padding:2px 4px;font-size:11px">
        <button class="c-btn c-btn-dmg" onclick="damageCombatant('${cb.id}',parseInt(document.getElementById('dmgInput_${cb.id}').value)||10)" title="Daño personalizado"><i class="fas fa-arrow-down"></i>Daño</button>
        <button class="c-btn c-btn-heal" onclick="healCombatant('${cb.id}',parseInt(document.getElementById('dmgInput_${cb.id}').value)||10)" title="Curación personalizada"><i class="fas fa-arrow-up"></i>Cur</button>
        <button class="c-btn c-btn-heal" onclick="healCombatant('${cb.id}',cb.hpMax)" title="Curación total">Max</button>
        <button class="c-btn" onclick="removeCombatant('${cb.id}')" title="Eliminar del combate"><i class="fas fa-times"></i></button>
      </div>
    </div>`;
  }).join('');
}

function addEffect(){
  const name=document.getElementById('efName').value||'Efecto';
  const dur=parseInt(document.getElementById('efDur').value)||3;
  const data=getCombat();
  data.effects.push({id:'ef_'+Date.now(),name,duration:dur});
  saveCombat(data);renderEffects();
  document.getElementById('efName').value='';
}

function removeEffect(id){
  const data=getCombat();
  data.effects=data.effects.filter(e=>e.id!==id);
  saveCombat(data);renderEffects();
}

function renderEffects(){
  const data=getCombat();
  const list=document.getElementById('effectsList');
  if(!data.effects.length){list.innerHTML='<p style="color:var(--muted);font-size:12px;padding:8px">Sin efectos activos.</p>';return}
  list.innerHTML=data.effects.map(ef=>`<div class="effect-item"><span class="effect-name">${ef.name}</span><span class="effect-dur">${ef.duration} ronda${ef.duration>1?'s':''}</span><button class="c-btn" onclick="removeEffect('${ef.id}')"><i class="fas fa-times"></i></button></div>`).join('');
}

function nextRound(){
  const data=getCombat();
  data.round++;
  data.effects=data.effects.map(e=>({...e,duration:e.duration-1})).filter(e=>e.duration>0);
  saveCombat(data);renderCombatants();renderEffects();
  showToast(`Ronda ${data.round}`,'info');
}

function checkMorale(){
  const score=parseInt(document.getElementById('moralScore').value)||12;
  const r1=Math.floor(Math.random()*10)+1,r2=Math.floor(Math.random()*10)+1;
  const total=r1+r2;
  const passed=total<=score;
  document.getElementById('moralResult').innerHTML=`Tirada: ${r1}+${r2}=<span style="color:var(--gold-bright)">${total}</span> vs Moral ${score} → <span style="color:${passed?'var(--teal-bright)':'var(--accent-bright)'}">${passed?'¡Mantienen la posición!':'¡Huyen en pánico!'}</span>`;
}

// Dice Roller
function rollDice(sides,num=1,mod=0){
  let total=0;const rolls=[];
  for(let i=0;i<num;i++){const r=Math.floor(Math.random()*sides)+1;rolls.push(r);total+=r}
  total+=mod;
  document.getElementById('diceResult').innerHTML=`<span style="font-size:16px;color:var(--fg-dim)">${num>1?rolls.join(' + ')+(mod?` + ${mod}`:'')+' = ':''}</span>${total}`;
  const label=`${num>1?num:''}d${sides}${mod?`+${mod}`:''}`;
  addRollHistory(label,rolls,total,mod);
  return total;
}

function rollCustom(){
  const n=parseInt(document.getElementById('customN').value)||1;
  const d=parseInt(document.getElementById('customD').value)||6;
  const m=parseInt(document.getElementById('customMod').value)||0;
  rollDice(d,n,m);
}

function addRollHistory(label,rolls,total,mod){
  rollHistoryData.unshift({label,rolls,total,mod,time:new Date()});
  if(rollHistoryData.length>20)rollHistoryData.pop();
  const h=document.getElementById('rollHistory');
  h.innerHTML=rollHistoryData.map(r=>`<div class="roll-entry"><span>${r.label}</span> → [${r.rolls.join(',')}]${r.mod?` +${r.mod}`:''} = <span>${r.total}</span></div>`).join('');
}

// ===== ENTRENAMIENTOS (TAB 4) =====
const TRAIN_KEY='img_trainings';
const TRAININGS=[
  {id:'mov',name:'Entrenamiento de Movimiento',desc:'Aumenta la velocidad base del personaje',req:'Nivel 3+, CON 12+',cost:'500 XP + 2 semanas',stat:'move',bonus:1},
  {id:'ac',name:'Entrenamiento Defensivo',desc:'Mejora la Clase de Armadura natural',req:'Nivel 4+, DES 12+',cost:'800 XP + 3 semanas',stat:'ac',bonus:-1},
  {id:'atk',name:'Entrenamiento Ofensivo',desc:'Mejora el GAC0',req:'Nivel 4+, FUE 12+',cost:'800 XP + 3 semanas',stat:'thac0',bonus:-1},
  {id:'hp',name:'Entrenamiento de Resistencia',desc:'Aumenta los PG máximos',req:'Nivel 3+, CON 14+',cost:'600 XP + 2 semanas',stat:'hpMax',bonus:2},
  {id:'save',name:'Entrenamiento de Salvación',desc:'Mejora todas las salvaciones en 1',req:'Nivel 5+',cost:'1000 XP + 4 semanas',stat:'saveAll',bonus:-1},
  {id:'init',name:'Entrenamiento de Reflejos',desc:'Bonificador a iniciativa',req:'Nivel 3+, DES 14+',cost:'600 XP + 2 semanas',stat:'init',bonus:1},
  {id:'effect_fort',name:'Fortaleza Corporal',desc:'Resistencia a veneno y enfermedad',req:'Nivel 6+, CON 15+',cost:'1200 XP + 4 semanas',stat:'savePoi',bonus:-1},
  {id:'effect_will',name:'Voluntad de Hierro',desc:'Resistencia a hechizos mentales',req:'Nivel 6+, SAB 15+',cost:'1200 XP + 4 semanas',stat:'saveSpe',bonus:-1},
];

function getTrainings(){try{const d=localStorage.getItem(TRAIN_KEY);return d?JSON.parse(d):[]}catch(e){return[]}}
function saveTrainings(t){try{localStorage.setItem(TRAIN_KEY,JSON.stringify(t))}catch(e){showToast('Error al guardar entrenamientos','info')}}

function loadTrainPcSelect(){
  const pcs=getPcs();
  const sel=document.getElementById('trainPc');
  sel.innerHTML='<option value="">Seleccionar PJ...</option>'+pcs.map(p=>`<option value="${p.id}">${p.name} (${p.className||p.class||'?'} ${p.level})</option>`).join('');
  const tsel=document.getElementById('trainType');
  tsel.innerHTML=TRAININGS.map(t=>`<option value="${t.id}">${t.name}</option>`).join('');
}

function renderTrainings(){
  const grid=document.getElementById('trainGrid');
  grid.innerHTML=TRAININGS.map(t=>`<div class="train-card"><div class="train-title">${t.name}</div><div class="train-req">${t.desc}<br><strong>Requisitos:</strong> ${t.req}</div><div class="train-cost">Coste: ${t.cost}</div></div>`).join('');
  // Stats >30 reference
  document.getElementById('statsOver30').innerHTML=`<table class="rtable"><thead><tr><th>Puntuación</th><th>FUE</th><th>DES</th><th>CON</th><th>INT</th><th>SAB</th><th>CAR</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td>21-22</td><td>+4/+7</td><td>+5</td><td>+3</td><td>+1 id.</td><td>+1 magia</td><td>+5/+5</td></tr><tr><td>23-24</td><td>+5/+8</td><td>+6</td><td>+4</td><td>+2 id.</td><td>+2 magia</td><td>+6/+6</td></tr><tr><td>25</td><td>+7/+14</td><td>+7</td><td>+5</td><td>+3 id.</td><td>+3 magia</td><td>+7/+7</td></tr><tr><td>26-30</td><td>+8/+15</td><td>+8</td><td>+6</td><td>+4 id.</td><td>+4 magia</td><td>+8/+8</td></tr></tbody></table>`;
  renderTrainingHistory();
}

function applyTraining(){
  const pcId=document.getElementById('trainPc').value;
  const trainId=document.getElementById('trainType').value;
  if(!pcId){showToast('Selecciona un personaje','info');return}
  const pcs=getPcs();
  const pc=pcs.find(p=>p.id===pcId);
  const train=TRAININGS.find(t=>t.id===trainId);
  if(!pc||!train)return;
  if(train.stat==='saveAll'){pc.savePar+=train.bonus;pc.savePoi+=train.bonus;pc.saveRod+=train.bonus;pc.saveBre+=train.bonus;pc.saveSpe+=train.bonus}
  else if(train.stat==='hpMax'){pc[train.stat]+=train.bonus;pc.hp+=train.bonus}
  else if(pc[train.stat]!==undefined){pc[train.stat]+=train.bonus}
  savePcs(pcs);
  const tr=getTrainings();
  tr.push({pcId,pcName:pc.name,trainName:train.name,date:new Date().toLocaleDateString('es-ES')});
  saveTrainings(tr);
  renderPcs();loadTrainPcSelect();renderTrainingHistory();
  showToast(`${train.name} aplicado a ${pc.name}`,'success');
}

function renderTrainingHistory(){
  const tr=getTrainings();
  const el=document.getElementById('trainingHistory');
  if(!tr.length){el.innerHTML='';return}
  el.innerHTML=`<h4 style="color:var(--fg-dim);font-family:'Cinzel',serif;font-size:13px;margin-bottom:8px"><i class="fas fa-history" style="margin-right:6px"></i>Historial</h4>`+tr.slice(-10).reverse().map(t=>`<div style="font-size:12px;color:var(--fg-dim);padding:4px 0;border-bottom:1px solid rgba(58,47,72,.3)"><span style="color:var(--gold)">${t.pcName}</span> → ${t.trainName} <span style="color:var(--muted)">${t.date}</span></div>`).join('');
}

// ===== SESIÓN ACTIVA (TAB 5) =====
const SESSION_KEY='img_session';

function getSession(){try{const d=localStorage.getItem(SESSION_KEY);return d?JSON.parse(d):{date:'',num:1,title:'',notes:'',hooks:[],npcs:[],xpEntries:[]}}catch(e){return{date:'',num:1,title:'',notes:'',hooks:[],npcs:[],xpEntries:[]}}}
function saveSession(s){try{localStorage.setItem(SESSION_KEY,JSON.stringify(s))}catch(e){showToast('Error al guardar sesión','info')}}

function initSession(){
  const s=getSession();
  const today=new Date().toLocaleDateString('es-ES',{year:'numeric',month:'short',day:'numeric'});
  const sesDateEl=document.getElementById('sesDate');
  if(!sesDateEl)return;
  sesDateEl.value=s.date||today;
  document.getElementById('sesNum').value=s.num||1;
  document.getElementById('sesTitle').value=s.title||'';
  document.getElementById('sesNotes').value=s.notes||'';
  renderHooks();renderNpcs();renderSessionXp();
  // Prevent double listener registration
  if(sesDateEl._sessionInit) return;
  sesDateEl._sessionInit=true;
  // Auto-save notes
  let saveTimeout;
  document.getElementById('sesNotes').addEventListener('input',()=>{
    clearTimeout(saveTimeout);
    saveTimeout=setTimeout(()=>{
      const s=getSession();s.notes=document.getElementById('sesNotes').value;
      s.title=document.getElementById('sesTitle').value;
      s.num=parseInt(document.getElementById('sesNum').value)||1;
      saveSession(s);
    },500);
  });
  ['sesTitle','sesNum'].forEach(id=>{
    document.getElementById(id).addEventListener('change',()=>{
      const s=getSession();
      s.title=document.getElementById('sesTitle').value;
      s.num=parseInt(document.getElementById('sesNum').value)||1;
      saveSession(s);
    });
  });
}

function addHook(){
  const input=document.getElementById('hookInput');
  const text=input.value.trim();if(!text)return;
  const s=getSession();s.hooks.push({id:'hk_'+Date.now(),text,done:false});
  saveSession(s);renderHooks();input.value='';
}

function toggleHook(id){
  const s=getSession();
  const h=s.hooks.find(hk=>hk.id===id);
  if(h){h.done=!h.done;saveSession(s);renderHooks()}
}

function removeHook(id){
  const s=getSession();s.hooks=s.hooks.filter(h=>h.id!==id);saveSession(s);renderHooks();
}

function renderHooks(){
  const s=getSession();
  const el=document.getElementById('hooksList');
  if(!s.hooks.length){el.innerHTML='<p style="color:var(--muted);font-size:12px">Sin ganchos o recordatorios.</p>';return}
  el.innerHTML=s.hooks.map(h=>`<div class="hook-item${h.done?' checked':''}"><input type="checkbox" ${h.done?'checked':''} onchange="toggleHook('${h.id}')"><span>${escapeHtml(h.text)}</span><button class="c-btn" onclick="removeHook('${h.id}')"><i class="fas fa-times"></i></button></div>`).join('');
}

function addNpc(){
  const name=document.getElementById('npcName').value.trim();if(!name)return;
  const att=document.getElementById('npcAtt').value;
  const loc=document.getElementById('npcLoc').value.trim();
  const hp=parseInt(document.getElementById('npcHp').value)||0;
  const s=getSession();
  s.npcs.push({id:'npc_'+Date.now(),name,attitude:att,location:loc,hp});
  saveSession(s);renderNpcs();
  document.getElementById('npcName').value='';document.getElementById('npcLoc').value='';document.getElementById('npcHp').value='';
}

function removeNpc(id){
  const s=getSession();s.npcs=s.npcs.filter(n=>n.id!==id);saveSession(s);renderNpcs();
}

function renderNpcs(){
  const s=getSession();
  const el=document.getElementById('npcList');
  if(!s.npcs.length){el.innerHTML='<p style="color:var(--muted);font-size:12px">Sin PNJs activos.</p>';return}
  el.innerHTML=s.npcs.map(n=>{
    const attCls=n.attitude==='Amistoso'?'badge-teal':n.attitude==='Hostil'?'badge-red':'badge-gold';
    return`<div class="npc-item"><span style="color:var(--fg);flex:1">${escapeHtml(n.name)}</span><span class="badge ${attCls}" style="font-size:10px">${n.attitude}</span>${n.location?`<span style="color:var(--muted);font-size:11px">${escapeHtml(n.location)}</span>`:''}${n.hp?`<span style="color:var(--fg-dim);font-size:11px">${n.hp} PG</span>`:''}<button class="c-btn" onclick="removeNpc('${n.id}')"><i class="fas fa-times"></i></button></div>`;
  }).join('');
}

function renderSessionXp(){
  const pcs=getPcs();
  const s=getSession();
  if(!s.xpEntries)s.xpEntries=[];
  const el=document.getElementById('sessionXpList');
  if(!pcs.length){el.innerHTML='<p style="color:var(--muted);font-size:12px">No hay PJs registrados.</p>';return}
  el.innerHTML=pcs.map(pc=>{
    const xp=s.xpEntries.find(e=>e.pcId===pc.id)||{combat:0,roleplay:0,objectives:0};
    return`<div style="display:flex;gap:8px;align-items:center;padding:6px 0;border-bottom:1px solid rgba(58,47,72,.3);flex-wrap:wrap">
      <span style="color:var(--gold);font-size:12px;min-width:80px;font-family:'Cinzel',serif">${escapeHtml(pc.name)}</span>
      <div class="dm-form-group" style="margin:0;flex:1;min-width:70px"><label class="dm-form-label">Combate</label><input class="dm-input" type="number" value="${xp.combat}" onchange="updateSessionXp('${pc.id}','combat',this.value)" style="padding:5px 8px"></div>
      <div class="dm-form-group" style="margin:0;flex:1;min-width:70px"><label class="dm-form-label">Interpretación</label><input class="dm-input" type="number" value="${xp.roleplay}" onchange="updateSessionXp('${pc.id}','roleplay',this.value)" style="padding:5px 8px"></div>
      <div class="dm-form-group" style="margin:0;flex:1;min-width:70px"><label class="dm-form-label">Objetivos</label><input class="dm-input" type="number" value="${xp.objectives}" onchange="updateSessionXp('${pc.id}','objectives',this.value)" style="padding:5px 8px"></div>
      <span style="color:var(--teal-bright);font-size:12px;font-family:'Cinzel',serif;min-width:50px">+${xp.combat+xp.roleplay+xp.objectives} XP</span>
    </div>`;
  }).join('')+`<button class="dm-btn dm-btn-gold" style="margin-top:10px" onclick="applySessionXp()"><i class="fas fa-coins"></i> Aplicar XP a Personajes</button>`;
}

function updateSessionXp(pcId,field,val){
  const s=getSession();
  let entry=s.xpEntries.find(e=>e.pcId===pcId);
  if(!entry){entry={pcId,combat:0,roleplay:0,objectives:0};s.xpEntries.push(entry)}
  entry[field]=parseInt(val)||0;
  saveSession(s);
  // Update total display
  renderSessionXp();
}

function applySessionXp(){
  const s=getSession();
  if(!s.xpEntries||!s.xpEntries.length)return;
  const pcs=getPcs();
  let applied=0;
  s.xpEntries.forEach(xe=>{
    const pc=pcs.find(p=>p.id===xe.pcId);
    if(pc){const total=xe.combat+xe.roleplay+xe.objectives;pc.xpCur+=total;if(total>0)applied++;
    // Level-up detection
    const progress=getXpProgress(pc.className||pc.class,pc.xpCur);
    if(progress.needed!==null&&progress.needed<=0){
      showToast(`¡${pc.name} sube al nivel ${progress.level}!`,'success');
    }}
  });
  savePcs(pcs);
  s.xpEntries=[];
  saveSession(s);
  renderSessionXp();renderPcs();
  showToast(`XP aplicada a ${applied} personajes`,'success');
}

function genEncounter(){
  const terrain=document.getElementById('genTerrain').value;
  const level=document.getElementById('genLevel').value;
  const list=ENCOUNTERS[terrain]?.[level]||['Sin encuentros definidos'];
  const enc=list[Math.floor(Math.random()*list.length)];
  document.getElementById('encounterResult').innerHTML=`<div class="gen-result"><h4>Encuentro — ${terrain} (Nivel ${level})</h4><p style="font-size:16px;color:var(--teal-bright)">${enc}</p><p style="font-size:11px;color:var(--muted)">Reacción inicial: ${(Math.floor(Math.random()*10)+1)+(Math.floor(Math.random()*10)+1)} (2d10)</p></div>`;
}

function rollDiceStr(s){
  if(!s||s==='—')return 0;
  const m=s.match(/(\d*)d(\d+)([×x]\d+)?/);
  if(!m)return 0;
  const n=parseInt(m[1])||1;
  const sides=parseInt(m[2]);
  const mult=m[3]?parseInt(m[3].replace(/[×x]/,'')):1;
  let total=0;for(let i=0;i<n;i++)total+=Math.floor(Math.random()*sides)+1;
  return total*mult;
}

function genTreasure(){
  const type=document.getElementById('genTreasureType').value;
  const t=TREASURE_DATA[type];
  if(!t){document.getElementById('treasureResult').innerHTML='<div class="gen-result"><p>Tipo no disponible</p></div>';return}
  const cp=rollDiceStr(t.cp),sp=rollDiceStr(t.sp),ep=rollDiceStr(t.ep),gp=rollDiceStr(t.gp),pp=rollDiceStr(t.pp);
  const gems=rollDiceStr(t.gems),jewelry=rollDiceStr(t.jewelry);
  let magicStr='';
  if(t.magic&&t.magic!=='0%'){
    const pct=parseInt(t.magic);
    if(Math.random()*100<pct){
      const magicItems=['Espada +1','Escudo +1','Poción de curación','Pergamino de hechizo (nivel 1)','Anillo de protección +1','Varita de luz','Amuleto contra detección','Botas de velocidad','Capa de desplazamiento','Bolsa de almacenamiento','Poción de fuerza gigante','Espada +2 llama','Armadura +2','Anillo de invisibilidad','Pergamino de hechizo (nivel 3)','Bastón de curación'];
      magicItems.sort(()=>Math.random()-.5);
      const count=Math.floor(Math.random()*2)+1;
      magicStr=magicItems.slice(0,count).map(i=>`<span style="color:var(--purple)">${i}</span>`).join('<br>');
    }
  }
  let html=`<div class="gen-result"><h4>Tesoro Tipo ${type}</h4>`;
  if(cp)html+=`<p>🪙 Monedas de cobre: <span style="color:var(--gold-bright)">${cp.toLocaleString('es-ES')}</span></p>`;
  if(sp)html+=`<p>🥈 Monedas de plata: <span style="color:var(--fg)">${sp.toLocaleString('es-ES')}</span></p>`;
  if(ep)html+=`<p>⚪ Monedas de electro: <span style="color:var(--teal-bright)">${ep.toLocaleString('es-ES')}</span></p>`;
  if(gp)html+=`<p>🟡 Monedas de oro: <span style="color:var(--gold-bright)">${gp.toLocaleString('es-ES')}</span></p>`;
  if(pp)html+=`<p>⚫ Monedas de platino: <span style="color:var(--fg)">${pp.toLocaleString('es-ES')}</span></p>`;
  if(gems)html+=`<p>💎 Gemas: <span style="color:var(--teal-bright)">${gems}</span> (valor ${gems*100} po aprox.)</p>`;
  if(jewelry)html+=`<p>💍 Joyas: <span style="color:var(--gold)">${jewelry}</span> (valor ${jewelry*500} po aprox.)</p>`;
  if(magicStr)html+=`<p>✨ Objetos mágicos:<br>${magicStr}</p>`;
  if(!cp&&!sp&&!ep&&!gp&&!pp&&!gems&&!jewelry&&!magicStr)html+=`<p style="color:var(--muted)">No se encontró tesoro.</p>`;
  html+=`</div>`;
  document.getElementById('treasureResult').innerHTML=html;
}

// Weather Generator
function genWeather(){
  const season=document.getElementById('genSeason').value;
  const temps={Primavera:{base:12,range:12},Verano:{base:24,range:10},Otoño:{base:10,range:14},Invierno:{base:-2,range:16}};
  const t=temps[season];
  const temp=t.base+Math.floor(Math.random()*t.range)-Math.floor(t.range/2);
  const winds=['Calma','Brisa ligera','Viento moderado','Viento fuerte','Tormenta de viento'];
  const wind=winds[Math.floor(Math.random()*winds.length)];
  const conditions={Primavera:['Despejado','Nublado','Lluvia ligera','Lluvia moderada','Niebla','Tormenta','Llovizna'],Verano:['Despejado y caluroso','Despejado','Nublado','Tormenta eléctrica','Bochorno','Lluvia de verano'],Otoño:['Despejado','Nublado','Niebla densa','Lluvia','Viento frío','Neblina','Granizo ligero'],Invierno:['Despejado y helado','Nevada ligera','Nevada moderada','Tormenta de nieve','Ventisca','Escarcha','Granizo','Niebla helada']};
  const cond=conditions[season][Math.floor(Math.random()*conditions[season].length)];
  let effect='';
  if(temp<0)effect='Penalización de -1 a todas las tiradas al aire libre por frío extremo. ';
  if(wind==='Tormenta de viento'||wind==='Viento fuerte')effect+='Proyectiles a -2. ';
  if(cond.includes('Tormenta')||cond.includes('Ventisca'))effect+='Visibilidad reducida a la mitad. Percepción -4. ';
  if(cond.includes('Niebla'))effect+='Visibilidad 1d4×10 pies. Percepción -4. ';
  if(cond.includes('Nevada moderada')||cond.includes('Granizo'))effect+='Movimiento reducido a la mitad. ';

  document.getElementById('weatherResult').innerHTML=`<div class="gen-result"><h4>Clima — ${season}</h4><p style="font-size:15px;color:var(--gold-bright)">${cond}</p><p>Temperatura: <strong>${temp}°C</strong> · Viento: <strong>${wind}</strong></p>${effect?`<p style="color:var(--accent-bright);font-size:12px;margin-top:6px"><i class="fas fa-exclamation-triangle" style="margin-right:4px"></i>${effect}</p>`:''}</div>`;
}

function genNpcName(){
  const race=document.getElementById('genNpcRace').value;
  const gender=document.getElementById('genNpcGender').value==='Masculino'?'M':'F';
  const names=NPC_NAMES[race]?.[gender]||NPC_NAMES.Humano[gender];
  const name=names[Math.floor(Math.random()*names.length)];
  const traits=['Amable','Arrogante','Cauteloso','Curioso','Distraído','Encantador','Formal','Generoso','Honesto','Impaciente','Leal','Melancólico','Nervioso','Obstinado','Parco','Reservado','Sabio','Terco','Valiente','Xenófobo'];
  const trait=traits[Math.floor(Math.random()*traits.length)];
  const age=['Joven','Adulto','Maduro','Viejo'][Math.floor(Math.random()*4)];
  document.getElementById('npcNameResult').innerHTML=`<div class="gen-result"><h4>Nombre Generado</h4><p style="font-size:20px;color:var(--teal-bright);font-family:'Cinzel',serif">${name}</p><p style="font-size:13px">${race} · ${gender==='M'?'Masculino':'Femenino'} · ${age} · ${trait}</p></div>`;
}

// Dungeon Generator
function genDungeon(){
  const rooms=parseInt(document.getElementById('genDunRooms').value)||8;
  const level=document.getElementById('genDunLevel').value;
  const roomTypes=['Pasillo oscuro','Cámara de almacenamiento','Sala de guardia','Biblioteca polvorienta','Prisión abandonada','Cripta silenciosa','Cocina en ruinas','Sala del trono vacía','Laboratorio abandonado','Fuente seca','Aljibe subterráneo','Caverna natural','Sala de tortura','Templo olvidado','Armería saqueada','Comedor en desuso','Pasaje secreto','Trampa de pozo','Sala de rituales','Bodega colapsada'];
  const traps=['Sin trampa','Sin trampa','Sin trampa','Foso oculto','Dardos envenenados','Puerta atrapada','Suelo falso','Gas venenoso','Aguja en cerradura','Teletransporte','Piedra que cae','Ácido en pomo','Runa explosiva','Llamas súbitas'];
  const contents=['Vacía','Vacía','Monstruo(s)','Monstruo con tesoro','Tesoro sin guardián','Trampa y tesoro','Trampa sola','Pista/Información','PNJ encontrado','Enigma o acertijo','Magia ambiental','Pozo de agua','Escalera a otro nivel','Puerta secreta','Descripción atmosférica'];
  const monsters={'1-3':['Ratas gigantes (4-16)','Kobolds (4-12)','Goblins (3-9)','Esqueletos (3-12)','Zombis (2-8)','Gelatina gris (1)','Cubo gelatinoso (1)','Araña gigante (1-4)','Centauro menor (1-2)','Limo verde (1)'],'4-6':['Orcos (6-16)','Trolls (1-3)','Gárgolas (2-4)','Wights (1-3)','Ogres (1-4)','Minotauro (1)','Medusa (1)','Hombre lobo (2-4)','Sombra (2-6)','Vampiro joven (1)'],'7-10':['Mind Flayer (1)','Beholder (1)','Dragón joven (1)','Liche menor (1)','Vampiro antiguo (1)','Golem de piedra (1)','Demonio menor (1-2)','Diablo menor (1-2)','Naga (1)','Mumia antigua (1-2)']};
  let html=`<div class="gen-result"><h4>Mazmorra Express — ${rooms} habitaciones (Nivel ${level})</h4>`;
  for(let i=1;i<=rooms;i++){
    const rtype=roomTypes[Math.floor(Math.random()*roomTypes.length)];
    const trap=traps[Math.floor(Math.random()*traps.length)];
    const content=contents[Math.floor(Math.random()*contents.length)];
    let contentDetail='';
    if(content.includes('Monstruo')){
      const mList=monsters[level]||monsters['1-3'];
      contentDetail=` → <span style="color:var(--accent-bright)">${mList[Math.floor(Math.random()*mList.length)]}</span>`;
    }
    if(content.includes('Tesoro')){
      const tType=['A','B','C','D','E','F','G','H','I','J','K','L','M','N','O','R'][Math.floor(Math.random()*16)];
      contentDetail+=` · Tesoro tipo ${tType}`;
    }
    html+=`<div style="margin-bottom:10px;padding:8px 12px;background:rgba(0,0,0,.3);border-radius:8px;border-left:3px solid var(--${content.includes('Monstruo')?'accent-bright':content.includes('Trampa')?'gold':'teal'})">
      <strong style="color:var(--gold-bright)">Habitación ${i}</strong> — ${rtype}
      <div style="font-size:12px;margin-top:4px">${trap!=='Sin trampa'?`⚠️ Trampa: <span style="color:var(--gold)">${trap}</span> · `:''}${content}${contentDetail}</div>
    </div>`;
  }
  html+=`</div>`;
  document.getElementById('dungeonResult').innerHTML=html;
}

/* ============================================================
   ===== v1.4.0 NEW FEATURES =====
   ============================================================ */

// ===== WIKI GRID (Miselanea for DM and Player) =====
const WIKI_CATEGORIES=[
  {name:'Razas',icon:'fa-users',url:'https://adnd2e.fandom.com/wiki/Races'},
  {name:'Clases',icon:'fa-shield-halved',url:'https://adnd2e.fandom.com/wiki/Classes'},
  {name:'Monstruos',icon:'fa-dragon',url:'https://adnd2e.fandom.com/wiki/List_of_Monsters'},
  {name:'Dioses',icon:'fa-hand-sparkles',url:'https://adnd2e.fandom.com/wiki/List_of_Gods_%26_Avatars'},
  {name:'Pericias',icon:'fa-list-check',url:'https://adnd2e.fandom.com/wiki/Nonweapon_Proficiencies'},
  {name:'Objetos Mágicos',icon:'fa-hat-wizard',url:'https://adnd2e.fandom.com/wiki/Encyclopedia_Magica'},
  {name:'Conjuros',icon:'fa-wand-sparkles',url:'https://adnd2e.fandom.com/wiki/Category:Spell_List'}
];

function renderWikiGrid(containerId){
  const c=document.getElementById(containerId);
  if(!c||c.children.length>0)return;
  c.innerHTML=WIKI_CATEGORIES.map(w=>`<a href="${w.url}" target="_blank" class="wiki-card" style="text-decoration:none"><i class="fas ${w.icon}"></i><div class="wiki-title">${w.name}</div><div class="wiki-url">${w.url.replace('https://adnd2e.fandom.com/wiki/','')}</div></a>`).join('');
}

// ===== SOCIAL (DM) =====
const FRIENDS_KEY='img_friends';
function getFriends(){try{const d=localStorage.getItem(FRIENDS_KEY);return d?JSON.parse(d):[]}catch(e){return[]}}
function saveFriends(f){try{localStorage.setItem(FRIENDS_KEY,JSON.stringify(f))}catch(e){showToast('Error al guardar amigos','info')}}

function addFriend(){
  const name=document.getElementById('friendName').value.trim();if(!name)return;
  const friends=getFriends();
  friends.push({id:'fr_'+Date.now(),name,status:'Conectado'});
  saveFriends(friends);renderSocial();
  document.getElementById('friendName').value='';
  showToast(`Amigo "${name}" invitado`,'success');
}

function removeFriend(id){
  saveFriends(getFriends().filter(f=>f.id!==id));renderSocial();
}

function renderSocial(){
  const friends=getFriends();
  const el=document.getElementById('friendsList');
  const banner='<div style="background:rgba(201,168,76,0.15);border:1px solid var(--gold);border-radius:10px;padding:12px 16px;margin-bottom:16px;text-align:center;color:var(--gold-bright);font-family:Cinzel,serif;font-size:13px">⚔️ Funcionalidad multijugador en desarrollo — próximamente</div>';
  if(!friends.length){el.innerHTML=banner+'<p style="color:var(--muted);font-size:13px;text-align:center;padding:20px">No tienes amigos aún. ¡Invita a alguien!</p>';document.getElementById('sharedCharsList').innerHTML='<p style="color:var(--muted);font-size:12px">Sin personajes compartidos.</p>';document.getElementById('sharedCampaignsList').innerHTML='<p style="color:var(--muted);font-size:12px">Sin campañas compartidas.</p>';return}
  el.innerHTML=banner+friends.map(f=>`<div class="friend-item"><div class="friend-avatar"><i class="fas fa-user"></i></div><span class="friend-name">${escapeHtml(f.name)}</span><span class="friend-status badge-teal" style="padding:2px 8px;border-radius:10px;font-size:10px;background:var(--teal-dim);color:var(--teal-bright);border:1px solid rgba(58,138,122,.3)">${f.status}</span><button class="c-btn" onclick="removeFriend('${f.id}')" style="margin-left:6px"><i class="fas fa-times"></i></button></div>`).join('');
  document.getElementById('sharedCharsList').innerHTML='<p style="color:var(--muted);font-size:12px">Los personajes de tus amigos aparecerán aquí cuando se unan a una campaña.</p>';
  document.getElementById('sharedCampaignsList').innerHTML='<p style="color:var(--muted);font-size:12px">Las campañas compartidas aparecerán aquí.</p>';
}

// ===== CAMPAIGN DETAIL =====
let currentCampaignId=null;
let cdXpLog=[];  // registro de XP de la sesión actual

function openCampaignDetail(id){
  const campaigns=getCampaigns();
  const cp=campaigns.find(c=>c.id===id);if(!cp)return;
  currentCampaignId=id;
  cdXpLog=[];
  encounterData={round:0,monsters:[],activeChars:[]};

  // Cabecera
  document.getElementById('cdTitle').textContent=cp.name;
  document.getElementById('cdBadges').innerHTML=`
    <span class="badge badge-teal">${cp.status||'Activa'}</span>
    <span class="badge badge-gold">${cp.world||''}</span>
    ${cp.region?`<span class="badge badge-teal">${escapeHtml(cp.region)}</span>`:''}
    <span class="badge badge-purple">${cp.level||''}</span>
    <span class="badge badge-red">${cp.difficulty||''}</span>
    ${cp.tone?`<span class="badge badge-gold">${escapeHtml(cp.tone)}</span>`:''}
    ${cp.theme?`<span class="badge badge-teal">${escapeHtml(cp.theme)}</span>`:''}`;

  // Premisa siempre visible
  document.getElementById('cdPremisaContent').innerHTML=`
    <p style="font-size:14px;color:var(--fg);line-height:1.7;font-style:italic;margin:0">${escapeHtml(cp.premise||'Sin premisa definida.')}</p>
    <p style="margin-top:8px;font-size:10px;color:var(--muted)"><i class="fas fa-eye" style="margin-right:4px"></i>Visible por personajes y amigos (Social)</p>`;

  // Renderizar contenido de tabs
  renderCdPcs();
  renderCdXpTable();
  renderCdNpcs();
  renderEncounterChars();
  renderBestiaryList();

  // Mostrar página — activar AMBOS: el .page externo Y el .campaign-detail interno
  document.querySelectorAll('.page').forEach(p=>p.classList.remove('active'));
  document.getElementById('page-dm-campaign-detail').classList.add('active');
  // ← Este era el bug: campaignDetailWrap nunca se activaba
  document.getElementById('campaignDetailWrap').classList.add('active');

  document.querySelectorAll('.nav-item').forEach(n=>n.classList.toggle('active',n.dataset.page==='dm-campaigns'));

  // Reset pestañas principales al tab 1 (cd-pjs) — usar IDs explícitos
  document.querySelectorAll('.cd-tab').forEach((t,i)=>t.classList.toggle('active',i===0));
  CD_TAB_IDS.forEach((id,i)=>{
    const el=document.getElementById(id);
    if(el) el.classList.toggle('active', i===0);
  });

  // Reset sub-tabs Sesión
  document.querySelectorAll('#cd-sesion .dm-tab').forEach((t,i)=>t.classList.toggle('active',i===0));
  ['cd-combate','cd-encuentro'].forEach((id,i)=>{
    const el=document.getElementById(id);
    if(el) el.classList.toggle('active', i===0);
  });

  // Reemplazar iconos en el contenido recién renderizado
  if(typeof replaceIcons==='function') replaceIcons(document.getElementById('campaignDetailWrap'));
}

function backToCampaigns(){
  currentCampaignId=null;
  document.getElementById('campaignDetailWrap').classList.remove('active');
  navTo('dm-campaigns');
}

const CD_TAB_IDS=['cd-pjs','cd-sesion','cd-xp','cd-social','cd-pnjs'];
function switchCdTab(el){
  el.closest('.cd-tabs').querySelectorAll('.cd-tab').forEach(t=>t.classList.remove('active'));
  CD_TAB_IDS.forEach(id=>{const c=document.getElementById(id);if(c)c.classList.remove('active');});
  el.classList.add('active');
  const target=document.getElementById(el.dataset.cdtab);
  if(target)target.classList.add('active');
}

// Campaign PJs — con hoja de personaje completa al expandir
function renderCdPcs(){
  const pcs=getPcs();
  const el=document.getElementById('cdPcList');
  if(!pcs.length){
    el.innerHTML='<p style="color:var(--muted);text-align:center;padding:20px">No hay PJs. Añade personajes desde Tablas → PJs.</p>';
    return;
  }
  el.innerHTML=pcs.map(pc=>{
    const cn=pc.className||pc.class||'';
    const hp=pc.hp??pc.hpMax??0;
    const hpPct=pc.hpMax>0?Math.max(0,Math.min(100,hp/pc.hpMax*100)):0;
    const hpColor=hpPct>60?'#50b8a4':hpPct>30?'#c9a84c':'#c4362a';
    const autoSaves=getSavingThrows(cn,pc.level||1)||{};
    return`<div class="acc-section" style="margin-bottom:8px">
      <div class="acc-header" onclick="toggleAcc(this)" style="
        display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:center;
        background:linear-gradient(135deg,rgba(42,28,10,.8),rgba(26,14,5,.9));
        border:1px solid rgba(122,92,42,.4);border-radius:8px;padding:10px 14px;cursor:pointer">
        <span style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:10px">
          <span style="color:#f0d060;font-family:'Cinzel Decorative',serif;font-size:14px">${escapeHtml(pc.name)}</span>
          <span style="font-size:10px;color:#7a6030">${escapeHtml(pc.race)} ${escapeHtml(cn)}</span>
          <span style="background:rgba(122,92,42,.3);border:1px solid rgba(201,168,76,.3);border-radius:50%;width:22px;height:22px;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;font-size:11px;color:#c9a84c;font-family:'Cinzel',serif">${pc.level}</span>
        </span>
        <span style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px">
          <span style="font-size:11px;color:${hpColor};font-family:'Cinzel',serif">${hp}<span style="color:#5a4020">/${pc.hpMax}</span></span>
          <span style="font-size:10px;color:#7a6030">CA ${pc.ac??'—'}</span>
          <span style="font-size:10px;color:#c9a84c">GAC0 ${pc.thac0||getThac0(cn,pc.level||1)||'—'}</span>
          <i class="fas fa-chevron-down" style="color:#7a5c2a"></i>
        </span>
      </div>
      <div class="acc-body" style="border:1px solid rgba(122,92,42,.2);border-top:none;border-radius:0 0 8px 8px">
        <div style="padding:12px">
          ${buildCharSheet(pc)}
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>`;
  }).join('');
}

function addPcToCampaign(){
  navTo('dm-tablas');
  showToast('Añade PJs desde la pestaña Tablas → PJs','info');
}

// Campaign XP Table — con columna Drenadas correcta
function renderCdXpTable(){
  const pcs=getPcs();
  const tbody=document.getElementById('cdXpTableBody');
  if(!pcs.length){
    tbody.innerHTML='<tr><td colspan="8" style="color:var(--muted);text-align:center;padding:16px">No hay PJs en la campaña.</td></tr>';
    return;
  }
  tbody.innerHTML=pcs.map(pc=>{
    const cn=pc.className||pc.class||'';
    const xpNext=pc.xpNext||getXpForLevel(cn,(pc.level||1)+1)||0;
    const xpFalta=Math.max(0,xpNext-(pc.xpCur||0));
    // Drenadas: cada nivel drenado duplica la XP necesaria para el próximo nivel
    const drenadas=pc.drenadas||0;
    const xpDrenada=drenadas>0?xpNext*drenadas:0;
    const xpTotalProximo=xpNext+xpDrenada;
    const puedeSubir=(pc.xpCur||0)>=xpTotalProximo;
    return`<tr>
      <td style="color:var(--gold);font-family:'Cinzel',serif;font-size:11px;white-space:nowrap">
        ${escapeHtml(pc.name)}<br>
        <span style="color:var(--muted);font-size:10px">${escapeHtml(cn)} Niv.${pc.level}</span>
      </td>
      <td><input class="xp-input" id="xpGain_${pc.id}" type="number" min="0" value="0" style="width:80px"></td>
      <td>
        <button class="dm-btn dm-btn-gold dm-btn-sm" onclick="sumXpToPc('${pc.id}')"><i class="fas fa-plus"></i> Sumar</button>
      </td>
      <td style="color:var(--teal-bright);font-weight:600;text-align:right">${(pc.xpCur||0).toLocaleString('es-ES')}</td>
      <td style="text-align:right">${xpNext.toLocaleString('es-ES')}</td>
      <td style="text-align:center">
        <div style="display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;gap:4px">
          <button class="c-btn" onclick="changeDrenadas('${pc.id}',-1)" title="Quitar drenada"><i class="fas fa-minus"></i></button>
          <span style="color:${drenadas>0?'var(--accent-bright)':'var(--muted)'};font-weight:${drenadas>0?'700':'400'};min-width:20px;text-align:center">${drenadas}</span>
          <button class="c-btn" onclick="changeDrenadas('${pc.id}',1)" title="Añadir drenada"><i class="fas fa-plus"></i></button>
        </div>
      </td>
      <td style="text-align:right;color:${xpDrenada>0?'var(--accent-bright)':'var(--fg-dim)'}">
        ${xpTotalProximo.toLocaleString('es-ES')}
        ${xpDrenada>0?`<br><span style="font-size:9px;color:var(--accent-bright)">(+${xpDrenada.toLocaleString('es-ES')} drenadas)</span>`:''}
      </td>
      <td style="text-align:center">
        ${puedeSubir
          ?`<button class="dm-btn dm-btn-gold dm-btn-sm" onclick="levelUpPc('${pc.id}')" title="¡${pc.name} puede subir de nivel!"><i class="fas fa-arrow-up"></i> ¡Subir!</button>`
          :`<span style="font-size:10px;color:var(--muted)">Faltan<br>${xpFalta.toLocaleString('es-ES')} XP</span>`
        }
      </td>
    </tr>`;
  }).join('');

  // Registro de XP de la sesión
  const logEl=document.getElementById('cdXpLog');
  if(logEl){
    if(!cdXpLog.length){
      logEl.innerHTML='<p style="color:var(--muted)">Sin registros esta sesión.</p>';
    } else {
      logEl.innerHTML=cdXpLog.map(e=>`
        <div style="display:flex;justify-content:space-between;padding:4px 8px;border-bottom:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.04)">
          <span style="color:var(--fg-dim)">${escapeHtml(e.name)}</span>
          <span style="color:var(--gold)">+${e.xp.toLocaleString('es-ES')} XP</span>
          <span style="color:var(--muted)">${e.reason}</span>
          <span style="color:var(--muted);font-size:10px">${e.time}</span>
        </div>`).join('');
    }
  }
}

function sumXpToPc(pcId){
  const input=document.getElementById('xpGain_'+pcId);
  const xp=parseInt(input?.value)||0;
  if(xp<=0){showToast('Introduce una cantidad de XP válida','info');return}
  const pcs=getPcs();
  const pc=pcs.find(p=>p.id===pcId);
  if(!pc)return;
  pc.xpCur=(pc.xpCur||0)+xp;
  // Actualizar xpNext
  const xpNext=getXpForLevel(pc.className||pc.class||'',(pc.level||1)+1);
  if(xpNext)pc.xpNext=xpNext;
  savePcs(pcs);
  // Añadir al log
  cdXpLog.push({name:pc.name,xp,reason:'Manual',time:new Date().toLocaleTimeString('es-ES',{hour:'2-digit',minute:'2-digit'})});
  input.value=0;
  renderCdXpTable();
  showToast(`+${xp.toLocaleString('es-ES')} XP para ${pc.name}`,'success');
}

function changeDrenadas(pcId, delta){
  const pcs=getPcs();
  const pc=pcs.find(p=>p.id===pcId);
  if(!pc)return;
  pc.drenadas=Math.max(0,(pc.drenadas||0)+delta);
  savePcs(pcs);
  renderCdXpTable();
}

function levelUpPc(pcId){
  const pcs=getPcs();
  const pc=pcs.find(p=>p.id===pcId);
  if(!pc)return;
  pc.level=(pc.level||1)+1;
  pc.drenadas=Math.max(0,(pc.drenadas||0)-1); // resta una drenada al subir
  const xpNext=getXpForLevel(pc.className||pc.class||'',pc.level+1);
  if(xpNext)pc.xpNext=xpNext;
  savePcs(pcs);
  renderCdXpTable();
  renderCdPcs();
  showToast(`🎉 ¡${pc.name} sube al nivel ${pc.level}!`,'success');
}

function checkLevelUp(pcId){
  const pcs=getPcs();const pc=pcs.find(p=>p.id===pcId);if(!pc)return;
  if(pc.xpCur>=pc.xpNext){showToast(`¡${pc.name} puede subir de nivel! (XP: ${pc.xpCur} / ${pc.xpNext})`,'success')}
  else{showToast(`${pc.name} aún necesita ${(pc.xpNext-pc.xpCur).toLocaleString('es-ES')} XP para subir de nivel`,'info')}
}

// Campaign PNJs
function renderCdNpcs(){
  const s=getSession();
  const el=document.getElementById('cdNpcList');
  if(!s.npcs||!s.npcs.length){
    el.innerHTML='<p style="color:var(--muted);text-align:center;padding:20px">No hay PNJs en esta campaña. ¡Añade el primero!</p>';
    return;
  }
  el.innerHTML=s.npcs.map(n=>{
    const attCls=n.attitude==='Amistoso'?'badge-teal':n.attitude==='Hostil'?'badge-red':'badge-gold';
    return`<div class="npc-item" style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;padding:8px 10px;background:rgba(0,0,0,.2);border-radius:8px;margin-bottom:6px;border:1px solid var(--border)">
      <div style="flex:1">
        <span style="color:var(--fg);font-weight:600">${escapeHtml(n.name)}</span>
        ${n.location?`<span style="color:var(--muted);font-size:11px;margin-left:8px"><i class="fas fa-map-pin" style="margin-right:3px"></i>${escapeHtml(n.location)}</span>`:''}
        ${n.hp?`<span style="color:var(--teal-bright);font-size:11px;margin-left:8px">${n.hp} PG</span>`:''}
      </div>
      <span class="badge ${attCls}" style="font-size:10px">${escapeHtml(n.attitude)}</span>
      <button class="c-btn" onclick="removeCampaignNpc('${n.id}')" title="Eliminar PNJ"><i class="fas fa-times"></i></button>
    </div>`;
  }).join('');
}

function addCampaignNpc(){
  const form=document.getElementById('cdNpcForm');
  if(form)form.style.display=form.style.display==='none'?'block':'none';
}

function saveCampaignNpc(){
  const name=document.getElementById('cdNpcName')?.value.trim();
  if(!name){showToast('El nombre del PNJ es obligatorio','info');return}
  const att=document.getElementById('cdNpcAtt')?.value||'Neutral';
  const loc=document.getElementById('cdNpcLoc')?.value.trim()||'';
  const hp=parseInt(document.getElementById('cdNpcHp')?.value)||0;
  const s=getSession();
  if(!s.npcs)s.npcs=[];
  s.npcs.push({id:'npc_'+Date.now(),name,attitude:att,location:loc,hp});
  saveSession(s);
  // Limpiar form
  ['cdNpcName','cdNpcLoc','cdNpcHp'].forEach(id=>{const el=document.getElementById(id);if(el)el.value='';});
  document.getElementById('cdNpcForm').style.display='none';
  renderCdNpcs();
  showToast(`PNJ "${escapeHtml(name)}" añadido`,'success');
}

function removeCampaignNpc(id){
  const s=getSession();
  s.npcs=(s.npcs||[]).filter(n=>n.id!==id);
  saveSession(s);renderCdNpcs();
}

// Social dentro de campaña
function inviteCdFriend(){
  const name=document.getElementById('cdFriendName')?.value.trim();
  if(!name){showToast('Escribe el nombre del amigo','info');return}
  showToast(`Invitación enviada a ${escapeHtml(name)} — funcionalidad próximamente`,'info');
  document.getElementById('cdFriendName').value='';
}

// ===== ENCOUNTER SYSTEM =====
let encounterData={round:0,monsters:[],activeChars:[]};

function renderEncounterChars(){
  const pcs=getPcs();
  const el=document.getElementById('encounterChars');
  if(!pcs.length){el.innerHTML='<p style="color:var(--muted);font-size:11px">Sin PJs</p>';return}
  el.innerHTML=pcs.filter(p=>p.status==='Activo').map(pc=>`<div class="encounter-char"><input type="checkbox" id="enc_${pc.id}" checked onchange="toggleEncounterChar('${pc.id}',this.checked)"><span style="color:var(--gold)">${escapeHtml(pc.name)}</span><span style="color:var(--muted);font-size:10px">${escapeHtml(pc.race)} ${escapeHtml(pc.className||pc.class||'?')}</span></div>`).join('');
  // Also render active PCs for combate sub-tab
  const el2=document.getElementById('cdActivePcs');
  if(el2)el2.innerHTML=pcs.map(pc=>`<div class="encounter-char"><input type="checkbox" id="act_${pc.id}" ${pc.status==='Activo'?'checked':''} onchange="toggleActivePc('${pc.id}',this.checked)"><span style="color:${pc.status==='Activo'?'var(--teal-bright)':'var(--muted)'}">${escapeHtml(pc.name)}</span><span style="color:var(--muted);font-size:10px">${pc.hp??pc.hpMax}/${pc.hpMax} PG</span></div>`).join('');
}

function toggleEncounterChar(id,checked){
  if(checked&&!encounterData.activeChars.includes(id))encounterData.activeChars.push(id);
  else encounterData.activeChars=encounterData.activeChars.filter(c=>c!==id);
}

function toggleActivePc(id,checked){
  const pcs=getPcs();const pc=pcs.find(p=>p.id===id);if(pc)pc.status=checked?'Activo':'Inconsciente';
  savePcs(pcs);renderEncounterChars();
}

function startEncounterRound(){
  encounterData.round=1;
  document.getElementById('encounterRound').textContent='1';
  showToast('Round 1 iniciado','info');
}

function nextEncounterRound(){
  encounterData.round++;
  document.getElementById('encounterRound').textContent=encounterData.round;
  showToast(`Round ${encounterData.round}`,'info');
}
