function searchBestiary(query){
  const el=document.getElementById('bestiaryResults');
  if(!el)return;
  if(!query.trim()){el.innerHTML='';return}
  const q=query.toLowerCase();
  const results=MONSTER_LIST.filter(m=>m.name.toLowerCase().includes(q)).slice(0,10);
  if(!results.length){el.innerHTML='<p style="color:var(--muted);font-size:11px">Sin resultados.</p>';return}
  el.innerHTML=results.map(m=>`
    <div class="bestiary-item" style="display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:center;padding:5px 8px;background:rgba(0,0,0,.2);border-radius:6px;margin-bottom:4px">
      <span style="font-size:12px;color:var(--fg-dim)">${escapeHtml(m.name)}</span>
      <span style="font-size:10px;color:var(--muted);margin:0 8px">CA:${m.ac} DG:${m.hd}</span>
      <button class="dm-btn dm-btn-sm dm-btn-gold" onclick="addMonsterToEncounter('${escapeHtml(m.name)}',${m.xp})"><i class="fas fa-plus"></i> ${m.xp} XP</button>
    </div>`).join('');
}

function addMonsterToEncounter(name, xpVal){
  // If xpVal not passed, look it up in MONSTER_LIST
  if(!xpVal){
    const found=MONSTER_LIST.find(m=>m.name===name);
    xpVal=found?found.xp:Math.floor(Math.random()*500)+50;
  }
  encounterData.monsters.push({id:'mon_'+Date.now(),name,qty:1,xp:xpVal});
  renderBestiaryList();
  const si=document.getElementById('bestiarySearch');
  const sr=document.getElementById('bestiaryResults');
  if(si)si.value='';
  if(sr)sr.innerHTML='';
  showToast(`${escapeHtml(name)} añadido — ${xpVal.toLocaleString('es-ES')} XP`,'success');
}

function removeMonsterFromEncounter(id){
  encounterData.monsters=encounterData.monsters.filter(m=>m.id!==id);
  renderBestiaryList();
}

function updateMonsterQty(id,val){
  const m=encounterData.monsters.find(x=>x.id===id);
  if(m){m.qty=Math.max(1,parseInt(val)||1);renderBestiaryList()}
}

function renderBestiaryList(){
  const el=document.getElementById('bestiaryList');
  if(!el)return;
  const totalEl=document.getElementById('encounterTotalXp');
  if(!encounterData.monsters.length){
    el.innerHTML='<p style="color:var(--muted);font-size:11px;text-align:center;padding:8px">Sin monstruos añadidos.</p>';
    if(totalEl)totalEl.textContent='0';
    return;
  }
  el.innerHTML=encounterData.monsters.map(m=>`
    <div class="bestiary-item" style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:6px;padding:5px 8px;background:rgba(0,0,0,.2);border-radius:6px;margin-bottom:4px;flex-wrap:wrap">
      <span class="bi-name" style="flex:1;font-size:12px;color:var(--fg-dim);min-width:80px">${escapeHtml(m.name)}</span>
      <div style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:4px">
        <button class="c-btn" onclick="updateMonsterQty('${m.id}',${m.qty-1})"><i class="fas fa-minus"></i></button>
        <input type="number" min="1" value="${m.qty}" onchange="updateMonsterQty('${m.id}',this.value)" style="width:40px;text-align:center;background:rgba(0,0,0,.3);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:4px;color:var(--fg);padding:2px 4px;font-size:12px">
        <button class="c-btn" onclick="updateMonsterQty('${m.id}',${m.qty+1})"><i class="fas fa-plus"></i></button>
      </div>
      <span class="bi-xp" style="color:var(--gold-bright);font-size:12px;font-weight:600;min-width:70px;text-align:right">${(m.xp*m.qty).toLocaleString('es-ES')} XP</span>
      <button class="c-btn" onclick="removeMonsterFromEncounter('${m.id}')"><i class="fas fa-trash" style="color:var(--accent-bright)"></i></button>
    </div>`).join('');
  const total=encounterData.monsters.reduce((s,m)=>s+m.xp*m.qty,0);
  if(totalEl)totalEl.textContent=total.toLocaleString('es-ES');
}

function finalizeEncounter(){
  const total=encounterData.monsters.reduce((s,m)=>s+m.xp*m.qty,0);
  if(total<=0){showToast('No hay XP que distribuir','info');return}
  const pcs=getPcs();
  const activePcs=pcs.filter(p=>p.status==='Activo');
  if(!activePcs.length){showToast('No hay PJs activos para recibir XP','info');return}
  const xpEach=Math.floor(total/activePcs.length);
  const monsterSummary=encounterData.monsters.map(m=>`${m.qty}x ${m.name}`).join(', ');
  const timeStr=new Date().toLocaleTimeString('es-ES',{hour:'2-digit',minute:'2-digit'});
  activePcs.forEach(pc=>{
    pc.xpCur=(pc.xpCur||0)+xpEach;
    const xpNext=getXpForLevel(pc.className||pc.class||'',(pc.level||1)+1);
    if(xpNext)pc.xpNext=xpNext;
    // Añadir al log
    cdXpLog.push({name:pc.name,xp:xpEach,reason:monsterSummary.substring(0,40)+(monsterSummary.length>40?'…':''),time:timeStr});
  });
  savePcs(pcs);
  showToast(`Encuentro finalizado · ${total.toLocaleString('es-ES')} XP totales · ${xpEach.toLocaleString('es-ES')} XP c/u (${activePcs.length} PJs)`,'success');
  encounterData={round:0,monsters:[],activeChars:[]};
  document.getElementById('encounterRound').textContent='0';
  renderBestiaryList();
  renderCdXpTable();
  // Verificar subidas de nivel
  const pcsAfter=getPcs();
  pcsAfter.filter(p=>p.status==='Activo').forEach(pc=>{
    if((pc.xpCur||0)>=(pc.xpNext||9999999)){
      setTimeout(()=>showToast(`🎉 ¡${pc.name} puede subir al nivel ${(pc.level||1)+1}!`,'success'),800);
    }
  });
}

// ===== PLAYER CHARACTERS =====
const PLAYER_CHARS_KEY='img_player_chars';
function getPlayerChars(){return getPcs()}
function savePlayerChars(chars){savePcs(chars)}

/* ===== HOJA DE PERSONAJE COMPLETA ===== */
function buildCharSheet(ch){
  const cn=ch.className||ch.class||'';
  const lv=ch.level||1;
  const ab=ch.abilities||{};
  const fue=ab.fue||ab.FUE||10, des=ab.des||ab.DES||10, con=ab.con||ab.CON||10;
  const int_=ab.int||ab.INT||10, sab=ab.sab||ab.SAB||10, car=ab.car||ab.CAR||10;
  const mFUE=getStatModifiers('FUE',fue)||{}, mDES=getStatModifiers('DES',des)||{};
  const mCON=getStatModifiers('CON',con)||{}, mINT=getStatModifiers('INT',int_)||{};
  const mSAB=getStatModifiers('SAB',sab)||{}, mCAR=getStatModifiers('CAR',car)||{};
  const autoSaves=getSavingThrows(cn,lv)||{parPoison:14,rodStaff:15,petrPoly:14,breath:16,spell:17};
  const hp=ch.hp??ch.hpMax??0;
  const hpMax=ch.hpMax||0;
  const hpPct=hpMax>0?Math.max(0,Math.min(100,hp/hpMax*100)):0;
  const hpColor=hpPct>60?'#50b8a4':hpPct>30?'#c9a84c':'#c4362a';
  const prog=getXpProgress(cn,ch.xpCur||0);
  const xpPct=prog.nextXp>0?Math.min(100,Math.floor((ch.xpCur||0)/prog.nextXp*100)):100;
  const spellSlots=getSpellSlots(cn,lv);
  const armorCat=ARMOR_THIEF_CATEGORY[ch.armorId||'ninguna']||'none';
  const isThief=(cn==='Ladrón'||cn==='Bardo'||cn==='Asesino'||cn==='Ninja');

  // ── ATTR helper
  const attrMod=(val)=>{ const m=Math.floor((val-10)/2); return (m>=0?'+':'')+m; };
  const fueExc=fue>=18&&ch.fuerza_excepcional?` <span style="font-size:9px;color:#c9a84c">/${ch.fuerza_excepcional}</span>`:'';

  // ── Ataques por ronda según clase/nivel
  const atkPerRound=
    ['Guerrero','Paladín','Ranger','Bárbaro','Berserker','Gladiador'].includes(cn)
      ? (lv>=13?'2½':lv>=7?'3/2':'1')
    : ['Clérigo','Druida','Chamán','Cruzado','Templario'].includes(cn)
      ? (lv>=13?'3/2':'1')
    : ['Mago','Ilusionista','WuJen','Brujo'].includes(cn)
      ? (lv>=15?'3/2':'1')
    : '1';

  return`<style>
/* ═══════════════════════════════════════════
   HOJA DE PERSONAJE — ESTILO PERGAMINO PREMIUM
   Inspirada en Baldur's Gate 3 / AD&D 2e
═══════════════════════════════════════════ */
.psh-wrap{
  font-family:'Cinzel',serif;
  background:
    radial-gradient(ellipse at 20% 20%, rgba(139,90,43,.18) 0%, transparent 60%),
    radial-gradient(ellipse at 80% 80%, rgba(139,90,43,.12) 0%, transparent 60%),
    linear-gradient(160deg,#2a1f0e 0%,#1a1208 40%,#0e0b05 100%);
  border:2px solid #7a5c2a;
  border-radius:12px;
  padding:0;
  overflow:hidden;
  position:relative;
}
/* Decorative corner SVGs */
.psh-wrap::before,.psh-wrap::after{
  content:'';position:absolute;width:80px;height:80px;
  background-image:radial-gradient(circle at center,rgba(201,168,76,.15) 0%,transparent 70%);
  border-radius:50%;pointer-events:none;z-index:0;
}
.psh-wrap::before{top:-20px;left:-20px;}
.psh-wrap::after{bottom:-20px;right:-20px;}

/* ── HEADER ── */
.psh-header{
  background:linear-gradient(135deg,#1a0e05 0%,#2d1a08 40%,#1a0e05 100%);
  border-bottom:2px solid #7a5c2a;
  padding:14px 20px 10px;
  position:relative;
  overflow:hidden;
}
.psh-header::after{
  content:'';position:absolute;bottom:0;left:0;right:0;height:1px;
  background:linear-gradient(90deg,transparent,#c9a84c,#f0d060,#c9a84c,transparent);
}
.psh-name-banner{
  font-family:'Cinzel Decorative',serif;
  font-size:clamp(18px,3vw,28px);
  color:#f0d060;
  text-shadow:0 0 20px rgba(240,208,96,.4),0 2px 4px rgba(0,0,0,.8);
  letter-spacing:.12em;
  margin-bottom:8px;
}
.psh-meta-row{
  display:flex;gap:6px;flex-wrap:wrap;align-items:center;
}
.psh-meta-chip{
  background:rgba(122,92,42,.3);
  border:1px solid rgba(201,168,76,.3);
  border-radius:20px;
  padding:2px 10px;
  font-size:10px;
  color:#c9a84c;
  letter-spacing:.06em;
  text-transform:uppercase;
}
.psh-meta-chip strong{color:#f0d060;}
.psh-level-badge{
  background:radial-gradient(circle,#7a5c2a,#4a3818);
  border:2px solid #c9a84c;
  border-radius:50%;
  width:40px;height:40px;
  display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;
  font-size:18px;font-weight:700;color:#f0d060;
  box-shadow:0 0 12px rgba(201,168,76,.4);
  flex-shrink:0;
}

/* ── MAIN BODY ── */
.psh-body{
  display:grid;
  grid-template-columns:1fr 180px 1fr;
  grid-template-rows:auto auto;
  gap:0;
}
@media(max-width:640px){
  .psh-body{grid-template-columns:1fr;}
}

/* ── PORTRAIT CENTER ── */
.psh-portrait-col{
  display:flex;flex-direction:column;align-items:center;
  padding:16px 8px;
  border-left:1px solid rgba(122,92,42,.3);
  border-right:1px solid rgba(122,92,42,.3);
}
.psh-portrait-frame{
  width:140px;height:140px;
  border-radius:50%;
  border:3px solid #7a5c2a;
  box-shadow:0 0 0 1px #c9a84c,0 0 20px rgba(201,168,76,.3),inset 0 0 20px rgba(0,0,0,.5);
  background:radial-gradient(circle at 40% 35%,#2d1a08,#0e0b05);
  display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;
  position:relative;
  overflow:hidden;
  flex-shrink:0;
}
.psh-portrait-frame img{
  width:100%;height:100%;object-fit:cover;border-radius:50%;
}
.psh-portrait-placeholder{
  opacity:.25;
}
/* XP bar under portrait */
.psh-xp-bar-wrap{
  width:140px;margin-top:10px;
}
.psh-xp-label{
  display:flex;justify-content:space-between;
  font-size:9px;color:#7a6030;letter-spacing:.05em;margin-bottom:3px;
}
.psh-xp-track{
  height:6px;background:rgba(0,0,0,.5);
  border:1px solid rgba(122,92,42,.4);border-radius:3px;overflow:hidden;
}
.psh-xp-fill{
  height:100%;
  background:linear-gradient(90deg,#7a5c2a,#c9a84c,#f0d060);
  border-radius:3px;transition:width .4s;
}
/* Class + align chips */
.psh-class-display{
  margin-top:10px;text-align:center;
}
.psh-class-name{
  font-size:13px;color:#c9a84c;letter-spacing:.08em;
  text-shadow:0 0 8px rgba(201,168,76,.3);
}
.psh-race-name{font-size:11px;color:#7a6030;margin-top:2px;}

/* ── ATTRIBUTE MEDALLIONS ── */
.psh-attrs-col{
  padding:14px 12px;
  display:flex;flex-direction:column;justify-content:center;gap:6px;
}
.psh-attr-medal{
  display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;
  background:linear-gradient(135deg,rgba(42,28,10,.8),rgba(26,14,5,.9));
  border:1px solid rgba(122,92,42,.5);
  border-radius:8px;padding:5px 8px;
  position:relative;
  transition:border-color .2s;
}
.psh-attr-medal:hover{border-color:rgba(201,168,76,.6);}
.psh-attr-circle{
  width:46px;height:46px;border-radius:50%;flex-shrink:0;
  background:radial-gradient(circle at 40% 35%,#3d2810,#1a0e05);
  border:2px solid #7a5c2a;
  box-shadow:0 0 8px rgba(201,168,76,.2),inset 0 1px 0 rgba(201,168,76,.2);
  display:flex;flex-direction:column;align-items:center;justify-content:center;
  position:relative;
}
.psh-attr-circle::after{
  content:'';position:absolute;inset:2px;border-radius:50%;
  border:1px solid rgba(201,168,76,.15);pointer-events:none;
}
.psh-attr-val{
  font-size:18px;font-weight:700;color:#f0d060;line-height:1;
}
.psh-attr-name{
  font-size:8px;color:#7a6030;letter-spacing:.06em;text-transform:uppercase;margin-top:1px;
}
.psh-attr-mod-badge{
  position:absolute;top:-4px;right:-4px;
  background:linear-gradient(135deg,#4a3818,#2d1a08);
  border:1px solid #c9a84c;
  border-radius:10px;padding:1px 5px;
  font-size:9px;font-weight:700;color:#c9a84c;
  min-width:22px;text-align:center;
}
.psh-attr-bons{flex:1;display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:2px;}
.psh-attr-bon{font-size:9px;color:#7a8060;padding:1px 0;}
.psh-attr-bon strong{color:#90a070;}

/* ── COMBAT PANEL (right) ── */
.psh-combat-col{
  padding:14px 12px;
  display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:6px;
}
.psh-combat-title{
  font-size:9px;color:#7a6030;letter-spacing:.1em;text-transform:uppercase;
  border-bottom:1px solid rgba(122,92,42,.3);padding-bottom:4px;margin-bottom:4px;
}
.psh-stat-row{
  display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;
  background:linear-gradient(135deg,rgba(42,28,10,.6),rgba(26,14,5,.8));
  border:1px solid rgba(122,92,42,.3);border-radius:6px;
  padding:5px 8px;gap:6px;
}
.psh-stat-lbl{font-size:9px;color:#7a6030;letter-spacing:.05em;text-transform:uppercase;flex:1;}
.psh-stat-val{
  font-size:16px;font-weight:700;font-family:'Cinzel',serif;
  color:#c9a84c;text-shadow:0 0 8px rgba(201,168,76,.3);
  min-width:32px;text-align:right;
}
.psh-stat-val.hp-val{font-size:14px;}
/* HP bar in combat panel */
.psh-hp-track{
  height:4px;background:rgba(0,0,0,.5);border-radius:2px;overflow:hidden;margin-top:3px;
}
.psh-hp-fill{height:100%;border-radius:2px;transition:width .3s;}

/* ── SAVES PANEL (left) ── */
.psh-saves-col{
  padding:14px 12px;
  display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:6px;
}

/* ── SECTION TITLE ornament ── */
.psh-section-title{
  font-size:9px;letter-spacing:.12em;text-transform:uppercase;color:#9a7a3a;
  display:flex;align-items:center;gap:6px;margin-bottom:6px;
}
.psh-section-title::before,.psh-section-title::after{
  content:'';flex:1;height:1px;
  background:linear-gradient(90deg,transparent,rgba(201,168,76,.4));
}
.psh-section-title::after{
  background:linear-gradient(270deg,transparent,rgba(201,168,76,.4));
}

/* ── LOWER PANELS ── */
.psh-lower{
  grid-column:1/-1;
  border-top:1px solid rgba(122,92,42,.3);
  display:grid;
  grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;
  gap:0;
}
.psh-lower-panel{
  padding:12px 14px;
  border-right:1px solid rgba(122,92,42,.2);
}
.psh-lower-panel:last-child{border-right:none;}

.psh-row-item{
  display:flex;align-items:center;gap:6px;
  padding:3px 6px;border-radius:4px;
  border-bottom:1px solid rgba(122,92,42,.12);
  font-size:10px;color:#a09070;
}
.psh-row-dot{
  width:6px;height:6px;border-radius:50%;
  background:rgba(122,92,42,.5);border:1px solid rgba(201,168,76,.3);flex-shrink:0;
}

/* ── WEAPON TABLE ── */
.psh-wtable{width:100%;border-collapse:collapse;font-size:10px;color:#a09070;}
.psh-wtable th{
  font-size:8px;color:#7a6030;letter-spacing:.06em;text-transform:uppercase;
  padding:3px 4px;border-bottom:1px solid rgba(122,92,42,.3);text-align:left;
}
.psh-wtable td{padding:4px;border-bottom:1px solid rgba(122,92,42,.1);}
.psh-wtable tr:hover td{background:rgba(122,92,42,.08);}

/* ── THIEF SKILLS ── */
.psh-thief-row{
  display:flex;align-items:center;gap:6px;margin-bottom:4px;
}
.psh-thief-name{font-size:9px;color:#a09070;min-width:130px;}
.psh-thief-track{
  flex:1;height:5px;background:rgba(0,0,0,.4);
  border:1px solid rgba(122,92,42,.3);border-radius:2px;overflow:hidden;
}
.psh-thief-fill{
  height:100%;
  background:linear-gradient(90deg,#4a7c59,#50b8a4);
  border-radius:2px;
}
.psh-thief-pct{font-size:9px;color:#50b8a4;min-width:34px;text-align:right;font-weight:600;}

/* ── SPELL SLOTS ── */
.psh-spell-row{display:flex;gap:5px;flex-wrap:wrap;}
.psh-spell-pip{
  width:32px;height:32px;border-radius:50%;
  background:radial-gradient(circle,rgba(154,106,191,.2),rgba(26,14,5,.9));
  border:1px solid rgba(154,106,191,.4);
  display:flex;flex-direction:column;align-items:center;justify-content:center;
  font-size:14px;font-weight:700;color:#b57bee;line-height:1;
}
.psh-spell-pip-lbl{font-size:7px;color:#7a5090;margin-top:1px;}

/* ── FOOTER ── */
.psh-footer{
  grid-column:1/-1;
  background:linear-gradient(135deg,#1a0e05,#0e0b05);
  border-top:1px solid rgba(122,92,42,.3);
  padding:8px 16px;
  display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:center;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:8px;
  font-size:10px;color:#7a6030;
}
.psh-lang-list{display:flex;gap:6px;flex-wrap:wrap;}
.psh-lang-chip{
  background:rgba(122,92,42,.2);border:1px solid rgba(122,92,42,.4);
  border-radius:10px;padding:2px 8px;font-size:9px;color:#c9a84c;
}
/* Ornamental border line */
.psh-ornament{
  color:#7a5c2a;font-size:14px;letter-spacing:4px;opacity:.6;
}
</style>

<div class="psh-wrap">

  <!-- ═══ HEADER ═══ -->
  <div class="psh-header">
    <div style="display:flex;align-items:flex-start;gap:12px">
      <div style="flex:1">
        <div class="psh-name-banner">${escapeHtml(ch.name||'Sin Nombre')}</div>
        <div class="psh-meta-row">
          <span class="psh-meta-chip"><strong>${escapeHtml(cn)}</strong></span>
          <span class="psh-meta-chip">${escapeHtml(ch.race||'—')}</span>
          ${ch.alignment?`<span class="psh-meta-chip">${escapeHtml(ch.alignment)}</span>`:''}
          ${ch.deity?`<span class="psh-meta-chip" style="border-color:rgba(154,106,191,.4);color:#b57bee">${escapeHtml(ch.deity)}</span>`:''}
          ${ch.origin?`<span class="psh-meta-chip">${escapeHtml(ch.origin)}</span>`:''}
        </div>
        <div style="margin-top:6px;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px">
          <div style="flex:1;max-width:220px">
            <div style="display:flex;justify-content:space-between;font-size:9px;color:#7a6030;margin-bottom:2px">
              <span>${(ch.xpCur||0).toLocaleString('es-ES')} XP</span>
              <span>${prog.nextXp?prog.nextXp.toLocaleString('es-ES')+' XP':''}</span>
            </div>
            <div style="height:5px;background:rgba(0,0,0,.4);border:1px solid rgba(122,92,42,.3);border-radius:2px;overflow:hidden">
              <div style="height:100%;width:${xpPct}%;background:linear-gradient(90deg,#7a5c2a,#c9a84c,#f0d060);border-radius:2px;transition:width .3s"></div>
            </div>
          </div>
          <span style="font-size:9px;color:#7a6030">${prog.needed!==null?`Faltan ${(prog.needed||0).toLocaleString('es-ES')} XP`:'Nivel máx.'}</span>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div style="display:flex;flex-direction:column;align-items:center;gap:4px">
        <div class="psh-level-badge">${lv}</div>
        <div style="font-size:8px;color:#7a6030;letter-spacing:.06em">NIVEL</div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <!-- ═══ MAIN BODY ═══ -->
  <div class="psh-body">

    <!-- ── LEFT: SAVES ── -->
    <div class="psh-saves-col">
      <div class="psh-combat-title">✦ Salvamentos</div>

      ${[
        ['Par./Veneno/Muerte', autoSaves.parPoison],
        ['Varita/Cetro',       autoSaves.rodStaff],
        ['Petrif./Polimorf.',  autoSaves.petrPoly],
        ['Arma de Aliento',    autoSaves.breath],
        ['Hechizo/Magia',      autoSaves.spell],
      ].map(([lbl,val])=>`
      <div class="psh-stat-row">
        <span class="psh-stat-lbl">${lbl}</span>
        <span class="psh-stat-val" style="font-size:18px;color:#50b8a4">${val||'—'}</span>
      </div>`).join('')}

      ${spellSlots&&spellSlots.some(s=>s>0)?`
      <div style="margin-top:8px">
        <div class="psh-combat-title" style="margin-bottom:6px">✦ Conjuros / Día</div>
        <div class="psh-spell-row">
          ${spellSlots.map((s,i)=>s>0?`
          <div class="psh-spell-pip">
            ${s}
            <div class="psh-spell-pip-lbl">N${i+1}</div>
          </div>`:'').join('')}
        </div>
      </div>`:''}

      ${isThief?`
      <div style="margin-top:8px">
        <div class="psh-combat-title" style="margin-bottom:6px">✦ Habilidades</div>
        ${THIEF_SKILLS.phbSkills.map(sk=>{
          const v=getThiefSkill(sk,des,ch.race||'Humano',armorCat);
          const pct=v===null?0:v;
          return`<div class="psh-thief-row">
            <span class="psh-thief-name">${THIEF_SKILLS.names[sk]?.es||sk}</span>
            <div class="psh-thief-track"><div class="psh-thief-fill" style="width:${pct}%"></div></div>
            <span class="psh-thief-pct">${v===null?'✗':pct+'%'}</span>
          </div>`;
        }).join('')}
      </div>`:''}
    </div>

    <!-- ── CENTER: PORTRAIT + ATTRIBUTES ── -->
    <div class="psh-portrait-col">
      <!-- Portrait -->
      <div class="psh-portrait-frame">
        ${ch.portraitUrl
          ?`<img src="${escapeHtml(ch.portraitUrl)}" alt="${escapeHtml(ch.name)}">`
          :`<svg class="psh-portrait-placeholder" viewBox="0 0 80 80" width="80" height="80">
              <circle cx="40" cy="28" r="16" fill="none" stroke="#7a5c2a" stroke-width="1.5"/>
              <path d="M10 70 Q40 45 70 70" fill="none" stroke="#7a5c2a" stroke-width="1.5"/>
              <path d="M25 65 Q40 52 55 65" fill="none" stroke="#7a5c2a" stroke-width="1" opacity=".5"/>
            </svg>`
        }
      </div>
      <div class="psh-class-display">
        <div class="psh-class-name">${escapeHtml(cn)}</div>
        <div class="psh-race-name">${escapeHtml(ch.race||'—')}${ch.gender?` · ${escapeHtml(ch.gender)}`:''}</div>
        ${ch.age?`<div class="psh-race-name">${ch.age} años</div>`:''}
      </div>

      <!-- Attribute Medallions -->
      <div style="width:100%;margin-top:10px;display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:5px">
        ${[
          ['FUE', fue, fueExc, [(mFUE.hitMod>=0?'+':'')+mFUE.hitMod+' Golpe', (mFUE.dmgMod>=0?'+':'')+mFUE.dmgMod+' Daño']],
          ['DES', des, '',     [(mDES.acMod>=0?'+':'')+mDES.acMod+' CA',       (mDES.missileMod>=0?'+':'')+mDES.missileMod+' Mis.']],
          ['CON', con, '',     [(mCON.hpMod>=0?'+':'')+mCON.hpMod+' PG/Niv']],
          ['INT', int_,'',     [(mINT.langs||0)+' Idiomas']],
          ['SAB', sab, '',     [(mSAB.magDefMod>=0?'+':''+(mSAB.magDefMod||0))+' Def.Mág.']],
          ['CAR', car, '',     [(mCAR.henchmen||0)+' Seguid.',  (mCAR.reactMod>=0?'+':''+(mCAR.reactMod||0))+' Reacc.']],
        ].map(([nm,val,exc,bons])=>`
        <div class="psh-attr-medal">
          <div class="psh-attr-circle">
            <div class="psh-attr-val">${val}${exc}</div>
            <div class="psh-attr-name">${nm}</div>
            <div class="psh-attr-mod-badge">${attrMod(val)}</div>
          </div>
          <div class="psh-attr-bons">
            ${bons.map(b=>`<div class="psh-attr-bon">${b}</div>`).join('')}
          </div>
        </div>`).join('')}
      </div>
    </div>

    <!-- ── RIGHT: COMBAT ── -->
    <div class="psh-combat-col">
      <div class="psh-combat-title">✦ Estadísticas de Combate</div>

      <!-- HP con barra -->
      <div class="psh-stat-row" style="flex-direction:column;align-items:stretch;gap:4px">
        <div style="display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:center">
          <span class="psh-stat-lbl">Puntos de Golpe</span>
          <span class="psh-stat-val hp-val" style="color:${hpColor}">${hp} <span style="font-size:11px;color:#7a6030">/ ${hpMax}</span></span>
        </div>
        <div class="psh-hp-track">
          <div class="psh-hp-fill" style="width:${hpPct}%;background:${hpColor}"></div>
        </div>
      </div>

      ${[
        ['Clase de Armadura', ch.ac??10,    '#50b8a4'],
        ['GAC0',              ch.thac0||getThac0(cn,lv)||20, '#c9a84c'],
        ['Movimiento',        ch.move||12,  '#a09070'],
        ['Ataques / Ronda',   atkPerRound,  '#c9a84c'],
        ['Iniciativa',        `${mDES.reactMod>=0?'+':''}${mDES.reactMod||0}`, '#a09070'],
        ch.mana!==undefined?['Maná',        `${ch.mana||0}/${ch.manaMax||0}`, '#b57bee']:null,
      ].filter(Boolean).map(([lbl,val,col])=>`
      <div class="psh-stat-row">
        <span class="psh-stat-lbl">${lbl}</span>
        <span class="psh-stat-val" style="color:${col}">${val}</span>
      </div>`).join('')}

      <!-- Dados de Golpe -->
      <div class="psh-stat-row">
        <span class="psh-stat-lbl">Dado de Golpe</span>
        <span class="psh-stat-val" style="color:#c9a84c">${CLASSES.find(c=>c.name===cn)?.hitDie||'d8'}</span>
      </div>
    </div>

  </div><!-- end .psh-body -->

  <!-- ═══ LOWER SECTION ═══ -->
  <div class="psh-lower">

    <!-- ── Weapon Proficiencies + Weapons table ── -->
    <div class="psh-lower-panel">
      <div class="psh-section-title">Armas & Pericias</div>

      <!-- Pericias en arma -->
      <div style="display:flex;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:4px;margin-bottom:8px">
        ${(ch.weaponProfs||[]).map(p=>`
          <span style="background:rgba(122,92,42,.2);border:1px solid rgba(122,92,42,.4);border-radius:10px;padding:2px 8px;font-size:9px;color:#c9a84c">${escapeHtml(p)}</span>
        `).join('')||'<span style="font-size:10px;color:#5a4020">Sin pericias registradas</span>'}
      </div>

      <!-- Tabla de armas equipadas -->
      <table class="psh-wtable">
        <thead><tr>
          <th>Arma</th><th>AT</th><th>Daño P/M</th><th>Daño G</th><th>Alcance</th>
        </tr></thead>
        <tbody>
          ${Array.from({length:Math.max(4,(ch.weapons||[]).length+1)},(_,i)=>{
            const w=(ch.weapons||[])[i]||{};
            return`<tr>
              <td style="color:#c0a060">${escapeHtml(w.name||'')}</td>
              <td>${w.attacks||''}</td>
              <td>${w.damage||''}</td>
              <td>${w.damageL||''}</td>
              <td>${w.range||''}</td>
            </tr>`;
          }).join('')}
        </tbody>
      </table>
    </div>

    <!-- ── Non-Weapon Proficiencies + Feats ── -->
    <div class="psh-lower-panel">
      <div class="psh-section-title">Pericias & Dotes</div>

      <div style="display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:8px">
        <!-- NWPs -->
        <div>
          <div style="font-size:8px;color:#7a6030;letter-spacing:.08em;text-transform:uppercase;margin-bottom:4px">No-Arma</div>
          ${(ch.nonweaponProfs||[]).map(p=>`
            <div class="psh-row-item"><div class="psh-row-dot"></div>${escapeHtml(p)}</div>
          `).join('')||'<div class="psh-row-item" style="color:#5a4020">—</div>'}
        </div>
        <!-- Feats -->
        <div>
          <div style="font-size:8px;color:#7a6030;letter-spacing:.08em;text-transform:uppercase;margin-bottom:4px">Dotes</div>
          ${(ch.feats||[]).map(f=>`
            <div class="psh-row-item"><div class="psh-row-dot" style="background:rgba(154,106,191,.3);border-color:rgba(154,106,191,.4)"></div>${escapeHtml(f)}</div>
          `).join('')||'<div class="psh-row-item" style="color:#5a4020">—</div>'}
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>

  </div><!-- end .psh-lower -->

  <!-- ═══ FOOTER: LANGUAGES + ORNAMENT ═══ -->
  <div class="psh-footer">
    <div style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px">
      <span style="font-size:9px;letter-spacing:.08em;text-transform:uppercase;color:#7a6030">Idiomas:</span>
      <div class="psh-lang-list">
        ${(ch.languages||['Común']).map(l=>`<span class="psh-lang-chip">${escapeHtml(l)}</span>`).join('')}
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="psh-ornament">⚜ ✦ ⚜</div>
    <div style="font-size:9px;color:#5a4020;letter-spacing:.04em">
      ${escapeHtml(cn)} · Niv ${lv} · ${escapeHtml(ch.race||'—')}
    </div>
  </div>

</div>`;
}



function renderPlayerChars(){
  const chars=getPlayerChars();
  const el=document.getElementById('playerCharList');
  if(!chars.length){el.innerHTML='<div style="text-align:center;color:var(--muted);padding:40px 0"><i class="fas fa-compass" style="font-size:40px;margin-bottom:15px;display:block;opacity:.5"></i>Mis personajes aparecerán aquí.<br>¡Crea tu primer héroe!</div>';return}
  el.innerHTML=chars.map(ch=>{
    const cn=ch.className||ch.class||'';
    return`
    <div class="acc-section" style="margin-bottom:12px">
      <div class="acc-header" onclick="toggleAcc(this)" style="display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:center">
        <span><span style="color:var(--gold-bright);font-family:'Cinzel',serif;font-size:15px">${escapeHtml(ch.name)}</span> <span style="color:var(--fg-dim);font-size:12px">— ${escapeHtml(ch.race)} ${escapeHtml(cn)} Niv.${ch.level}</span></span>
        <i class="fas fa-chevron-down" style="color:var(--muted)"></i>
      </div>
      <div class="acc-body">
        <div style="padding:12px">
          <div style="display:flex;gap:8px;flex-wrap:wrap;margin-bottom:12px;font-size:11px">
            <span style="color:var(--fg-dim)"><i class="fas fa-compass" style="margin-right:4px;color:var(--gold)"></i>${escapeHtml(ch.alignment||'—')}</span>
            <span style="color:var(--fg-dim)"><i class="fas fa-venus-mars" style="margin-right:4px;color:var(--teal)"></i>${escapeHtml(ch.gender||'—')}</span>
            <span style="color:var(--fg-dim)"><i class="fas fa-cake-candles" style="margin-right:4px;color:var(--gold)"></i>${ch.age||'—'} años</span>
            ${ch.deity?`<span style="color:var(--fg-dim)"><i class="fas fa-hand-sparkles" style="margin-right:4px;color:var(--purple)"></i>${escapeHtml(ch.deity)}</span>`:''}
            ${ch.origin?`<span style="color:var(--fg-dim)"><i class="fas fa-map-pin" style="margin-right:4px;color:var(--teal)"></i>${escapeHtml(ch.origin)}</span>`:''}
          </div>
          ${buildCharSheet(ch)}
          <div style="margin-top:14px;text-align:right">
            <button class="dm-btn dm-btn-sm" style="border-color:var(--teal);color:var(--teal-bright)" onclick="exportPlayerChar('${ch.id}')"><i class="fas fa-save"></i> Exportar JSON</button>
            <button class="dm-btn dm-btn-sm dm-btn-red" onclick="deletePlayerChar('${ch.id}')"><i class="fas fa-trash"></i> Eliminar personaje</button>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>`;
  }).join('');
}

function deletePlayerChar(id){
  if(!confirm('¿Eliminar este personaje?'))return;
  savePlayerChars(getPlayerChars().filter(c=>c.id!==id));
  renderPlayerChars();showToast('Personaje eliminado','info');
}

function exportPlayerChar(id){
  const ch=getPlayerChars().find(c=>c.id===id);
  if(!ch)return;
  const blob=new Blob([JSON.stringify(ch,null,2)],{type:'application/json'});
  const url=URL.createObjectURL(blob);
  const a=document.createElement('a');
  a.href=url;
  a.download=`${(ch.name||'personaje').replace(/\s+/g,'_')}_niv${ch.level||1}.json`;
  a.click();URL.revokeObjectURL(url);
  showToast(`${ch.name} exportado`,'success');
}

function importPlayerChar(){
  const input=document.createElement('input');
  input.type='file';input.accept='.json';
  input.onchange=e=>{
    const file=e.target.files[0];if(!file)return;
    const reader=new FileReader();
    reader.onload=ev=>{
      try{
        const ch=JSON.parse(ev.target.result);
        if(!ch.name||!ch.className){showToast('Archivo inválido','info');return}
        ch.id='pch_'+Date.now();
        const chars=getPlayerChars();chars.push(ch);
        savePlayerChars(chars);renderPlayerChars();
        showToast(`${ch.name} importado`,'success');
      }catch{showToast('Error al leer el JSON','info');}
    };reader.readAsText(file);
  };input.click();
}

// ===== PLAYER CAMPAIGNS =====
function renderPlayerCampaigns(){
  const el=document.getElementById('playerCampaignList');
  if(!el)return;
  el.innerHTML='<div style="text-align:center;color:var(--muted);padding:40px 0"><i class="fas fa-compass" style="font-size:40px;margin-bottom:15px;display:block;opacity:.5"></i>Las campañas en las que participes aparecerán aquí.</div>';
}

// ===== CHARACTER CREATION WIZARD =====
let wizardState={step:1,diceMethod:'3d6',baseAbilities:{FUE:0,DES:0,CON:0,INT:0,SAB:0,CAR:0},raceIndex:0,classIndex:0,weaponProfs:[],nonweaponProfs:[],feats:[]};

const RACES=[
  {
    id:"dwarf",
    nameEs:"Enano",
    nameEn:"Dwarf",
    name:"Enano",
    icon:"fa-hammer",
    desc:"Raza robusta y terrenal, famosa por su artesan\u00eda, valent\u00eda en combate y resistencia a la magia.",
    source:"PHB",
    xpPenalty:false,
    movement:6,

function initWizard(){
  wizardState={step:1,diceMethod:'3d6',baseAbilities:{FUE:0,DES:0,CON:0,INT:0,SAB:0,CAR:0},raceIndex:0,classIndex:0,weaponProfs:[],nonweaponProfs:[],feats:[]};
  renderRaceDisplay();renderClassDisplay();renderProfiencies();
  // Populate deity datalist from DEITIES
  const dl=document.getElementById('deityList');
  if(dl&&typeof DEITIES!=='undefined'){
    dl.innerHTML=DEITIES.map(d=>`<option value="${d.deity}">`).join('');
  }
  goWizardStep(1);
}

function goWizardStep(step){
  wizardState.step=step;
  document.querySelectorAll('.wizard-panel').forEach(p=>p.classList.remove('active'));
  document.getElementById('wizStep'+step)?.classList.add('active');
  document.querySelectorAll('.wizard-step').forEach(s=>{
    const sNum=parseInt(s.dataset.step);
    s.classList.remove('active','completed');
    if(sNum===step)s.classList.add('active');
    else if(sNum<step)s.classList.add('completed');
  });
  if(step===2)renderRaceDisplay();
  if(step===3)renderClassDisplay();
  if(step===4)renderProfiencies();
  if(step===5)renderFeats();
}

function selectDiceMethod(method){
  wizardState.diceMethod=method;
  document.querySelectorAll('.dice-option').forEach(o=>o.classList.toggle('selected',o.dataset.method===method));
  const btn=document.querySelector('[onclick="rollAbilities()"]');
  if(btn)btn.style.display=method==='custom'?'none':'inline-flex';
  if(method==='custom'){
    renderCustomAbilityInputs();
  } else {
    // Restaurar la grilla de display (no inputs)
    const ab=['FUE','DES','CON','INT','SAB','CAR'];
    const labels=['Fuerza','Destreza','Constitución','Inteligencia','Sabiduría','Carisma'];
    document.getElementById('abilityGrid').innerHTML=ab.map((a,i)=>`
      <div class="ability-box">
        <div class="ability-label">${labels[i]}</div>
        <div class="ability-score" id="ab${a}">${wizardState.baseAbilities[a]||'—'}</div>
        <div class="ability-mod" id="mod${a}"></div>
        <div class="ability-racial" id="racial${a}"></div>
      </div>`).join('');
  }
}

function renderCustomAbilityInputs(){
  const ab=['FUE','DES','CON','INT','SAB','CAR'];
  const labels=['Fuerza','Destreza','Constitución','Inteligencia','Sabiduría','Carisma'];
  const modLabels={
    FUE:r=>r?`Golpe ${r.hitMod>=0?'+':''}${r.hitMod} / Daño ${r.dmgMod>=0?'+':''}${r.dmgMod}`:'',
    DES:r=>r?`CA ${r.acMod>=0?'+':''}${r.acMod} / Misiles ${r.missileMod>=0?'+':''}${r.missileMod}`:'',
    CON:r=>r?`PG/nivel ${r.hpMod>=0?'+':''}${r.hpMod}`:'',
    INT:r=>r?`Idiomas ${r.langs||0}`:'',
    SAB:r=>r?`Fallo mágico ${r.magDefMod||0}`:'',
    CAR:r=>r?`Seguidores ${r.henchmen||0}`:''
  };
  document.getElementById('abilityGrid').innerHTML=ab.map((a,i)=>`
    <div class="ability-box">
      <div class="ability-label">${labels[i]}</div>
      <input type="number" min="3" max="25" value="${wizardState.baseAbilities[a]||3}"
        id="ab${a}"
        oninput="setCustomAbility('${a}',this.value)"
        style="width:64px;text-align:center;font-size:22px;font-weight:700;color:var(--gold-bright);
               font-family:'Cinzel',serif;background:rgba(0,0,0,.4);border:1px solid var(--gold);
               border-radius:6px;padding:4px;margin:4px auto;display:block">
      <div class="ability-mod" id="mod${a}">${modLabels[a](getStatModifiers(a,wizardState.baseAbilities[a]||3))}</div>
      <div class="ability-racial" id="racial${a}"></div>
    </div>`).join('');
}

function setCustomAbility(attr,val){
  const v=Math.max(3,Math.min(25,parseInt(val)||3));
  wizardState.baseAbilities[attr]=v;
  const modLabels={
    FUE:r=>r?`Golpe ${r.hitMod>=0?'+':''}${r.hitMod} / Daño ${r.dmgMod>=0?'+':''}${r.dmgMod}`:'',
    DES:r=>r?`CA ${r.acMod>=0?'+':''}${r.acMod} / Misiles ${r.missileMod>=0?'+':''}${r.missileMod}`:'',
    CON:r=>r?`PG/nivel ${r.hpMod>=0?'+':''}${r.hpMod}`:'',
    INT:r=>r?`Idiomas ${r.langs||0}`:'',
    SAB:r=>r?`Fallo mágico ${r.magDefMod||0}`:'',
    CAR:r=>r?`Seguidores ${r.henchmen||0}`:''
  };
  const mods=getStatModifiers(attr,v);
  const modEl=document.getElementById('mod'+attr);
  if(modEl)modEl.textContent=modLabels[attr](mods);
}

function rollAbilities(){
  if(wizardState.diceMethod==='custom'){renderCustomAbilityInputs();return}
  const ab=['FUE','DES','CON','INT','SAB','CAR'];
  const modLabels={
    FUE:r=>r?`Golpe ${r.hitMod>=0?'+':''}${r.hitMod} / Daño ${r.dmgMod>=0?'+':''}${r.dmgMod}`:'',
    DES:r=>r?`CA ${r.acMod>=0?'+':''}${r.acMod} / Misiles ${r.missileMod>=0?'+':''}${r.missileMod}`:'',
    CON:r=>r?`PG/nivel ${r.hpMod>=0?'+':''}${r.hpMod}`:'',
    INT:r=>r?`Idiomas ${r.langs||0}`:'',
    SAB:r=>r?`Fallo mágico ${r.magDefMod||0}`:'',
    CAR:r=>r?`Seguidores ${r.henchmen||0}`:''
  };
  ab.forEach(a=>{
    let val;
    if(wizardState.diceMethod==='4d6'){const d=[Math.floor(Math.random()*6)+1,Math.floor(Math.random()*6)+1,Math.floor(Math.random()*6)+1,Math.floor(Math.random()*6)+1];d.sort((a,b)=>a-b);val=d[1]+d[2]+d[3]}
    else{val=Math.floor(Math.random()*6)+1+Math.floor(Math.random()*6)+1+Math.floor(Math.random()*6)+1}
    wizardState.baseAbilities[a]=val;
    document.getElementById('ab'+a).textContent=val;
    const mods=getStatModifiers(a,val);
    document.getElementById('mod'+a).textContent=modLabels[a](mods);
    document.getElementById('racial'+a).textContent='';
  });
}

function renderRaceDisplay(){
  const r=RACES[wizardState.raceIndex];
  const isPHB=['human','dwarf','elf','gnome','half-elf','halfling','half-orc'].includes(r.id);
  const sourceBadge=isPHB?'<span class="badge badge-gold" style="font-size:9px;margin-top:6px">PHB</span>':'<span class="badge badge-purple" style="font-size:9px;margin-top:6px">Suplemento</span>';
  const adj=r.abilityAdj||r.adj||{};
  const adjLabels={FUE:'FUE',DES:'DES',CON:'CON',INT:'INT',SAB:'SAB',CAR:'CAR',fue:'FUE',des:'DES',con:'CON',int:'INT',sab:'SAB',car:'CAR'};
  const adjStr=Object.entries(adj).filter(([k,v])=>v!==0).map(([k,v])=>`${adjLabels[k]||k}: ${v>0?'+':''}${v}`).join(' · ')||'Sin ajustes';
  const specStr=(r.specialAbilities||[]).slice(0,2).map(s=>s.name||s).join(', ');
  const langStr=(r.languages?.automatic||[]).join(', ');
  document.getElementById('raceDisplay').innerHTML=`
    <div class="sel-icon"><i class="fas ${r.icon}"></i></div>
    <div class="sel-name">${r.nameEs||r.name}</div>
    <div class="sel-desc">${r.desc||''}</div>
    <div class="sel-adjustments">${adjStr}</div>
    ${langStr?`<div style="font-size:10px;color:var(--teal-bright);margin-top:4px"><i class="fas fa-language" style="margin-right:4px"></i>${langStr}</div>`:''}
    ${specStr?`<div style="font-size:10px;color:var(--gold);margin-top:4px">${specStr}</div>`:''}
    ${sourceBadge}`;
  // Update ability grid with racial adjustments
  const ag=document.getElementById('raceAbilityGrid');
  if(ag){
    const abUpper=['FUE','DES','CON','INT','SAB','CAR'];
    const abLower=['fue','des','con','int','sab','car'];
    ag.innerHTML=abUpper.map((a,idx)=>{
      const base=wizardState.baseAbilities[a]||0;
      const adjVal=adj[a]||adj[abLower[idx]]||0;
      const total=base+adjVal;
      const lim=r.abilityLimits||{};
      const limStr=lim[a]?`<span style="font-size:9px;color:var(--muted)">[${lim[a][0]}-${lim[a][1]}]</span>`:'';
      return`<div class="ability-box">
        <div class="ability-label">${a}</div>
        <div class="ability-score">${base||'—'}</div>
        ${adjVal?`<div class="ability-racial">${adjVal>0?'+':''}${adjVal} → <strong>${total||'—'}</strong></div>`:''}
        ${limStr}
      </div>`;
    }).join('');
  }
}

function cycleRace(dir){
  wizardState.raceIndex=(wizardState.raceIndex+dir+RACES.length)%RACES.length;
  renderRaceDisplay();
}

function renderClassDisplay(){
  const cl=CLASSES[wizardState.classIndex];
  const sourceBadge=cl.source==='Suplemento'
    ?'<span class="badge badge-purple" style="font-size:9px">Suplemento</span>'
    :'<span class="badge badge-gold" style="font-size:9px">PHB</span>';
  const isSpellcaster=!!SPELL_CLASS_MAP[cl.name];
  const thac0at1=getThac0(cl.name,1);
  const saves=getSavingThrows(cl.name,1)||{};
  const slots1=isSpellcaster?getSpellSlots(cl.name,1):null;
  const slotStr=slots1?slots1.filter(s=>s>0).map((s,i)=>`Niv${i+1}:${s}`).join(' '):'Sin conjuros';
  const xp2=getXpForLevel(cl.name,2);
  document.getElementById('classDisplay').innerHTML=`
    <div class="sel-icon"><i class="fas ${cl.icon}"></i></div>
    <div class="sel-name">${cl.name}</div>
    <div style="font-size:10px;color:var(--teal-bright);margin-bottom:4px">${cl.group||''}</div>
    <div class="sel-desc">${cl.desc}</div>
    <div class="sel-adjustments" style="display:flex;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:6px;margin-top:6px">
      <span><strong>Dado:</strong> ${cl.hitDie||'d6'}</span>
      <span><strong>GACO:</strong> ${thac0at1}</span>
      <span><strong>Sal.:</strong> ${saves.parPoison||'—'}</span>
      <span><strong>Arm:</strong> ${cl.wpnProfs}wp/${cl.nwpnProfs}nwp</span>
      ${xp2?`<span><strong>XP Niv2:</strong> ${xp2.toLocaleString('es-ES')}</span>`:''}
    </div>
    ${isSpellcaster?`<div style="font-size:10px;color:var(--purple);margin-top:4px"><i class="fas fa-hat-wizard" style="margin-right:4px"></i>${slotStr}</div>`:''}
    ${sourceBadge}`;
  renderProfiencies();
}

function cycleClass(dir){
  wizardState.classIndex=(wizardState.classIndex+dir+CLASSES.length)%CLASSES.length;
  renderClassDisplay();
}

function renderProfiencies(){
  const cl=CLASSES[wizardState.classIndex];
  // Filter weapons to only those usable by this class
  const availableWeapons=ARMAS
    ? ARMAS.filter(a=>{const r=a.restriccion;return r.includes('Todas')||r.includes(cl.name);}).map(a=>a.nombre)
    : WEAPONS;
  document.getElementById('weaponProfCount').textContent=`${wizardState.weaponProfs.length} de ${cl.wpnProfs}`;
  document.getElementById('nonweaponProfCount').textContent=`${wizardState.nonweaponProfs.length} de ${cl.nwpnProfs}`;
  document.getElementById('weaponProfList').innerHTML=availableWeapons.map(w=>{
    const locked=(cl.name==='Guerrero'&&false); // reserved for future specialization
    return`<div class="prof-item${wizardState.weaponProfs.includes(w)?' checked':''}"><input type="checkbox" ${wizardState.weaponProfs.includes(w)?'checked':''} onchange="toggleProf('weapon','${w}',this.checked,this)"><span>${w}</span></div>`;
  }).join('');
  document.getElementById('nonweaponProfList').innerHTML=NONWEAPONS.map(n=>`<div class="prof-item${wizardState.nonweaponProfs.includes(n)?' checked':''}"><input type="checkbox" ${wizardState.nonweaponProfs.includes(n)?'checked':''} onchange="toggleProf('nonweapon','${n}',this.checked,this)"><span>${n}</span></div>`).join('');
}

function toggleProf(type,name,checked,el){
  const cl=CLASSES[wizardState.classIndex];
  if(type==='weapon'){
    if(checked&&wizardState.weaponProfs.length>=cl.wpnProfs){if(el)el.checked=false;showToast('Límite de pericias de arma alcanzado','info');return}
    if(checked)wizardState.weaponProfs.push(name);
    else wizardState.weaponProfs=wizardState.weaponProfs.filter(p=>p!==name);
  }else{
    if(checked&&wizardState.nonweaponProfs.length>=cl.nwpnProfs){if(el)el.checked=false;showToast('Límite de pericias no-arma alcanzado','info');return}
    if(checked)wizardState.nonweaponProfs.push(name);
    else wizardState.nonweaponProfs=wizardState.nonweaponProfs.filter(p=>p!==name);
  }
  renderProfiencies();
}

function renderFeats(){
  document.getElementById('featsList').innerHTML=FEATS_LIST.map(f=>`<div class="prof-item${wizardState.feats.includes(f)?' checked':''}"><input type="checkbox" ${wizardState.feats.includes(f)?'checked':''} onchange="toggleFeat('${f}',this.checked)"><span>${f}</span></div>`).join('');
}

function toggleFeat(name,checked){
  if(checked)wizardState.feats.push(name);
  else wizardState.feats=wizardState.feats.filter(f=>f!==name);
  renderFeats();
}

function createCharacter(){
  const name=document.getElementById('newCharName').value.trim();
  if(!name){showToast('Debes darle un nombre al personaje','info');return}
  // Validar que se hayan tirado los dados
  const hasRolled=Object.values(wizardState.baseAbilities).some(v=>v>0);
  if(!hasRolled){showToast('Debes tirar las características en el Paso 1 antes de crear el personaje','info');goWizardStep(1);return}
  const race=RACES[wizardState.raceIndex];
  const cls=CLASSES[wizardState.classIndex];
  const adj=race.abilityAdj||race.adj||{};
  const abilities={};
  const abUpper=['FUE','DES','CON','INT','SAB','CAR'];
  const abLower=['fue','des','con','int','sab','car'];
  abUpper.forEach((a,idx)=>{
    abilities[abLower[idx]]=(wizardState.baseAbilities[a]||10)+(adj[a]||adj[abLower[idx]]||0);
  });
  // HP con dado de clase + mod CON
  const hitDieMatch=(cls?.hitDie||'d6').match(/d(\d+)/);
  const hitDieNum=hitDieMatch?parseInt(hitDieMatch[1]):6;
  const conMod=getStatModifiers('CON',abilities.con||10)?.hpMod||0;
  const hpRoll=Math.floor(Math.random()*hitDieNum)+1;
  const hpTotal=Math.max(1,hpRoll+conMod);
  // Auto-calcular THAC0, salvaciones, movimiento y CA desde game_data
  const autoThac0=getThac0(cls.name,1);
  const autoSaves=getSavingThrows(cls.name,1)||{parPoison:14,rodStaff:15,petrPoly:14,breath:16,spell:15};
  const desMod=getStatModifiers('DES',abilities.des||10);
  const autoCA=10+(desMod?.acMod||0);
  const autoMove=race.movement||12;
  // XP siguiente nivel
  const autoXpNext=getXpForLevel(cls.name,2)||2000;
  // Idiomas automáticos de la raza
  const autoLangs=race.languages?.automatic||['Común'];
  // Pericias de arma gratuitas de la raza
  const autoWpn=[...wizardState.weaponProfs,...(race.weaponProficiencyBonus||[])];
  const newChar={
    id:'pch_'+Date.now(),
    name,
    race:race.nameEs||race.name,
    className:cls.name,
    level:1,
    abilities,
    alignment:document.getElementById('newCharAlign').value,
    gender:document.getElementById('newCharGender').value,
    age:parseInt(document.getElementById('newCharAge').value)||20,
    deity:document.getElementById('newCharDeity').value,
    origin:document.getElementById('newCharOrigin').value,
    height:document.getElementById('newCharHeight').value,
    weight:document.getElementById('newCharWeight').value,
    size:document.getElementById('newCharSize').value,
    weaponProfs:[...new Set(autoWpn)],
    nonweaponProfs:[...wizardState.nonweaponProfs],
    feats:[...wizardState.feats],
    languages:autoLangs,
    hp:hpTotal,
    hpMax:hpTotal,
    ac:autoCA,
    thac0:autoThac0,
    move:autoMove,
    xpCur:0,
    xpNext:autoXpNext,
    status:'Activo',
    savePar:autoSaves.parPoison,
    savePoi:autoSaves.parPoison,
    saveRod:autoSaves.rodStaff,
    saveBre:autoSaves.breath,
    saveSpe:autoSaves.spell,
    createdAt:new Date().toLocaleDateString('es-ES')
  };
  const chars=getPlayerChars();
  chars.push(newChar);
  savePlayerChars(chars);
  showToast(`¡${name} ha sido creado! (PG: ${hpTotal})`,'success');
  // Reset wizard
  setTimeout(()=>{navTo('player-chars')},500);
}
</script>
</body>
</html>
